title: Community Operations Specilist
description:
We are a fast-growing Digital Product Creators company dedicated to helping entrepreneurs turn their knowledge, skills, and ideas into profitable digital products using our all-in-one system powered by Go High Level. We are seeking a driven, energetic, and results-oriented Community Operations Specialist who is passionate about helping people win and thrives in a high-performance, fast-paced environment. In this role, you will be responsible for onboarding new members, delivering exceptional customer support, hosting trainings and Q&A sessions, and guiding members step-by-step as they build and launch their digital products. You will play a critical role in increasing engagement, retention, and overall community success by conducting outreach, monitoring member progress, celebrating wins, and providing hands-on coaching.



This position also includes managing support communications, assisting with certification programs, leading implementation-based trainings, and supporting revenue growth through recommending and upselling relevant products and services. From time to time, you may also be required to conduct training classes, lead workshops, or step in as a trainer to ensure our community continues to receive high-quality education and support. We are looking for someone who is confident, proactive, tech-savvy, and able to lead with both strategy and heart—someone who can motivate, educate, and hold members accountable to results. If you are excited about personal growth, digital products, and being part of a company that is scaling rapidly, this is an opportunity to grow with us. Additional details regarding responsibilities, expectations, and performance metrics will be reviewed during the interview process.

title: Brand Identity Designer
description:
Job Title: Brand Identity Designer — Part Time, Remote

About PlunkOps

PlunkOps is a Florida-based AI software company. We are launching multiple products simultaneously and need a talented brand identity designer to build our visual foundation from the ground up.



The Role

This is not a one-logo job. You will be designing the complete brand identity for a portfolio of 6 products. Each brand needs to feel cohesive as a family while having its own distinct personality. Full creative briefs are provided after selection and NDA signing.



Deliverables for Each Brand



Primary logo (wordmark and/or icon)

Color palette (primary, secondary, accent)

Typography pairing recommendation

Logo variations (light and dark versions)

One-page brand guidelines summary



What We Are Looking For



Strong portfolio showing clean modern brand identity work

Experience with tech, SaaS, or startup brands preferred

Ability to work in both dark/minimal and warm/community aesthetics

Figma or Adobe Illustrator proficiency

Good English communication — briefs and feedback via Slack

Someone who brings ideas, not just executes instructions



What We Are NOT Looking For



Clip art or template-style logos

Someone who needs a lot of hand-holding

Designers whose portfolio is mostly print or social media graphics



Engagement



Part-time, 10-20 hours per week

Rate: $6-8/hour depending on experience and portfolio

Start: As soon as possible

Communication: Slack async, feedback within 24 hours



How to Apply:

 

Share your portfolio and answer this one question: What is your design philosophy when building a brand identity for a tech company?



That answer tells us more than your resume. Full project details including brand briefs are provided after NDA signing. If your portfolio is strong you will hear back

title: CRM & Operations Virtual Assistant — Attio Platform Specialist
description:
# CRM & Operations Virtual Assistant — Attio Platform Specialist



Company: Relational Minds (Australia-based child and family mental health service)

Type: Full-time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: Flexible within AEST business hours (Mon–Fri, with at least 4 hours daily overlap with 9am–5pm AEST)

Salary: PHP 35,000–75,000/month depending on experience

Start: Immediate



---



About us



Relational Minds is a growing child and adolescent mental health clinic based in Victoria, Australia. We operate across multiple locations and via national telehealth. We work with families — not just individuals — and our service model tracks long-term relationships with families across their child's developmental lifespan.



We are a small, values-driven team building something meaningful. We need someone who cares about getting systems right because real families depend on them.



---



The role



We are hiring a CRM and Operations Virtual Assistant to become the backbone of our customer experience and administrative operations. This is not a data entry role. You will be responsible for:



CRM setup and ownership (Attio platform)



- Configuring our Attio CRM workspace from the ground up based on detailed documentation we will provide

- Creating custom objects (Family, Child, Service Episode) with defined fields and relationships

- Building pipeline stages that mirror our clinical journey

- Setting up filtered views and dashboards for our clinical and CX teams (e.g. overdue reports, families approaching milestones, inactive families)

- Configuring automations and workflow triggers within Attio

- Integrating Attio with Kajabi (our membership and content platform) via Zapier or Make

- Maintaining data integrity, deduplication, and ongoing system hygiene

- Documenting all configurations, processes, and SOPs as you build them



Operational and admin support



- Monitoring the CRM daily to ensure no family falls through the cracks

- Flagging overdue actions, missing consent forms, and stalled cases to the appropriate tea
mber

- Supporting clinicians by chasing outstanding administrative tasks (unsigned reports, missing forms)

- Reminding clinicians when families have not had an appointment in three or more weeks

- Generating fortnightly case lists for senior clinicians showing where each family sits in their journey

- Coordinating with the CX team to ensure proactive outreach is happening at developmental milestones

- Supporting scheduling, correspondence, and general admin tasks as needed



---



#What we need from you



Must-have skills



- Demonstrated experience setting up a CRM platform from scratch (not just using one that was already configured). We want to see examples of workspaces you have built — objects, pipelines, automations, dashboards

- Strong experience with at least two of: Attio, HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, Zoho, Monday CRM, or a similar modern CRM

- Experience with Zapier or Make for building integrations between platforms

- Excellent written English — you will communicate directly with Australian clinicians and families

- Strong attention to detail and an ability to follow complex documentation precisely

- Ability to work independently, solve problems, and flag issues before they become problems

- Experience working in healthcare, allied health, disability services (NDIS), or a family services environment is a strong advantage



Nice-to-have



- Familiarity with Attio specifically (custom objects, automations, API)

- Experience with Kajabi (courses, memberships, community,
 sequences)

- Basic understanding of Zapier webhooks, filters, and multi-step automations

- Experience supporting clinical or professional services teams

- Familiarity with Australian healthcare systems, NDIS, or Medicare



---



How to apply



Do not send a generic cover letter. We will not read it.



Instead, please answer the following questions in your application. Copy and paste them and write your answers below each one:



1. What is the most complex CRM you have set up from scratch? Describe the objects, pipelines, and automations you built. Name the platform.



2. Have you ever built a CRM that tracks relationships (not just transactions)? For example, where one record (like a family or company) has multiple linked child records and multiple service episodes over time. Describe how you structured it.



3. Have you used Attio? If yes, describe what you built. If no, describe how you would learn a new CRM platform you haven't used before.



4. Describe a situation where you identified a process gap or system problem before your employer noticed it. What did you do?



5. What is your experience with Zapier or Make? Give an example of a multi-step automation you have built.



6. Include the phrase "I read the full job post" at the top of your application so we know you followed these instructions.



---



What you can expect from us



- A long-term role with a growing organisation (this is not a short-term project)

- Detailed documentation and training materials — we will not leave you guessing about what to build

- A respectful, professional working relationship with clear expectations and regular feedback

- Opportunities to grow your role as the organisation scales

- Direct access to leadership — you will work closely with the practice director and operations manager



---



Important: Confidentiality and IP protection



This role involves access to sensitive clinical systems, family data, and proprietary business processes. Before commencing work, you will be required to sign:



- A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) covering all client data, clinical information, business processes, and proprietary systems you encounter during your employment

- A Confidentiality and IP Assignment Agreement confirming that all systems, configurations, workflows, automations, documentation, and SOPs you create during your employment are the intellectual property of Relational Minds

- An Acceptable Use Policy governing your access to our platforms, data handling standards, and security requirements



You will be granted access to systems progressively (not all at once) as trust is established. All platform access will be via company-managed accounts with appropriate permissions. We use activity logging and will conduct periodic access reviews.



These are standard protections for any role involving sensitive data and system architecture. If you have experience working under similar agreements, please mention this in your application.



---



About the hiring process



1. Application review — we read your answers to the six questions above

2. Short screening call (15 min, video) — to confirm communication skills and availability

3. Paid test task (2–3 hours, compensated at your hourly rate) — we will give you access to a sandbox Attio workspace and ask you to configure a small portion of our system based on documentation we provide. This tests your ability to follow complex instructions and build CRM architecture independently

4. Final interview (30 min, video) — with the practice director and operations manager

5. Offer and onboarding — NDA and IP agreements signed before platform access is granted



We respond to every serious application. If you follow the instructions above, you will hear from us.

title: Controller
description:
POSITION DESCRIPTION

We are looking for a highly capable financial specialist to optimize our financial operations in line with our business objectives. You will assist in any or all of the facets of Finance, including but not limited to: Payroll, Accounts Payable, Accounts Receivable, Budgeting and Forecasting, Expense Management, Cash Management, Taxes, Internal Audits, Cost Accounting, and Fixed Assets accounting.

To ensure success as a financial specialist, you should exhibit extensive experience in financial analysis and sound knowledge of financial models. An accomplished financial specialist is someone whose expertise optimizes financial performance and helps realize business goals.

KEY JOB TASKS

? Generate A/R invoices ensuring contractual compliance.

? Generate Purchase orders for internal approval & tracking of large expenses.

? Manage and accept all incoming payments from customers.

? Receive and verify incoming bills, log into the accounting system ensuring proper job costing

accounting, and ensure timely payment.

? Manage employee reimbursements, review, verify, and document.

? Manage credit card entries, reconciliations, and proper job costing.

? Assist Controller with cash flow entries.

? Assist Controller with Budgeting and Forecasting.

? Generate Payables reports and other reports as requested.

Desired Qualifications

1. Bachelor's degree in accounting, finance, or a similar field.

2. At least five years' experience as a financial administrator, or similar.

3. Advanced competency in financial management and accounting software.

4. In-depth knowledge of accounting standards and industry regulations.

5. Extensive experience in corporate finances, auditing, and performance management.

6. Superb organizational and time management abilities.

7. Excellent leadership, communication, and collaboration skills.

title: Executive & Multimedia VA
description:
We are looking for our next Executive & Multimedia VA

Full-Time | Remote | 6-Month Contract (Potential to Extend)



Application Requirements:

To apply, please submit the following:



A link to your updated resume (PDF format only).



A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) made specifically for this job post. Tell us about your experience in content creation, why you thrive working autonomously, and why you’re the right fit for this high-level role.



A portfolio or links to internal documents, SOPs, or multimedia content (videos/graphics) you have designed.



A brief cover letter that includes your expected salary.



Note: Generic or pre-recorded videos will not be accepted. Incomplete applications will NOT be considered.



The Role:

We are a busy, Australian-based window blinds manufacturing company seeking a high-level Executive Virtual Assistant to support our Directors. This isn't just an admin role; we need a creative "right hand" who can take a concept and run with it. If you have a sharp eye for design, a talent for creating professional internal content, and the ability to work with zero hand-holding, we want to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Multimedia Content Creation: Designing and producing high-quality internal documents, training resources, and visual assets that "look the part."



Executive Support: Managing traditional VA tasks for two busy directors with efficiency and discretion.



Research & Initiative: Sourcing tools, information, or assets independently. You are expected to find solutions before asking for guidance.



Documentation: Building and refining SOPs and internal guides to a professional, boardroom-ready standard.



Outcome Management: Taking full ownership of projects from brief to completion, ensuring high-quality delivery every time.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



Exceptional Autonomy: You are a self-starter who knows "what looks good" and can deliver polished work without constant feedback loops.



Multimedia Savvy: Strong skills in tools like Canva, Adobe Suite, or similar video/graphic software.



Advanced Communication: Impeccable written and verbal English—able to communicate clearly with Australian leadership.



Attention to Detail: You have high standards for your own work and rarely need a second set of eyes to catch mistakes.



Proactive Mindset: You don't just wait for instructions; you anticipate needs and research the "how-to" yourself.



Experience: Proven track record in executive assistance and creative content/document production.



If you’re a professional who takes pride in high-level execution and wants to join a supportive, fast-paced international team, we’d love to see what you can do!

title: Manga / Anime Story Writer for Long-Term Black-Inspired Shonen Project
description:
We are looking for a creative writer who loves anime, manga, shonen storytelling, and strong character development to help us grow an original story project over time.



This is a story with big long-term potential. I already have the bare bones of the world, characters, themes, story ideas, visuals, slideshows, and inspiration material, but I need the right writer to help bring it to life in a bigger way.



The goal is to build something that feels inspired by the emotional and epic journey of series like Naruto, One Piece, and Hunter x Hunter, while creating something original that is deeply rooted in Black and African-inspired characters, culture, themes, and perspective. I want this story to feel powerful, meaningful, exciting, and able to get serious when needed, while still having the fun, heart, wonder, and energy people love in shonen manga.



What I need help with:



Expanding my current story ideas into a fuller world

Helping develop arcs, plotlines, lore, and character backstories

Suggesting improvements and fresh ideas that help the story grow

Helping shape pacing, emotional 
nts, rivalries, themes, and long-term payoffs

Organizing story notes and inspiration into a more useful form

Giving feedback on what works and what needs to improve

Possibly helping prepare the story for platforms like WEBTOON, Tapas, MANGA Plus Creators by SHUEISHA, GlobalComix, or other manga/webcomic-friendly platforms

Possibly learning and assisting with AI art generation workflows later on if interested (I can help teach this)



Ideal person:



Loves anime, manga, otaku culture, and storytelling

Understands what makes a great shonen series work

Has respect for and some understanding of Black culture, African-inspired themes, and diverse characters

Can help create something original without making it feel generic

Is imaginative, organized, and good at communication

Is open to a long-term collaboration if we work well together

Can keep story ideas, characters, and project material private and confidential

Is pleasant to work with, humble, creative, and dependable



Nice if you also know about:



WEBTOON

Tapas

MANGA Plus Creators by SHUEISHA

GlobalComix

Webcomic formatting

Manga pacing

Storyboarding or light editing

AI art tools or willingness to learn



Job setup:

This can be part-time or full-time depending on your rate, skill, and fit. I am open to starting with a smaller paid test project and then growing into a longer-term role.



To apply, please answer these questions:



1. What anime or manga best shows your storytelling taste and why?

2. Which shonen series do you think have the best worldbuilding, and why?

3. Have you ever written your own story, script, comic, webtoon, or manga-style project?

4. What experience do you have with WEBTOON, Tapas, GlobalComix, MANGA Plus Creators, or similar platforms?

5. How comfortable are you writing characters and themes inspired by Black and African culture?

6. Are you willing to sign a confidentiality / non-disclosure agreement and keep all ideas private?

7. Are you open to long-term work if the project grows?

8. What are your rates for part-time and full-time work?

9. How soon could you start?

10. Please send samples of your writing or story work or your portfolio link.



We care a lot about communication, trust, creativity, and passion. We are looking for someone who does not just want a random writing job, but someone who would enjoy helping build a meaningful story world over time.

Thank you for your time.

title: Amazon FBA Wholesale Purchasing Manager – Experienced Only
description:
Amazon FBA Wholesale Purchasing Manager – Experienced Only



We are hiring an Amazon FBA Wholesale Account Manager with a strong focus on purchase order management, vendor relationships, and buyer oversight.

This role is heavily focused on reviewing and submitting purchase orders, maintaining communication with vendors, and overseeing a team of buyers by reviewing their work and holding them accountable to ensure accuracy, consistency, and performance.



We’re looking for someone who already has experience managing buyers and reviewing their purchase orders, not someone learning this for the first time.



You will be responsible for managing the day-to-day operations of an Amazon FBA wholesale business. This includes analyzing supplier catalogs, making purchasing decisions, and managing inventory to keep the account running efficiently.

If you’ve actually worked inside a wholesale operation and understand how everything ties together, this will be a strong fit.





Key Responsibilities



Sourcing & Product Analysis

Analyze supplier catalogs to identify profitable wholesale products

Perform deep product analysis using Keepa, Rev Seller, Seller Central data, and other tools

Evaluate competition, buy box behavior, and sales velocity before purchasing



Purchase Orders & Purchasing

Create, review, and approve purchase orders

Ensure pricing, margins, and quantities meet company buying criteria

Submit orders to vendors and track confirmations, invoices, and timelines

Catch and fix mistakes before they impact inventory or cash flow



Vendor Management

Subitting purchase orders and communicating directly with suppliers and distributors

Maintain strong relationships and ensure smooth ordering processes

Handle delays, shortages, pricing issues, and backorders



Buyer Management

Manage and oversee a team of buyers

Review their work and ensure buying decisions meet company buying criteria

Provide feedback, catch mistakes, and enforce consistency

Hold the team accountable for performance and output



Inventory & Replenishment

Track inventory levels and maintain proper stock levels

Plan replenishment based on sales velocity and historical data

Forecast demand and coordinate restocks

Avoid stockouts and over-ordering





Performance Tracking

Track purchasing activity, inventory levels, and overall performance of the buying team

Identify inefficiencies and improve processes where needed. 





Requirements

3+ years of experience managing Amazon FBA wholesale accounts (not private label, not arbitrage)

Strong understanding of Keepa and product analysis

Experience in analyzing supplier catalogs and making purchasing decisions

Experience creating, reviewing, and submitting purchase orders

Experience working directly with suppliers and distributors

Deep familiarity with Seller Central (shipments, reconciliations, account health, troubleshooting)

Understanding of buy box behavior, competition, and replenishment



What We’re Looking For

Detail-oriented — you catch mistakes before they happen

High ownership — you don’t need to be micromanaged

Fast execution — you get things done

Problem solver — you figure things out without constant direction

Clear communicator — direct and organized



Work Schedule

Full-time

Monday to Friday

9AM – 5PM EST

Remote



Compensation

Base salary + performance-based bonus

Paid bi-weekly



Why Join Us

This role offers strong growth potential. As you perform well, you’ll have the opportunity to take on more responsibility and move into a leadership position managing a larger team. You’ll have real ownership over purchasing, vendor relationships, and inventory, with the ability to make an impact on the business. We operate in a fast-moving environment, but with clear systems and structure in place. If you’re looking for a long-term opportunity where you can grow and develop within a wholesale operation, this will be a strong fit.







How to Apply



Include the following:

Summary of your Amazon wholesale experience

Fill out Application: 

Include in application: Loom video explaining your experience (No Loom = automatic rejection)

title: Recruitment Specialist | End-to-End Recruiter
description:
Recruitment Specialist | End-to-End Recruiter



We are looking for a reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented Recruitment Specialist to support our growing team.



In this role, you will manage the full recruitment process — from sourcing and screening to interview coordination, candidate endorsement, and onboarding support. We need someone who is confident in identifying quality talent, keeping hiring pipelines organized, and maintaining clear communication with both candidates and internal stakeholders.



This is a great opportunity for someone with strong recruitment experience who enjoys working in a fast-paced remote environment and can take ownership of multiple roles at once.



Key Responsibilities

Manage end-to-end recruitment for open roles across different functions

Source candidates through job boards, LinkedIn, referrals, social platforms, and internal talent pools

Review applications and shortlist qualified candidates based on role requirements

Conduct initial screening interviews and assess communication, experience, and role fit

Coordinate interviews with hiring managers and clients

Prepare candidate summaries, interview notes, and endorsement profiles

Maintain accurate recruitment records, trackers, and ATS updates

Follow up with candidates throughout the hiring process

Assist with job ad posting and sourcing strategy recommendations

Support onboarding coordination for successful hires

Help improve recruitment workflow, candidate quality, and turnaround time

What We’re Looking For

Proven experience in end-to-end recruitment

Strong sourcing and screening skills

Experience recruiting for remote roles is highly preferred

Ability to assess candidates beyond resume matching

Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal

Excellent organization and attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple open roles and priorities at the same time

Proactive, resourceful, and able to work independently

Preferred Experience

Background in recruiting for roles such as admin support, executive assistants, customer service, operations, marketing, finance, or specialist remote roles

title: GHL Funnel Builder & Workflow Specialist – Full-Time – Remote – VA Position
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're hiring 1-2 skilled and detail-oriented Virtual Assistants to join our fast-growing, AI-driven, service-based business as "GHL Funnel Builder & Workflow Specialists" — where you'll be duplicating, editing, and building out funnels and automated workflows inside GoHighLevel (GHL) for our expanding lineup of similar products and services.



This is a REMOTE position perfect for VAs who are highly technical, organized, and experienced with GoHighLevel — specifically in funnel building and workflow automation.



WORK SCHEDULE

Flexible Timezones (PH & USA Time)

Average 40-Hour Workweek



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

- Strong GoHighLevel (GHL) Experience — Required (Funnel Builder, Workflow Automation, Pipelines)

SALARY OFFER

- Month 1 $600/mo (Training Month)

- Month 3 Onwards $900/mo



INCENTIVES OFFER

GoHighLevel Funnel Building

GHL Workflows

 Automation

title: Social Media Marketing Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

7 Leaves Cafe is a specialty beverage brand with 40+ locations across Southern California and other states. We are building a social media function from the ground up — and we want it built on AI.



This is not a traditional social media role. You will own the entire social media operation — strategy, content creation, scheduling, analytics, and community engagement — using Claude AI (Cowork and Claude Code) as your primary production engine. You are not managing a team of designers and copywriters. You are the operator, and AI is your team.

If you have never used AI tools to produce real marketing output at speed, this role is not for you. If you have, and you are looking for a company that will let you run, keep reading.



WHAT YOU OWN

- Full-stack social media management — across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts — strategy through execution

- AI-powered content production — using Claude AI (Cowork and Code) to generate copy, campaign briefs, visual direction, content calendars, and performance reports

- Content calendar and publishing cadence — for all platforms, aligned with brand campaigns, seasonal launches, LTOs, and cultural 
nts

- Community engagement and brand voice — ensuring every interaction reflects 7 Leaves' warm, culturally rooted, community-driven identity

- Performance analytics and reporting — tracking KPIs (engagement rate, reach, follower growth, content velocity) and translating data into strategic decisions

- Platform-specific optimization — understanding what works on each channel and adapting content format, tone, and timing accordingly

- Cross-functional coordination — partnering with Operations, R&D, and Brand teams to turn business initiatives into social content



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

- 3+ years managing social media for a consumer brand (food & beverage, retail, or lifestyle preferred)

- Demonstrated, hands-on experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent) to produce marketing content — not theoretical knowledge, real output

- Proficiency with Claude AI Cowork and/or Claude Code for content workflows, or demonstrated ability to learn rapidly

- Strong visual eye — you can art-direct AI-generated content, select imagery, and ensure brand consistency without a design team

- Fluency in platform-native content creation for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and

- Data-driven mindset — you make decisions based on performance metrics, not assumptions

- Excellent written communication — you can write in a brand voice that feels human, warm, and intentional

- Self-directed operator who thrives with ownership and minimal oversight



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Experience building AI-augmented workflows — prompt libraries, content templates, automated reporting pipelines

- Familiarity with Claude Projects, Claude Code CLI, or MCP (Model Context Protocol) integrations

- Experience with short-form video production (shooting, editing, or directing)

- Experience with social media management platforms (Later, Sprout Social, Hootsuite, or similar)



HOW WE MEASURE SUCCESS

First 30 Days:

- Audit existing social presence across all platforms

- Establish Claude AI content production workflow (prompts, templates, brand voice calibration)

- Deliver first AI-produced content calendar for leadership review

First 90 Days:

- Full content production pipeline operational — consistent publishing cadence across all four platforms

- Baseline KPIs established and first performance report delivered

- Cross-functional content coordination with Ops and R&D teams in rhythm

Ongoing:

- Month-over-month growth in engagement rate, follower count, and content velocity

- Measurable reduction in content production time through AI workflow optimization

- Brand voice consistency score maintained across all platforms

title: Recruitment Specialist
description:
**REMOTE RECRUITER HIGH PERFORMANCE ROLE ????**



We’re scaling fast and need a recruiter who can actually keep up.



This is not an admin role. You’ll be speaking to candidates daily, qualifying them properly, and helping us bring in high-quality people who can perform in a face-to-face sales environment.



If you’ve worked in direct sales before, you’ll understand exactly what we’re looking for.



**About Us**

We’re Synchro Sales, an Australian-based face-to-face sales company operating across multiple campaigns and locations. We care about performance, standards, and building strong teams.



The goal is to scale Synchro very quickly. Because of that, this role won’t stay as just recruitment. As we grow, this will naturally evolve into a leadership position where you’ll be training new recruiters, managing a team, and helping drive national expansion.



Your role will directly impact how fast and how well we grow.



**Your Role**

• Post and manage job ads across multiple platforms

• Call, screen, and qualify candidates daily

• Assess communication, attitude, and overall fit

• Book interviews and manage schedules

• Book in observation days and coordinate logistics

• Send onboarding
s and manage new starter communication

• Follow up contracts, document sign-offs, and compliance paperwork

• Create ID badges and assist with onboarding setup

• Keep a consistent pipeline of quality candidates

• Support admin and operations tasks where required



**Non-Negotiables**

• Exceptional English, clear, fluent, and neutral sounding

• You must sound natural on the phone, not scripted or overly accented

• Strong communication and ability to lead a conversation confidently

• Experience in face-to-face sales is essential

• Prior experience recruiting for sales or marketing roles (not office/admin roles)

• Must understand how to identify strong face-to-face sales candidates

• Highly organised and able to manage multiple applicants at once

• Reliable, proactive, and fast-moving



**Work Requirements**

• Applicants are required to have reliable high-speed internet

• Must have a noise-free working environment with no background disturbances during work hours



**This Role Is For Someone Who**

• Understands what a good salesperson looks like

• Has experience hiring for sales environments, not corporate office roles

• Can filter out weak candidates quickly

• Is confident speaking with people from different backgrounds

• Takes ownership and doesn’t need constant direction



**What You Get**

• Long-term remote role with a growing Australian company

• Stable income with performance-based upside

• Clear progression into a Recruitment Manager / leadership role

• Opportunity to build and lead your own recruitment team

• Responsibility to train, develop, and manage new recruiters

• Direct involvement in building a high-performance national team



We are very particular about who we hire for this role.

If your communication is not clear, sharp, and natural, this will not be the right fit.



If you are confident in your ability and meet the standard, apply now.

title: Client Success Manager (Google Ads Agency)
description:
Role focus:

Client communication, delivery coordination, follow-up enforcement, and internal accountability across Google Ads clients. This is an embedded operator role. You are not a consultant. You are not here to redesign the agency. You are here to ensure promises turn into execution and clients feel supported, without the founder needing to chase.

Who you will work with:

You will work directly with the Founder, the Head of Google Ads, media buyers, the operations team, and the technical team. Most communication is in Slack. Project tracking is in 
.



Core outcomes of the role:

- Clients feel consistently supported, informed, and confident.

- Nothing discussed on calls gets forgotten.

- Tasks are assigned with owners and deadlines in 
.

- Follow-ups happen automatically through process, not micromanagement.

- Delivery stays on track and delays are surfaced early.



Primary responsibilities:

A. Client communication ownership

- Be present on all client calls (monthly by default, sometimes weekly).

- Take structured notes or review Fireflies notes and convert them into clear action items.

- Manage ongoing Slack-based client communication: acknowledge messages, clarify requests, and ensure they are routed to the right owner.

- Maintain a professional, calm, polished client presence.

- Ensure clients receive updates on progress without needing to chase.



B. Project and delivery coordination

- Convert every call into a 
 task list with clear owners and realistic deadlines.

- Work with media buyers to confirm timelines, then lock deadlines in Monday.

- Track progress daily through Monday and Slack.

- Ensure tasks are completed to standard and on time, or surfaced early if blocked.

- Maintain a clean delivery record per client (what was requested, what was done, what is pending).



C. Follow-up and accountability

- Follow up on overdue tasks by first pinging the correct stakeholder in the internal Slack channel.

- If issues persist, escalate patterns to leadership during your weekly check-in.

- Your job is not to pressure people; your job is to ensure visibility and follow-through through a clear system.



D. Internal operating rhythm

Daily: monitor client channels, ensure new tasks are created, confirm owners and next steps.

Weekly: prepare a short internal delivery summary for leadership and the Head of Google Ads (what moved, what’s stuck, what needs attention).

Monthly: support QBR/SBR scheduling, ensure agenda items are captured, and make sure action items are executed post-call.



Non-negotiable skills and expectations:

- Strong written and spoken English (client-facing).

- High follow-up discipline and strong organisational skills.

- Strong judgment under ambiguity: you can interpret client requests and translate them into internal tasks.

- You are fast, calm under pressure, and proactive without being chaotic.

- 
 proficiency is required. Slack proficiency is required.

- You can learn and use Google Ads language well enough to follow calls and communicate accurately, even if you are not the media buyer.



You operate with ownership: if something is unclear, you clarify it; if something is blocked, you surface it early.





Tools you will use:

Slack, 
, Google Drive, Fireflies, Google Docs, Looker Studio (viewing reports), basic Google Ads familiarity (view-only context).



Ideal background:

- Account manager, customer success manager, delivery coordinator, project manager in a marketing agency environment.



- Experience working with performance marketing teams (Google Ads preferred).

And understanding



- Comfortable with fast-paced teams and remote collaboration across time zones.





Preferred hiring regions

Georgia, South Africa, Philippines (high level only)



Trial period:

Paid trial period. You will be assessed on responsiveness, follow-through, clarity, and ability to keep delivery moving without chaos.



How to apply -

Send:

A short intro



Examples of client-facing or delivery roles you’ve held



Any Google Ads Agency experience



The tools you’ve used (especially Monday and Slack)



A short Loom (optional but preferred) explaining how you manage client follow-up and prevent tasks from slipping

title: Klaviyo Lifecycle Specialist (Flows, Logic & Performance)
description:
About EMK Skincare



EMK is a luxury biotech skincare brand rooted in clinical performance and plant-based biotechnology. Our formulas are powered by AgaveFlora-V™, a proprietary bio-signaling complex designed to support skin renewal, resilience, and long-term skin health.



Our marketing approach is education-led, ritual-based, and performance-driven — not aggressive or discount-focused.



Role Overview



We are hiring a Klaviyo Lifecycle Specialist to take ownership of our
 performance.



This role focuses on optimizing flows, improving logic, and driving measurable results — not just building
s.



You will work within an established marketing system and improve it through better segmentation, testing, and lifecycle strategy.



What You Will Own



You will be responsible for improving:



Flow performance and revenue

 engagement and conversion

Repeat purchase behavior

Overall lifecycle effectiveness



This is a performance-driven role with real ownership.



Key Responsibilities



1. Flow Optimization (Immediate Priority)



Improve existing flows using:

conditional splits

segmentation

timing optimization

Focus on performance improvement, not rebuilding from scratch



2. A/B Testing (Weekly Execution)



Run ongoing A/B tests across flows and campaigns

Test subject lines, messaging structure, timing, and segmentation

Track results and apply learnings



3. Flow Expansion & Cleanup



Review additional flows and identify opportunities

Improve or rebuild based on performance gaps

Prioritize based on revenue impact



4. Campaign Support (Selective)



Improve segmentation and targeting for campaigns

Support execution when needed (not primary focus)



5. Reporting & Insights



Provide weekly performance updates

Clearly communicate:

what improved

what did not work

what will be tested next

How We Work

You will focus on performance, logic, and testing

Copy and brand voice are handled by our internal copy team

Creative assets are provided when needed

You will work closely with our team but have independent ownership of your work



Requirements

3+ years experience with Klaviyo

Strong experience building and optimizing
 flows

Experience with segmentation and lifecycle marketing

Experience running A/B tests

Strong attention to detail and organization

Ability to think critically and improve systems (not just follow instructions)

Important



This role is NOT:



a copywriting role

a design role

a social media role

a discount-driven marketing role



We are a luxury skincare brand and require a more thoughtful, customer-aware approach.



Performance & Growth Opportunity



This role starts as part-time but is designed to grow.



As you improve performance, there is opportunity for:



increased hours

higher compensation

expanded ownership



You will play a key role in building a core revenue channel for the brand.





Compensation & Hours

Hourly Rate: $10–$14/hour (based on experience)

Schedule: 20 hours per week



This role follows a consistent daily schedule of approximately 4 hours per day, 5 days per week.



We require:



2–3 hours of overlap daily with our team for communication

reliable, consistent availability during agreed working hours



This structure allows for:



faster execution

consistent progress

ongoing optimization and testing



As performance improves, there is opportunity for:



increased hours

higher compensation

expanded ownership



We are looking for someone interested in a long-term role with growth potential.



Holidays & Schedule



We observe Philippine holidays.



If a holiday falls within the work week, hours may be flexibly redistributed across other working days to maintain overall weekly hours and ensure continuity of work.



We value both consistency and balance, and aim to support a sustainable long-term working relationship.







To Apply



Please include:



Examples of flows you have improved or optimized

A short explanation of how you approach lifecycle
 marketing

How you would improve an existing skincare
 flow

title: Virtual Asisstant
description:
Company: Ron’s Window Cleaning

Position: Customer Success Rep (a.k.a. Virtual Assistant)

Website: 



—————— Introduction ——————

Looking for something better than the usual boring job?

So are we!



We need someone with a clear English accent who enjoys talking to people, answering calls and
s, booking jobs, organizing details, and helping the team stay on track.

Your mission?





Help us run our exterior cleaning business smoothly - keeping clients happy, tracking numbers, handling invoices, and using systems to make things better every day.



At Ron’s Window cleaning, we offer more than just a job - we offer stability, growth, and a team that supports you.



Here’s What You’ll Get:

- Work-life balance

- Recognition for your work

- Ownership and responsibility

- A job that makes a real difference

We’re building a fun, purpose-driven team that helps homeowners while keeping things light and positive.







—————— Job Description ——————

The details:

We’re looking for someone with clear English-speaking skills and quick adaptability. You’ll be the first point of contact for our clients — answering calls, booking jobs, replying to
s, and making sure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes.

At Ron’s Window Cleaning, we don’t just clean homes — we create 5-star client experiences. As our Customer Success Rep (a.k.a. Virtual Assistant), you’ll help us deliver on that promise.



What You'll Be Doing:

- Ability to work from Central Time Zone (Canada) 8am – 4pm - Monday to Friday.

- Answering phones,
s, and texts with friendliness and clarity

- Scheduling and rescheduling jobs in our CRM (Jobber)

- Inputting notes within 2 minutes of every call or

- Keeping client satisfaction above 96%

- Helping our Sales & Production Managers with day-to-day tasks

- Responding to “simple”
s within 24 hours or by 4:00pm

If you’ve got questions, our managers always has your back.





—————— Skills & Tool’s You Must Have ——————

- Clear, easy-to-understand English accent

 (You must be fluent and easy to understand to be considered for this role)

- Confident and professional phone presence

 You’ll be talking to clients regularly — a friendly tone and clear delivery are key.

- Fluent
 communication

 You must write clearly, professionally, and with warmth.

- Cold reach-out & follow-up skills

 Comfortable sending first-contact messages and keeping up with leads.

- CRM experience

 You should be familiar with Customer Relationship Management tools — we use Jobber.

- Google/Microsoft Workspace know-how

 You’ll need to navigate Google Docs, Microsoft Excel, and Google Drive with ease.

- VOIP or Dialer system experience

 You’ll be making and receiving calls through online tools.

- Quick learner with strong time management

 You must be self-motivated and able to manage your tasks and priorities daily.





—————— Computer & Hardware Requirements ——————

To do your best work, you’ll need a solid setup:

- Stable Internet (Minimum 50 Mbps)

- Computer or Laptop (nothing slow, please!)

- 2 Monitors (multitasking is a must)

- Webcam

- Headset with (good quality) mic

- Mouse & Keyboard

- Desk & Comfortable Chair

- Internet Router

- Backup Power Supply (UPS) – just in case

- Environment that you can talk loudly in

*** Other Must-Haves ***

- Very few power outages (ideally none)

- Can work Monday to Friday, Central Time Zone (Canada) 8am – 4pm

- You are NOT working any other job right now



Comfortable with:

- Speaking with customers on the phone (majority of the day)

- Basic IT troubleshooting

- Data entry & file organization





—————— How to Apply ——————

Interested in this role? Awesome!

Please apply directly through this hiring ad.

- - - Please do NOT
 or call us — we’re only reviewing applications submitted through this platform.

If you’re a great fit, we’ll be in touch soon to set up the next step.





We can’t wait to meet you!

title: Experienced Probate Real Estate Cold Caller (High-Intent Leads)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an experienced cold caller who understands probate real estate leads and knows how to handle sensitive conversations with heirs, personal representatives, and families.



This is not a beginner position.



You will be working fresh probate leads in Maryland. These are high-intent, time-sensitive opportunities. Your role is to identify motivation and set qualified appointments for our acquisitions team.



What You’ll Be Doing

Call and text 30–60 probate leads per day

Speak with personal representatives (PRs) and heirs

Build rapport in sensitive situations involving recent deaths

Identify property ownership, motivation, and timeline

Handle objections professionally

Set qualified appointments for our acquisitions closer

Accurately log all activity in the CRM

Required Experience



You must have experience in:



Real estate cold calling

Probate or inheritance leads

Speaking with distressed or sensitive sellers



If you have only done general cold calling, this is not a fit.



Requirements

Must speak English very well

Must know how to use a CRM

Strong communication skills (natural, not robotic)

High emotional intelligence

Ability to handle rejection and stay consistent

Organized and reliable

Performance Expectations

30–60 calls/texts per day

Consistent follow-up

Focus on quality conversations and real opportunities

Ability to set qualified appointments

Compensation



Compensation will be discussed based on experience and performance. High performers will be rewarded.



Ideal Candidate

Has worked probate leads before

Understands how to speak with heirs and PRs

Can build trust quickly

Knows how to identify real motivation

How to Apply



To apply, send us a message on WhatsApp at:



+1 (443) Seven, zero, two — six, one, zero, nine



Please include:



A voice message so we can hear how well you speak

A brief explanation of your experience with probate or real estate leads

The CRM systems you have used

Your availability

Important



If you have never worked probate or inheritance leads before, please do not apply.

title: Long-Form YouTube Editor (Personal Brand – Talking Head Content)
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a high-level, detail-oriented video editor to join our team and handle long-form YouTube content for a personal brand.



The content will primarily consist of talking head footage, with occasional use of b-roll, graphics, and supporting visuals to enhance retention and storytelling.



This is NOT a faceless/AI content role.



If your experience is primarily:



 - Faceless videos

- AI-generated content

- Basic subtitle edits / 
 edits



Do NOT apply.



We are looking for an editor who understands personal brand storytelling, pacing, and how to make a single person on camera engaging over long-form content.



What We’re Looking For:



- Strong experience editing long-form YouTube videos (8–20+ minutes)

- Proven ability to edit talking head content for creators/personal brands

- Understanding of retention-based editing (keeping viewers engaged throughout)



Skilled in:



- J-cuts & L-cuts

- Pacing and timing

- Strategic zooms and cuts

- B-roll integration

- Subtle sound design

- Ability to make edits feel clean, modern, and not over-edited



IMPORTANT – Do NOT Apply If:



- You have never edited long-form talking head content for a creator/personal brand

- Your portfolio is primarily faceless, AI-generated, or short-form only

- You cannot provide real examples of long-form work

- You are looking for quick/low-effort editing work



Nice to Have (Bonus):



- Experience editing short-form content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)



If you can also handle short-form, there is additional paid opportunity for this

However, long-form is the priority and requirement



Responsibilities:



- Edit long-form YouTube videos (8–20+ minutes)

- Cut and structure raw footage into engaging narratives

- Add b-roll, graphics, and visual elements where appropriate

- Maintain high retention through pacing and editing decisions

- Collaborate on feedback and revisions



Compensation:



- Pay per video or monthly (based on experience)

- Competitive rates based on skill level

- Additional compensation available for short-form content (if applicable)

- Opportunity for increased pay and long-term growth as you prove yourself



Work Expectations:



- Consistent turnaround times

- Ability to take feedback and improve quickly

- Strong communication

- Attention to detail is non-negotiable



How to Apply:



Please include the following:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience editing long-form YouTube content

3. 3–5 examples of long-form videos you’ve edited (REQUIRED)

4. (Optional) Examples of short-form work

5. Tools/software you use

6. The word “LONGFORM PRO” at the top of your application (to confirm you read everything)



Selection Process:



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a paid trial edit to evaluate quality, attention to detail, and fit for the role.

title: Customer Support Representative – Luxury Travel & Airport Services (Remote)
description:
Qualifications:



- Previous experience in the travel industry is a must (travel agency, airline, or airport operations).



- Excellent written and spoken English communication skills.



- Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and ability to manage multiple systems simultaneously.



- Good knowledge of world geography and travel destinations.



- Strong technical and multitasking skills – you’ll be using multiple tools and systems daily.



- Access to a computer or laptop, fast, reliable Wi-Fi, and a working phone for calls.



- Ability to remain productive and responsive in a fast-paced environment – no calls or
s left unanswered.



- Detail-oriented with high accuracy in data entry and documentation.



- Willingness to work early mornings, late nights, weekends, and public holidays (varied shifts).



Job Description:



- Respond promptly to all incoming calls,
s, and messages related to pre- and post-service requests.



- Manage new bookings — verify details, confirm service information, and ensure accuracy in data entry.



- Confirm that all required details are collected, verified, and communicated clearly to the client.



- Create and send invoices, track payments, and record transactions in the client database.



- Assist clients with special travel requests or last-minute changes.



- Communicate proactively with the manager on duty about urgent cases, complaints, or additional tasks.



- Ensure all new orders, changes, and cancellations follow company policy and time-frame rules.



- Promote and cross-sell additional services and return-trip assistance when appropriate.

description:

1. This is for A+ English (no accents) CLOSERS. Please only apply if you have A+ English and you have closed a deal before.

2. Please submit a 
 recording link introducing yourself and why you are a committed teammate and why you are looking for a job.

3. Hours are Monday-Saturday from 8:30am-5:30pm Central Time Zone. Saturday hours can be discussed. [Confirm you are good with these hours.]

4. You must have clear audio/microphone and 16GB machine and it helps to have a dual-screen setup. [Tell me your PC specs]

5. Pay starts at $6.50 per hour for strong candidates with strong acquisitions closing experience. [Confirm]

We can train, but we need a true closer, not just an ISA or appointment setter. We have leads-- we just need a strong, committed, and motivated closer.



We are a land company that is seeking a few more COMMITTED and MOTIVATED teammates to join our squad. We have a great team, and our company has been in business for several years. We promote internally and give raises/bonuses to our top performers! This is not a "gig"! Please only apply if you're a real professional. As an Acquisitions Manager, you’ll be responsible for speaking directly with property owners, negotiating deals, delivering offers, and closing opportunities. This is not an entry-level role—we want someone confident, competitive, and motivated by results.



If you know how to control conversations, build rapport quickly, and guide sellers toward a decision, you’ll fit right in.



What You’ll Do:

-Speak with inbound and outbound seller leads

-Build strong rapport and uncover seller motivation

-Present and deliver offers with confidence

-Negotiate terms and close deals over the phone

-Follow up consistently to convert warm opportunities

-Strong communication skills with the ability to build trust fast

-Competitive mindset with a results-driven attitude

title: Real Estate Video/Photograpy Editor
description:
About Us

Bolder Digital is an Australian-based recruitment agency committed to connecting top Filipino talent with leading businesses globally. We are looking for an individual to join our team and work remotely from the Philippines as we are based in Australia (Remote, based in the Philippines, working on Australian Eastern Time Zone 8/9 AM – 5 PM).



Job Type

Full-Time – Long term/Gig



Start Date:

ASAP



Compensation:

Negotiable — based on proven expertise



Overview

We are hiring an elite Video Editor with advanced, professional-level experience in real estate, construction, architecture, and promotional brand content.



This role requires someone who has spent years working in high-pressure commercial environments — someone who understands tight turnarounds, precision editing, narrative flow, and the visual standards required in premium marketing.



You’ll be working across:

High-end real estate property videos

Builder & construction showcases

Architectural features & design storytelling

Promotional brand edits for businesses

If you don’t have industry-proven commercial experience, don’t apply.

If you do — we want you.



Key Responsibilities

Real Estate, Construction & Promo Editing

Edit cinematic, high-impact property videos showcasing interiors, exteriors, lifestyle elements, architecture, and land features

Build fast-turnaround construction progress videos, promo reels, project showcases, and brand storytelling pieces

Craft engaging short-form edits for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts using clean pacing, crisp sound design, and strong narrative structure

Masterfully repurpose long-form shoots into multiple content deliverables

Apply brand identity, graphics, typography, colour grading, and transitions with consistency and precision

Creative Execution & Collaboration

Work from raw media and briefs to produce polished, broadcast-level edits

Take constructive criticism without ego — improve, iterate, and refine

Work efficiently under pressure, meeting tight deadlines and high-volume demands

Communicate clearly with our internal team and clients across review cycles



Optional but Preferred

Photo editing experience in Photoshop & Lightroom

Ability to design static promotional assets (carousels, quotes, graphic posts)

Strong understanding of brand identity and visual strategy



Portfolio Requirements

Submit 10–15 examples of:

Real estate, construction, or architectural video edits

Promotional commercial edits

Short-form vertical content (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

(Optional) Static design work

For each item, include your typical editing timeframe (e.g. “average time to edit a 2-minute real estate showcase” or “average time for a 30-second promo reel”).

Applicants who cannot provide a portfolio at this level will not be considered.



Requirements

Expert-level skill in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects. (Final Cut or DaVinci Resolve acceptable for masters only.)

Minimum 3–5+ years professional experience in real estate/construction/promotional editing

Strong understanding of modern pacing, visual hooks, retention strategy, and commercial storytelling

Ability to work fast without compromising quality

Willingness to learn, grow, adapt — no ego

Availability during Australian Eastern Time working hours

Reliable internet + hardware capable of smooth high-res workflows



Additional Preferences

Strong colour grading ability

Understanding of real estate marketing strategy

Familiarity with aerial/drone workflow

Ability to contribute ideas to improve visual strategy



Benefits

Competitive pay based on expertise

Flexible working structure

Long-term, consistent work

High-level creative environment with room to grow



How to Apply

Submit:

Resume

Short cover letter

A portfolio with required samples

Your average editing times per content type

Use the application code VIDDY so we know you’ve read the full role description.



IMPORTANT: This is an expert-only position. You will be skills-tested.

If you’re not proven, not fast, or not world-class — this isn’t for you.

title: Full Stack & AI Developer
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for a sharp, execution-focused Lead Full Stack & AI Developer to take ownership of multiple projects that are already in advanced stages of development. This isn’t a start-from-scratch role—most of our platforms are 70–90% built. We need someone who can jump in, assess where things stand, and drive them across the finish line.

You’ll lead development across our portfolio of tech products, working directly with the CEO. The right person is someone who thrives in fast-moving environments, can context-switch between projects, and brings both technical depth and the leadership instincts to keep things on track without heavy oversight.



WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

You’ll have direct ownership across these active projects:

FutureThink Edge (Adaptive Learning Platform)

•	AI-powered edtech platform with adaptive learning algorithms, knowledge tracing, and student assessment tools

•	Integrating NLP, recommendation engines, and clinical-grade mental health detection features

•	Compliance-sensitive environment (FERPA, HIPAA, COPPA, SOC 2)

•	Stack: React/Next.js frontend, Node.js/Python backend, PostgreSQL, LLM integrations (Claude, OpenAI)

World of IT (Cloud Services Company)

•	Production-ready landing page and client-facing platform for cloud migration and managed cloud services

•	Building out service delivery infrastructure, client dashboards, and onboarding flows

•	Stack: Modern web stack, cloud architecture (AWS/Azure/GCP)

Additional Platform Work

•	GoHighLevel CRM integrations and automation workflows for nonprofit operations

•	Content management and media production tooling for Content Capital

•	General full-stack support across the organization’s digital ecosystem



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Technical Leadership

•	Own the technical roadmap and sprint execution across multiple concurrent projects

•	Make architectural decisions and set code quality standards for the team

•	Conduct code reviews, establish CI/CD pipelines, and maintain deployment workflows

•	Document systems thoroughly so the team can scale without bottlenecks

Full Stack Engineering

•	Build and maintain scalable APIs and microservices (Node.js, Python, or similar)

•	Develop responsive, intuitive UIs (React.js, Next.js, or Vue.js)

•	Work with relational and NoSQL databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)

•	Implement DevOps best practices across AWS, Azure, or GCP environments

AI & Machine Learning

•	Integrate and fine-tune LLMs for educational use cases (OpenAI, Claude, open-source models)

•	Build NLP features, recommendation engines, and learning analytics

•	Develop AI models for student assessments, learning adaptation, and behavioral insights

•	Ensure AI systems meet regulatory compliance standards



REQUIREMENTS

Must-Have

•	5+ years of professional full-stack development experience

•	Strong proficiency in React.js or Next.js (frontend) and Node.js or Python (backend)

•	Hands-on experience with PostgreSQL and at least one NoSQL database

•	Working knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) including deployment and scaling

•	Experience integrating APIs and working with third-party services

•	Comfortable working autonomously with minimal supervision across multiple projects

•	Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

Strong Plus

•	Experience with AI/ML model integration, LLM APIs, or NLP pipelines

•	Familiarity with LangChain, CrewAI, or similar AI orchestration frameworks

•	Background in edtech, SaaS, or compliance-heavy industries (FERPA, HIPAA)

•	Experience leading small development teams or mentoring junior developers

•	Knowledge of GoHighLevel, CRM automation, or marketing tech stacks

•	CI/CD pipeline setup and DevOps automation experience

WHY JOIN US

•	Direct access to the CEO—no layers of middle management, no bureaucracy

•	Real ownership and leadership over meaningful products, not ticket-punching

•	Work across multiple industries: edtech, cloud services, entertainment, nonprofit impact

•	Join a Baltimore-based organization that has distributed over 11 million pounds of food to the community—your work has real social impact

•	Growth opportunity to build and lead a development team as the company scales

•	Flexible remote work with a results-driven culture

title: Video and Content Editor
description:
About Funktion Active



Funktion Active is a premium female activewear and athleisure brand where function meets fashion. We create pieces for women who want performance, style, confidence, and versatility in one. Our customer wants apparel that works hard, looks sharp, and feels good in real life — from training sessions to coffee runs to everything in between.



Our brand is built on a few non-negotiables:



Fun — We embrace the grind, support each other, celebrate wins, and bring good energy to the work

Fast & Focused — We move quickly, prioritise what matters, and keep things clean and effective

Funky — We bring creativity, individuality, and personality — always with purpose

Follow-through — We do what we say, communicate clearly, and take ownership

First Class — We care about standards, details, and delivering polished, commercially strong work



Everything we put into the world needs to reflect that — especially our content.



Role Overview



We are looking for a Video and Content Editor who can take large volumes of raw footage and turn it into polished, high-performing, on-brand content for social media, paid ads, and campaigns.



This is not a basic editing role.



We need someone who can shape content that feels sharp, current, clean, and commercially effective — with a strong focus on scroll-stopping, high-performing short-form content.



This role also plays a key part in building and maintaining a strong content reserve, ensuring the brand stays ahead rather than constantly reacting.



Scroll-Stopping & Viral Content Standard



Content should not only look good — it must perform.



We are creating content for fast-moving social environments where attention is earned, not given. Every piece should be designed to stop the scroll within the first few seconds and hold attention through to the end.



This means:



Strong hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Clean, engaging visual movement

Edits that feel native to the platform

Content that feels current and relevant



We are not chasing trends blindly, but we are also not ignoring them. The expectation is to understand what is working and apply it in a way that still feels on-brand and elevated.



The goal is to consistently produce content that is:



Highly watchable

Easy to consume

Engaging enough to be saved, shared, or replayed

Capable of performing both organically and in paid ads



Good content is not enough. It needs to compete.



Key Responsibilities

Edit raw footage into polished short-form and campaign-ready content

Identify the strongest clips, moments, and creative opportunities from large footage sets

Create clean, engaging edits with strong pacing and flow

Apply colour correction and ensure accurate product colour representation

Format content correctly for Instagram, paid ads, website, and other platforms

Add captions, text overlays, and simple motion elements where needed

Prepare final exports in a clean, organised format for the team

Maintain strong file organisation and naming conventions

Support building and managing a structured, searchable content library

Flag strong unused footage and suggest new content opportunities

Work through large footage banks consistently to build a content reserve

Deliver work that is close to final with minimal revisions required

Identify and prioritise content with strong potential to perform as scroll-stopping social content

Content Focus

Instagram Reels (primary focus)

Gym, fitness, and training content

Paid ad creatives (Meta)

TikTok-style edits

Website and campaign videos

UGC-style and behind-the-scenes content

Product and founder-led content

Expected Output

Up to 150 unique edited pieces per month

Most edits are short-form (~15 seconds)

Work through a 20+ hour footage bank consistently

Maintain a content reserve at least 4 weeks ahead

Creative & Brand Standards



Content should feel:



Fun, engaging, and on-brand

Clean, polished, and premium

Current but not cheap or overdone

Authentic while still elevated



Avoid:



Cheap-looking edits

Overused templates

Cheesy transitions or effects

Sloppy pacing

Visual inconsistency



Reference brands: CSB, Lilo, Hona Active



Workflow & Communication

Work within Google Drive systems for files, briefs, and feedback

Follow provided direction for copy, music, and creative intent

Work independently while staying aligned with priorities and timelines



Communication expectations:



Daily check-in

End-of-day update

Weekly meeting



Daily updates should include:



Completed work

Work in progress

Items awaiting review

Blockers

Next priorities



We value clear, proactive communication — no guessing, no disappearing.



Revisions & Quality Expectations

Most content should require 1–2 revisions max

First drafts should already be close to final

Work should be clean, accurate, and ready to use

What Success Looks Like

Content delivered quickly with minimal hand holding

Consistent editing quality across all outputs

Strong attention to detail and product accuracy

Initiative and problem-solving without constant direction

Content bank stays ahead (minimum 4 weeks)

Files and assets are organised and easy to use

Communication is reliable and proactive

Ideal Candidate

Mid-level to senior editor

Strong experience with short-form and social-first content

Strong eye for pacing, visuals, and content flow

Organised and comfortable managing large volumes of footage

Strong written English and communication

Experience in fitness, activewear, or ecommerce is a plus

Experience with both organic and paid content is a plus

Fast, reliable, detail-oriented, and accountable

Not a Fit If You

Are slow, disorganised, or inconsistent

Need constant direction for simple decisions

Struggle with volume or deadlines

Produce generic, low-quality, or template-heavy work

Miss details or create workflow chaos

Role Structure

Full-time or contract (depending on candidate)

~40 hours per week

Long-term opportunity with growth potential

Confidentiality



You will have access to unreleased campaigns and internal content. Professionalism and discretion are required.



Final Note



We are looking for someone who gives a damn.



Someone fast, sharp, organised, and proud of the work they put out.

Someone who can take raw footage and turn it into content that actually looks like a brand.



Someone who understands:



Fun doesn’t mean messy

Premium doesn’t mean boring

Speed doesn’t mean sloppy



If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA + CONTENT COORDINATOR for (Funktion Active Activewear/Fashion)
description:
Start: ASAP | Launch: 14 February | Casual / Part-time with room to grow  |  Flexible Time



Funktion Active is a premium women’s activewear brand where performance meets style. We’re launching on 14 February, and we’re looking for a high-calibre social/content all-rounder who doesn’t just “post content”, you think, creates, and builds community.



If you’ve worked with an activewear or fashion brand before and you know how to turn ideas into scroll-stopping content (and real engagement), keep reading.



What you’ll own:



Plan + create content for Instagram, TikTok, and
 (Reels-first mindset).

Content ideation: hooks, angles, storylines, creator-style UGC concepts, trends (without copying).

Community + engagement: reply to comments/DMs, engage daily, build relationships, make the brand feel alive.

Scheduling + publishing using Later (we have it set up).

Light Shopify tasks: updating banners, basic homepage edits, product imagery swaps, links, collections (basic admin level).

Basic editing: cut videos, captions/subtitles, simple transitions, sound syncing.

Graphic design: simple assets for stories, promos, drops, announcements (Canva preferred; Adobe is a plus).

Work closely with the founder to keep content aligned with brand energy and launch goals.





What we’re looking for (non-negotiables):



You’ve worked with a fashion/activewear brand before (agency or in-house).

You can think strategically: content pillars, launches, offers, storytelling, and community building.

Strong written English + a natural feel for social tone.

You can edit short-form video (CapCut/Premiere/Rush/InShot, any is fine).

You can design clean, premium-looking graphics (Canva or Adobe).

You’re organised, proactive, and deadline-driven; you don’t wait to be chased.





Bonus points (nice to have):



You understand conversion content: product education, fit/benefits, styling, objections.

Experience working with creators/influencers/UGC.

Paid social familiarity (even at a basic level).

Photography or filming skills.



This is not for you:



If you need step-by-step instructions for every post, this won’t be a fit.

If you’re not comfortable working independently.

If you don’t enjoy thinking creatively and taking initiative



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT – READ CAREFULLY)

We will NOT review your application if you do not follow these instructions.



Send:

1. Your portfolio (IG/TikTok accounts you’ve run + examples of Reels/TikToks you edited)

2. A quick note on your activewear/fashion experience

3. A 10-day content plan idea for Funktion Active (bullet points are fine)

4. Your rate (hourly or weekly retainer) + availability





Apply via DM/email: 

 Subject line: Funktion Social Gem





“Show us proof accounts, metrics, before/after examples.”



We are waiting for you to be ONE OF US!

BE FUNKY!

title: Content Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Content Operations Manager to organize, systemize, and oversee the day-to-day content flow between our creative, marketing, and editing teams. You’ll make sure all content (videos, images, and assets) is up-to-date, properly labeled, and ready for use across our platforms.



If you love structure, collaboration, and keeping creative teams running smoothly—this role is for you.



Responsibilities

Manage and organize all content inside Google Drive (for “MV” project).

Coordinate between multiple content teams — Outreach Creators, Organic Social Team, Editors, and
 Team.

Ensure each team receives the correct approved assets (images, videos, clips) on time.

Label, track, and store all files systematically to avoid duplication or misplacement.

Maintain and update Asana project management boards — make sure all tasks are assigned, labeled, and followed up.

Double-check that only approved videos go to editors or organic content teams.

Report weekly on content progress, missing assets, and workflow blockers.

Assist with organic content curation and outreach coordination when needed.



Requirements

Strong organizational and communication skills.

Must have experience with Google Drive and Asana.

Comfortable working remotely and managing multiple teams.

Good understanding of digital content production (videos, images, social posts).

High attention to detail — labeling, naming, and sorting accuracy is a must.

Reliable internet connection and clear written English skills.



Nice-to-Have (Bonus Points)

Experience managing content for influencers, creators, or agencies.

Knowledge of basic video formats and file management.

A love for efficient systems and documentation.

Slight “OCD” for perfection in naming files or keeping things orderly — yes, we love that.



Compensation & Schedule

Full-time: 40 hours per week

Rate: $5 USD per hour

Work during Sydney (AEST/AEDT) business hours.



To apply, please include:

Your resume or work experience summary

A short message explaining why you’d be a great fit

A 2-minute Loom video showing how you organize files or manage Asana tasks (optional but preferred)
