title: Fast Placement! VA Remove Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Communications & Guest Experience Specialist.
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a skilled and reliable Virtual Assistant to join our short-term rental business. In this role, you will handle a variety of administrative and operational tasks to support our property management and guest experience operations.

Your main responsibilities will include guest communications, reservation management, task coordination, and data organization. You will also help develop and refine company processes, suggest improvements, and maintain our policies and procedures manual.

As we continue to grow, your scope may expand to include additional administrative, marketing, and operational projects.

The ideal candidate is organized, detail-oriented, an excellent communicator, and proactive in finding solutions.



Responsibilities - 

-  Guest Communications

o Manages guest communication via Enso Connect, OTAs (Airbnb, VRBO, etc.) and
, including

guest inquiries, check-in, check-out, during stays, and post-departure follow-ups.

o Responds promptly to guest messages, ensuring exceptional service and satisfaction.

- Guest Experience Personalization:

o Gathers information about guest preferences and special requests, enabling personalized touches for

travel stays.

o Coordinates with operations to ensure guest requests are fulfilled.

- Guest Review Management:

o Monitors and responds to guest reviews, including cases where automated responses are not made.

o Maintains the weekly review tracker and conducts trend analysis to evaluate listing and account-level

review performance.

o Disputes inappropriate or inaccurate reviews when necessary.



Reservation Management

- Booking Oversight:

o Coordinates guest inquiries and the approval process for bookings, collaborating with the Operations

Manager and Finance Manager, when necessary, to negotiate optimal rates, terms, and conditions.

o Requests optimal booking dates to maximize occupancy levels.

- Condo Applications:

o Collects necessary guest information required for condo applications.

o Manages the application process between guests, property owners, and building administrators or

associations.

- Reservation Compliance:

o Ensures all reservations meet property requirements and guidelines.



Listing Management

- Content and Platform Coordination:

o Sets up and ensures content is consistent and updated across platform listings on Hostaway, OTAs

(Airbnb, VRBO, 
), and the Lunabase Direct Site.

o Ensures listings are properly configured on Guest Experience Communication platforms (Enso

Connect) and third-party cleaning platforms (Resort Cleaning, where applicable).



INDEPENDENT CONTRACTOR AGREEMENT



- Listing Optimization:

o Updates listings daily with relevant pricing, descriptions, and photos.

o Monitors propagation of listings to Google Travel and other relevant platforms.



Task Coordination

- Turnover Management:

o Coordinates the condo turnover process, scheduling cleanings, confirming cleanings are on track 2

days prior to turnovers, and ensuring completion.



- Maintenance Requests:

o Coordinates maintenance calls between guests and handymen/technicians as required.

o Follows up on maintenance issues to ensure timely resolution.

- Ad-Hoc Requests:

o Coordinates on-site visits, deliveries, or other special requests between guests and property

managers.

Policy and Procedures

- Documentation Development:

o Enhances and updates standardized policies and procedures documentation.

o Creates detailed process documents for all aspects of the business, explaining & quot;how-to" for various

operations.



- Operational Improvements:

o Identifies areas for improvement in policies and procedures, recommending updates to enhance

efficiency and guest satisfaction.



Requirements:

- Proven experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar administrative role – within the short-term rental and

property management segment.

- Minimum 3–5 years of verifiable experience working with Airbnb or within the short-term rental industry is required for this role, and will be a key factor in the evaluation process

- Strong written and verbal communication skills, a good listener, with the ability to communicate professionally

and promptly with guests and tea
mbers.

- Availability to work in Eastern US Time Zone (UTC-5) and willingness to guest communications during the

weekend.

-  The regular work schedule for this role is Thursday through Monday.

- Proficiency in managing
s (for others), calendar management tools, property listing portals (Airbnb,

VRBO), and property management software (such as Hostaway)

- Attention to detail and organizational skills to ensure accurate and efficient execution of tasks.

- Proactive and resourceful problem-solving abilities.

- Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

- Tech-savviness and proficiency in using online tools and software applications.

Additional Experience with Productivity Applications and Tools

- Familiarity with AI software applications used to streamline admin tasks and improve efficiency.

- Proficiency in using software applications, tools and technologies within STR segment

- Experience with AI-driven solutions for guest communication, pricing optimization, property management, or

other relevant areas of the business

- Ability to leverage AI tools to enhance productivity, accuracy, and overall performance.

- Collaboration with teams to implement and integrate automation and AI tools effectively.

- Enjoys staying updated on the latest advancements and trends in automation and AI technologies applicable

to the short-term rental industry.



Please note that only applications and messages submitted through OnlineJobs.ph will be considered. Any communication outside the platform will not be reviewed.

title: URGENT: Hiring "AI Influencer" Video Creator/Editor ( Veo3,HeyGen, CapCut, Veo3, ElevenLabs etc. )
description:
Please read the ENTIRE description before applying! :)



Our current candidate had to discontinue due to personal life problems so we're now ONLY looking for VERY dedicated members with experience in CapCut and other AI tools mentioned below. This opportunity is seriously much better than it sounds at first glance with a growth potential!







A few words about us:



Hey! We are Organic Media, a micro-agency creating and distributing educational and engaging AI-generated short-form videos for e-commerce brands, mainly in the pet niche.



You’ll work directly with our amazing manager ( 20 years old from Europe, with over 3 years of real experience in this exact space ), who has personally prepared step-by-step tutorials on Loom to teach you everything from the ground up.

No confusion. No guessing. No wasted time. ( Most tea
mbers learned the workflow within a few days and are now working fully independently )







What kind of videos will you create?

Simple UGC-like short-form videos fully based on the provided scripts by us ( you might just need to tweak a few words if needed ) which look realistic and feel "natural" to the viewers on platforms like YouTube Shorts, Instagram or
. Some of them are silently advertising products at the end but the key is that it doesn't sound like an ad but rather a native short-form video which a real person/influencer would record with their iPhone. There are a few styles such as just a calm "sit down" video ( where there's only one image and the influencer would just talk for 2 minutes ) or other ones where there're a few "shots" of them with a few seconds each and the scenes change but it's really not difficult at all - just a few more generations and then connecting them in CapCut.





The process is straightforward:

Getting our scripts ready and approved, using your own creativity and generating high quality base images using tools like Nano Banana Pro, turning these images into video clips using platforms like Veo3, Kling or HeyGen and for voice ElevenLabs, cuts and trimming, other minor adjustments such as background audio effects if needed ( like supermarket background audio ). Whole process is 90% just creating the right images/video clips etc, we might not even do transitions or captions so there won't be much editing skill needed. Everything is shown clearly in the training.



You’ll be creating a lot of videos a day but these are not complex edits AT ALL. Difficulty level: 6/10 ( again, 80% is just generating the rate "input" images and later just animating them with voice. That's it )





Here are visual examples of what the videos look like ( NOT OURS ):

1. 
/reel/DTty7hsAHe_/

2. 
/reel/DT0R9KgDkuW/

3. 
/reel/DSc75hsDQV6/

4. 
/reel/DT8pDFngXfp/

5. 
/reel/DUOAHm3kY7P/



( In your application, let us know your thoughts, do you think you can easily recreate them - what tools would you use and why? )





Training & onboarding ( this is the biggest advantage )

Once hired, you will receive structured video tutorials. In total, we have a few hours available, though most people don’t need all of it. The workflow is clear so no missing steps and no “figure it out yourself.”







Daily workload ( important )

You’ll create around 10 to 20+ videos per day ( 1 to 2 min long - we’ll start with a smaller amount and later increase it - won't negatively affect your monthly pay. We just want to make it easier for you to start - ultimately we'll be doing 20+ but making sure it's under 8-10h a day, at first it may take you longer and we may work harder - but once learned it easily becomes manageable ).

In reality, you'd have exactly 4 unique "AI influencers" but all of 4 them have the same scripts to use, you'd just need to change a few words to help with the context ( some of them might be talking only about "dogs" but some about "cats" so just need to change a few words to make it all make sense ) and you could use the same image prompts to generate almost identical images for each influencer. In reality it’s just 2 to 6 original videos PER INFLUENCER ( 4 of them ) and each with a very similar structure. Once trained, this is very manageable.



Your job is simple:

Create the videos, export them, and send them to us daily on 
.

That’s it. No posting. No account management. No stress.







Equipment & storage ( we make this easy )

You’ll need a good computer that can smoothly handle 1080p/light 4k video editing ( we’ll do 1080p but we’re going to work on multiple browser tabs ), a stable internet connection, and at least 16GB of RAM and 250GB+ of fast storage AVAILABLE. 1TB+ of SSD storage is preferred ( make sure it’s SSD and not old and slow HDD ).



If you need to buy storage/RAM ( for example, a 1TB SSD for around $100 ), we will refund you. This is required ONLY to save you time and speed up your workflow so you can be more efficient since it can be a couple GB of files a day ( you can later remove them after sending them to us. )



There also may be small subscription costs which you’d have to cover later if needed ( only around $10 a month ) for services like iCloud+ on iPhone/iPad or 
 Nitro - we refund those as well.







Tools & software ( HUGE upside )

You get FREE access to ALL paid tools that cost us hundreds of dollars per month, including:

- AI avatar tools like HeyGen or Veo3,

- Copywriting software like ChatGPT+, Grok or Claude,

- Editing software like CapCut PRO on Desktop,

- and our CUSTOM voice-over tools like ElevenLabs,

We provide logins, instructions, and full support.

( ALL OF THEM ARE WORTH $500+ MONTHLY )





Work environment & communication

You’ll have a private 1:1 chat with our manager and separate one to send your daily work in, work fully remotely through 
, receive clear feedback, and be treated as a long-term tea
mber, not disposable labor.

No stressful interviews. No micromanagement. No slow
s back and forth.







Responsibilities

- Adjust our scripts for the context

- Create videos from start to finish.

- Export and send them.

- Apply feedback and improve.

- Prepare scripts for the next day.

- Organize files properly.

- Communicate clearly.

- Hit deadlines without reminders.

That’s it. Simple, repetitive, and enjoyable.







This job is perfect for you if

You’re looking for long-term stability ( months or years ), you’re willing to learn, tech-savvy, creative, organized, and able to focus consistently. You already have video creation/editing experience. Already done some AI influencers related jobs and have good experience in: Google VEO3, Nano Banana Pro, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, CapCut PRO and other similar tools. Your computer can handle multiple tabs open ( A LOT of them ). You care about doing things properly, understand and speak English well, respond to messages quickly, and can work up to 6 days per week. You’re a young, talented, smart individual. You’re okay with a slightly heavier learning phase in the first week, you’re not afraid to ask questions, you’re reliable and honest about mistakes, and you either already have or can get an iPhone device ( used only for specific verification codes - refunded if needed. You can even get some used iPhone 8 for like $40 which works ).

We value dedication, reliability, and improvement more than raw talent.







This job is not for you if

You’re looking for quick money, disappear without communication, can’t focus, you’re on the older side and have never edited 1 video in your life, never played with the AI tools mentioned above, your computer can’t handle having multiple tabs open at the same time, have unstable internet, refuse feedback, rush work carelessly, avoid consistency, or cannot communicate in English.







Salary & payments

This is a full-time position, starting at 6 days per week, under 10 hours per day. ( ultimately under 8h once you become very efficient, which our manager will help you achieve and it won't impact your salary working less - quite the opposite! )



Starting salary ranges from around $440-$540/month based on experience, with the potential in the future to increase to $540+ based on a few factors such as performance, dedication, and quality of work.



Payments are monthly, in any currency or method available in your country. ( we’ll try )



To build trust, we’re offering to pay you $100 after the first week of working with us, with the remaining balance at month end. ( we already got scammed by other platforms so please respect this )



And remember, we pay $500+ dollars/month for paid tools so you can get them for FREE meaning your pay is actually 100% profit + refunds for any costs of yours. ( meaning in theory your total compensation is closer to $1000+ including tool access )







Hiring process (step-by-step)

- Please re-read this job post carefully and only then submit your application.

- In your job application, make sure to set the right title and answer every point.

- We will review it and reach out with an extra message if accepted.

- We'll send you a Google Form to fill out with contact info, etc.

- You’ll be invited to our 
 server and will get your 1:1 chat.

- You'll complete the training and take notes of it to learn everything.

- We'll give you access to all the tools and refund any required purchases.

- You'll officially start creating videos for Organic Media and get hired.

Simple and effective.







Why this is a real opportunity

No confusion, no guessing, no unpaid trials. You get real structured video training on Loom, real tools, real support, and real long-term growth - including potential promotion to coach or lead roles.

Some jobs may offer to pay more, but very few:

Teach you properly step by step, invest in you, respect your time, and give you paid tools for free.







How to apply (pay attention)

Your application title must start with the first word “ Influencer ”:

“ Influencer: (…) “

Applications without this will be ignored.





In your application, please include the following:

- Your detailed thoughts on the 5 videos linked above,

- Your past experience ( or none - that’s fine ),

- Links to any past work or simple edits,

- a detailed introduction about yourself,

- Your daily routine and availability,

- Why you want this opportunity and why we should pick you over someone else. ( why you’re special )

- and detailed answers to these 15 questions:



1. Do you have experience using CapCut on DESKTOP? How long have you been using it, and what type of videos do you usually create with it?

2. Which AI video tools have you personally used? ( For example: VEO, Kling, Nano Banana Pro, Seedream 4,5, HeyGen, Vozo, etc.) Briefly describe what you used them for.

3. When you watch short-form videos that reuse existing footage, are you able to recognize patterns such as hooks, pacing, avatar placement, and caption timing? Please explain how you notice these patterns.

4. We work with very detailed step-by-step SOPs that specify exactly which clips to use and how to assemble them. How do you typically work when instructions are extremely clear and structured?

5. If you are unsure about a task or something does not match the instructions, what do you do?

6. When generating AI videos, what are the most common problems you run into? (for example: bad lip sync, weird hands, low realism, wrong lighting, artifacts, etc.)

7. Would you say you’re more of a creative problem-solver who looks for shortcuts, loopholes, or ways around limitations, or someone who prefers to strictly follow rules and structure?

8. Have you ever had to regenerate the same AI scene or just an image multiple times to get a usable result? What usually goes wrong and how do you fix it?

9. When working with AI tools, do you prefer experimenting freely or strictly following a proven workflow? Why?

10. Tell us about your PC specs, how much RAM and Available Storage and is it a PC or laptop/Macbook. Also, do you already have an iPhone/iPad? If so, which model is it/generation?

11. Are you good at learning? Meaning if you want to learn something by for example, watching YouTube tutorials - do you usually rewatch it or take notes? Or just watch it once and try it yourself?

12. Describe exactly how you usually organize your project files when working on multiple videos at the same time.

For example: how you name folders, how you separate drafts vs finals, and how you avoid losing assets.

13. Take a look at the job post once again and find the 5 video example links we've included above. Watch all of them fully and let us know your overall thoughts, how do you think they were created - what tools would you use and why? Please cover the whole process in detail ( these aren't our videos but very similar )

14. What are your long-term plans or goals with this opportunity?

15. To confirm that you’ve read everything carefully, please tell us your favorite meal and dessert, as well as a restaurant in your country. Explain why someone from outside your country should absolutely try it. :)





Do not use ChatGPT or any AI to fully write your application. Be real, honest and detailed. We value spelling mistakes over perfect, AI generated responses. ( Yes, we can detect AI generated responses and it just isn't a good look on you )



You must also follow our Instagram: ( 
/organicxmedia )







Final note

We are hiring ONLY 1 PERSON for this role and are focused strictly on long-term relationships ( months + )

If you are dedicated, reliable, and willing to learn, this can be a very comfortable long-term position. Good luck!

title: Experienced Buyer for ecommerce company
description:
Our US-based ecommerce company is looking for a very experienced and excellent Buyer (there are positions for apparel, home décor and collectables) who is hard-working, organized, analytical, with several years of experience in ecommerce. 

It is a FULL-time position (40h/week). This is NOT an entry-level role. 



The Buyer sources new product vendors and grows the assortment offering on our brands’ sites;

oversees and maintains inventory as well as researches, analyzes, and forecasts current and future buying trends, markets, styles, and products with attention to specified target market and demographics. This role supports the curation of our product assortments, develops and maintains relationships with wholesalers and suppliers while leading negotiation of contracts with wholesalers and suppliers. 



Omni Retail Enterprises operates a lifestyle portfolio of digital storefronts and communities including home decor, apparel, collectables, fitness, and more, with millions of consumers around the globe. 



Skills & Qualifications:



• Strong English proficiency, both written and spoken. 

• 3+ years’ experience as a Buyer, preferably in apparel, home decor, or collectables

• Experience in retail and ecommerce 



Experience in Platforms:



• Proficient in Shopify, Google Analytics, and Excel. 



Work Schedule:



• Full-time position (40h/week)

• US work hours (CST)



Key Responsibilities:



• Qualifies and negotiates with vendors to find the best sales price and may include bid prices and negotiation techniques, plus review of written documents

• Acquires information concerning an item’s condition, type, rarity or value

• Prepares data for financial records: invoices, purchase orders and other related documents

• Performs financial analysis to determine savings, calculates quantity discounts and negotiates the best sales price when purchasing large quantities of goods

• Arranges payments through bank drafts or money orders to purchase items

• Maintains inventory that includes verifying inventory levels, choosing new items, returning expired items or obsolete merchandise 

• Tracks purchases, monitors vendor quality, and maintains a current database of vendor information

• Negotiates contracts with suppliers to secure favorable terms, including pricing, delivery schedules, and quality specifications

• Develops and implement purchasing strategies aligned with the company’s business goals and operational needs

• Maintains commercial contracts with clients, suppliers, and other business partners

• Researches and evaluates suppliers, considering factors such as quality, pricing, and market trends

• Analyzes market trends, ensuring the organization gets the best value for its purchases

• Implements strategies for procuring, storing, and distributing goods and services

• Oversees financial analyses related to the department’s budget 

• Manages procurement activities, including purchasing supplies and communicating company specifications to suppliers

• Ensures the company complies with legal, regulatory, and ethical requirements 

• Evaluates departmental policies and procedures to ensure alignment with industry standards and changes in law or technology

• Participates in cross-functional projects aimed at improving efficiency, profitability, quality, and customer service

• Collaborates with other senior tea
mbers to analyze potential problems impacting work

• Recommends improvements, new products, quality enhancements, or operational efficiencies

• Handles multiple projects simultaneously and prioritize tasks based on urgency

• Stays on top of trends in terms of supplement innovation and industry demand 



Resume



Please submit your information and resume detailing your relevant experience, skill set, and why you're the perfect fit for this position. Link to submit this information: 





We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Leasing Assistant
description:
We are a growing property management company seeking a highly responsive and organized Leasing Assistant to help fill vacant homes across our mobile home communities. This role is focused on driving occupancy by managing leads, posting listings, and ensuring no opportunity is missed.



The ideal candidate is fast, detail-oriented, and has a strong sense of urgency. You will be responsible for posting available homes on Zillow and other platforms, responding to inquiries quickly, pre-screening potential tenants or buyers, scheduling showings with local tea
mbers, and consistently following up with leads until they are either closed or disqualified. You will also track lead activity and provide regular updates to the Operations Manager.



To succeed in this role, you must have strong written and spoken English, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage a high volume of messages without dropping leads. Organization and consistency are critical. Previous experience in sales, leasing, or
 Marketplace is preferred but not required.



This role requires a high level of urgency and accountability. If you are slow to respond, disorganized, or not comfortable with fast-paced communication, this position will not be a good fit.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and play a key role in keeping our communities fully occupied and operating efficiently.

title: CEO / Head of Operations – For a High-Performance STR Co-Hosting Company
description:
- We are not looking just for a “manager.”



- This is for a high-performance operator ready to take over day-to-day operations, lead a remote team, and drive a company forward like it’s their own.



- We’re looking for someone with proven experience in leading, improving, and growing a company. Not just delegating tasks, but thinking critically, spotting inefficiencies, and inspiring people to raise their standards — all while holding the team accountable with precision and professionalism.

___________

About Us:

Golden Home Stays is a boutique Airbnb co-hosting company based in Las Vegas.



- We manage a growing portfolio of premium vacation rentals. We’re obsessed with:

- World-class guest experiences

- Elite operational systems

- Making our homeowners happy and proud to work with us



We’ve built a strong foundation. Now, we’re ready to grow — and we need a sharp, driven, emotionally intelligent leader to help us get there.

___________

- The Role:



You will act as the CEO's right hand and eventual replacement.



This is a plug-and-play leadership role. You’re stepping into a company that already has SOPs, a clear brand voice, a defined client avatar, and a growing portfolio. Your job is not to build everything from scratch — it’s to run, fix, and scale.



We don’t want to micromanage you. We want you to take full ownership.

___________

Responsibilities you’ll Own:

- Take full ownership of day-to-day company operations

- Lead our team of VA’s across all shifts (guest comms and ops + admin)

- Ensure every tea
mber is executing their shift tasks & checklists 100?ily

- Hold people accountable — without creating fear or burnout

- Work with admin VA to identify & improve missing or outdated SOPs

- Troubleshoot issues with listings, vendors, cleaners, and maintenance

- Handle or supervise new client onboarding, property launches, and communications

- Protect the CEO’s time — so they can grow the business (not run it)

- Track KPIs, build simple reporting systems, and make the company run smoother than ever

___________

- Your Mindset:



We don’t want a “task manager.”

We want a visionary executor — someone with a sharp mind, strong ethics, and real hunger to build something BIG with us.



You should:

- Understand transformational leadership: Inspire, not micromanage

- Lead by example, not fear

- Be available 12 hours/day (you WON'T work the whole time — but you must be available)

- Be proactive: spot problems before anyone else does

- Know how to talk to people, fix mistakes, and get the team aligned without killing morale

- Be able to handle difficult clients with class, control, and confidence

___________

Requirements:

- Proven experience as Head of Operations, General Manager, or similar leadership role

- 1+ years managing remote teams (STR, hospitality, or property management preferred)

- Documented history of improving systems, fixing broken teams, or scaling results

- Fluent English — must be able to lead Zoom calls, voice messages, and client talks

- Highly organized, resourceful, and emotionally intelligent

- Can think strategically and execute ruthlessly

- knowledge of the basic software: Airbnb, Vrbo, Slack, Guesty, Chat-GPT, Pricelabs etc.

- Available to work on PST time zone 8am-8pm

___________

Compensation:

- Base Salary: $1,500–$2,500/month USD (depending on experience and performance)

Performance Bonus based on:

- Team performance and growth

- Client retention and satisfaction

- Revenue/profit targets and operational KPIs

- CEO time freedom

- Long-Term Growth: Opportunity for future profit-sharing or equity after proven results

___________

Please Do NOT Apply If:

- Have EGO and not good feedback or teamwork

- Lack emotional intelligence and the ability to lead by example

- Struggle to receive or give clear, constructive feedback

- You’ve never managed a remote team 

- Are more comfortable following than leading

- Get overwhelmed easily or need constant direction

- Have no experience scaling a company or improving broken systems

- Cannot prove real leadership results and growth in your past roles

___________

How to Apply:

- Fill out this short Google Form: 

- In the Google Form - Include a 2–3 minute Loom Video introducing yourself + your experience + why we should choose you?

- Be ready to start immediately



Bonus: If you speak Spanish fluently or have experience working with Spanish-speaking clients or tea
mbers, please mention it in your application — this is a big plus for us!



We’re ready to hire the right person now. If that’s you, apply today.

title: Social Media/Content Virtual Assistant
description:
I’m looking to hire a Social Media Content Creator/Strategist and they possibly will do Virtual Assistant work as well, starting at 10 hours/week, and will grow to 40 hours/week as you take on more clients (30-40 hours/week) to join our positive team of 8 VAs and work directly with my clients in Canada, America, and Europe. This is a long-term opportunity with potential for consistent full-time employment.



You will be supporting solopreneurs with their businesses' social media, content creation, video/audio editing, and possibly some VA roles like administrative tasks, and creating systems for their businesses. You’ll work with 2-4 clients at a time, and I provide guidance to ensure smooth collaboration between you and your clients.



Please do not apply if you’ve applied for this position before. 



Role Overview & Key Responsibilities

Turn raw inputs (event summaries, photos, video clips) into polished social posts, graphics, and short-form videos

Create engaging, story-driven content that feels organic, timely, and on-brand

Plan and execute content across Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and TikTok, adapting for each platform

Develop and suggest content strategies, campaigns, themes, and series (not just one-off posts)

Capture and repurpose content from events into pre-event, live, and post-event posts

Manage and maintain consistent, non-repetitive social media presence for multiple brands

Collaborate with clients to align content with their voice, values, audience, and visibility goals

Use scheduling and/or AI tools to streamline posting while keeping content authentic

Repurpose content creatively with different hooks and formats per platform

Turn that into finished, on-brand content and ensure it goes out consistently.



Virtual Assistant & Admin Support:

title: Go highlevel Expert & Support Specialist
description:
GoHighLevel CRM Builder & Automation Specialist (Systems Operator + Client-Facing)



We are hiring a high-level GoHighLevel builder who can architect, automate, and optimize CRM systems that directly impact revenue.



This is not a VA admin role.



This is a systems builder + client-facing position for someone who understands how leads flow, how conversions happen, and how automation drives growth—and can confidently communicate that to clients.



We run a fast-moving business with real lead volume, real customers, and real money on the line.

If systems break, we feel it immediately.



If you are someone who watches tutorials and “figures things out as you go,” this is not for you.



If you can step in, understand a business model, build clean systems, and speak confidently with clients… keep reading.



What You’ll Own



You will be responsible for building and maintaining the infrastructure that powers our sales, marketing, onboarding, and follow-up—while also supporting clients directly.



- CRM Architecture & System Design

- Build and manage GoHighLevel sub-accounts

- Design pipelines that reflect real sales processes

- Create dashboards leadership can rely on

- Automation & Workflow Execution

- Build advanced workflows, triggers, and automation logic

- Automate lead routing, follow-ups, onboarding, and re-engagement

-Ensure all automations are clean, reliable, and scalable

Funnels, Forms & Conversion Flow



- Build and optimize funnels, landing pages, forms, and surveys

- Connect lead capture directly into pipelines and automation systems

- Improve conversion by reducing friction

- Data Integrity & Segmentation

- Implement clean tagging systems and naming conventions

- Maintain accurate, deduplicated contact data

- Audit and fix messy CRM structures



Integrations & Tech Stack



Integrate GoHighLevel with Shopify and other tools

- Trigger automations from real business events

- Diagnose and fix integration or automation issues quickly

- Client Support & Communication

- Meet with clients to understand their needs and workflows

- Assist with onboarding and system walkthroughs

- Troubleshoot issues and explain solutions clearly

- Act as a bridge between technical systems and client understanding

- Documentation & SOPs

- Document systems so the team and clients can use them

- Keep workflows organized as we scale

- Optimization & Scaling

- Identify bottlenecks and inefficiencies

- Improve systems based on performance

- Continuously upgrade the CRM as the business grows



What Success Looks Like

- Leads are routed instantly and correctly

- Follow-up happens automatically without manual work

- Clients understand and trust the systems you build

- Sales team has full visibility into pipeline and performance

- Systems run clean—and when they don’t, they’re fixed fast



Must-Have Skills (No Exceptions)



- Proven experience building inside GoHighLevel (not just using it)

- Strong understanding of:

- Pipelines and opportunity stages

- Workflow logic and automation timing

- Lead lifecycle and CRM structure

- Experience with
 and SMS automation inside GHL

- Experience integrating GoHighLevel with Shopify (Zapier, Make, or direct)

- Ability to troubleshoot broken workflows and integrations quickly

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to communicate clearly with non-technical clients

- Comfortable getting on Zoom calls and leading conversations

- Reliable internet and consistent availability



 ONLY: 
 WITH :



1.) SUBJECT LINE : GO HIGH LEVEL SPECIALIST

2.) A VIDEO OF YOURSELF EXPLAINING YOUR EXPERIENCE

3.) YOUR RESUME

4.) C2 ENGLISH A MUST 

5.) EXPERIENCE USING "UPHEX" IS A MASSIVE BONUS

6.) REQUESTED SALARY

7.) MUST BE ABLE TO WORK EST TIME ZONE



 ONLY:

title: Marketing Automation & Integration Specialist
description:
About Nexta Talent



  Nexta Talent is a recruiting firm connecting exceptional remote talent with innovative digital agencies. We're seeking a Marketing Automation & Integration

  Specialist for one of our client partners who needs an organized, detail-oriented automation expert to transfor
ssy configurations into elegant solutions.



Position Overview



  Type: Part-Time Contractor (20-30 hours/week)

  Compensation: $1,200/month

  Start Date: Immediate



  We're looking for a technically proficient automation specialist who can take ownership of workflow automation infrastructure. You'll handle all automation

  workflows, integrations, and system configurations. This role requires someone who can not only maintain existing systems but improve and optimize them.



  ---

  What You'll Own



  n8n Workflow Automation (Core Focus)

  - Design, build, and maintain complex n8n workflows

  - Troubleshoot and optimize existing automation sequences

  - Create new automation solutions for emerging business needs

  - Document workflows clearly for team reference



  Marketing Automation & CRM Management

  - Set up and configure marketing automation platforms (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar)

  - Build and maintain marketing funnels and automation sequences

  - Integrate CRM systems with external tools and APIs

  - Optimize lead routing and follow-up workflows



  Lead Tracking & Attribution

  - Manage lead tracking integrations (CallRail, WhatConverts, or similar)

  - Configure tracking parameters and custom reporting

  - Ensure accurate lead source attribution

  - Troubleshoot tracking discrepancies



  Form & Website Automation

  - Connect website forms to CRM and automation platforms

  - Build multi-step form workflows with conditional logic

  - Implement form validation and data sanitization

  - Create automated follow-up sequences from form submissions



  API Integration & Webhook Management

  - Read and implement API documentation

  - Configure webhooks for real-time data transfer

  - Build custom integrations between platforms

  - Debug API connection issues and authentication flows



  Communication Tools Integration

  - Integrate voice and communication systems with marketing automation

  - Configure call routing and automated responses

  - Connect communication data to CRM and tracking systems



  ---

  Why This Role Is Exciting



  Impact: Your work directly affects how efficiently the business operates. Every workflow you optimize saves hours of manual work.



  Autonomy: You'll have ownership over the entire automation infrastructure with freedom to implement best practices.



  Growth: You'll work with cutting-edge automation tools and expand your integration portfolio across multiple platforms.



  Challenge: Every project brings new technical problems to solve and systems to integrate.



  Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with flexible hours (overlap with US time zones preferred but not required).



  ---

  Requirements



  Must-Have Technical Skills:

  - Strong n8n experience (1+ years preferred) - This is the most critical skill

  - API integration experience with ability to read documentation and implement endpoints

  - Webhook configuration and troubleshooting

  - Experience with CRM platforms and marketing automation systems

  - Experience with lead tracking platforms (CallRail, WhatConverts, or similar)

  - Form automation tools and CRM integrations

  - Basic understanding of JavaScript for workflow logic



  Nice-to-Have:

  - GoHighLevel platform experience (setup, automation, funnel building)

  - Zapier or 
 experience

  - VoiceAI platform integration experience

  - SQL for data querying and reporting

  - HTML/CSS for landing page troubleshooting

  - HubSpot, Salesforce, or other enterprise CRM platforms

  - Google Tag Manager and analytics tracking



  Required Soft Skills:

  - Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

  - Problem-solving mindset and systematic debugging approach

  - Clear communication with technical and non-technical stakeholders

  - Ability to simplify complex configurations into elegant solutions

  - Self-motivated and able to work independently



HOW TO APPLY:



We use a structured screening process to ensure the best fit. To be considered, submit your application with a short cover letter and screening responses at www. applynexta.online

title: Hiring & HR Operations Manager (Systems-Driven, High-Accountability Role)
description:
About Dash Holdings

Dash Holdings is a systems-driven, Black-owned company operating in private rentals, automation, and digital asset-building.

We are building a franchise-grade operation that runs without the owner.

We move fast.

We follow SOPs.

We protect culture.

We reward discipline.

If you are looking for a relaxed, low-accountability job — this is not for you.

If you want to help build a real machine — keep reading.

 ROLE PURPOSE

You are responsible for protecting the company through disciplined hiring and structured HR oversight.

Your job is to:

• Find the right Who’s

• Eliminate weak applicants early

• Test for SOP compliance

• Run structured interviews

• Enforce probation standards

• Track performance + documentation

• Protect leadership time

This is not a creative role.

This is a discipline role.

 CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Hiring Execution

• Post job listings (OnlineJobs, Indeed,
, etc.)

• Create and manage hidden instruction filters

• Screen resumes + test submissions

• Run structured interviews (script provided)

• Score candidates using internal scorecards

• Recommend hire / reject decisions

HR Operations

• Track attendance + task completion

• Monitor probation periods (14–30 days)

• Issue warnings (one warning max)

• Coordinate onboarding access

• Remove access immediately upon termination

• Maintain employee files

Systems Protection

• Ensure every hire understands SOP compliance

• Ensure every hire understands culture standards

• Ensure every hire understands reporting structure

You do NOT:

• Set pay structures

• Change company vision

• Override SOPs

 WORK SCHEDULE

• 30–40 hours per week

• Must overlap minimum 3 hours EST daily

• Must provide daily written updates

 PAY STRUCTURE

Training Period (2–4 weeks):

$200–$250 bi-weekly

Post-Training:

$400–$600+ bi-weekly based on performance and speed

Performance raises available every 90 days.

Pay increases are tied to:

• Hiring quality

• Low turnover

• Compliance rates

• Speed

 IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

You:

• Have prior HR or hiring experience

• Are comfortable rejecting people

• Are emotionally neutral in conflict

• Understand high-accountability environments

• Move fast without supervision

• Follow written instructions exactly

You are not:

• Sensitive to direct leadership

• Easily overwhelmed

• Slow with systems

• Resistant to structure

???? ATTENTION TEST (Hidden Instruction)

To be considered, include this phrase in your subject line:

“System First, Emotion Second.”

Failure to include this = automatic rejection.

???? GROWTH PATH

This role can evolve into:

Director of People & Culture

VP of Talent & Operations

But only if:

• You prove discipline first

• You protect the system

• You reduce turnover

We promote from within.

 FINAL NOTE

This is not a corporate job.

This is a growth environment.

If you want:

• Structure

• Clarity

• Discipline

• Long-term opportunity

Apply.

If you want comfort and low pressure —

this is not your lane.

title: High Functioning executive Assistant  to high growth CEO
description:
**Executive Assistant to High-Growth CEO (AI-Driven Operator Required)**



This is not a typical assistant role.



I run multiple companies across real estate, AI, marketing, and beauty. Things move fast, expectations are high, and there is zero room for hand-holding.



I am looking for a sharp, proactive, forward-thinking Executive Assistant who can keep up, think ahead, and execute without constant direction.



You are not here to wait for instructions. You are here to identify problems, solve them, build structure, and use AI to increase speed, efficiency, and output.



If you need structure, slow pace, or step-by-step instructions, this is not for you.



If you thrive in chaos, move fast, and leverage AI to get more done in less time, keep reading.



---



**What You’ll Be Responsible For**



This role blends executive support, content execution, operational structure, and AI-driven efficiency.



Daily responsibilities include:



• Managing my calendar, priorities, and keeping me organized across multiple companies

• Posting and managing social media across platforms

• Creating and editing social media graphics and content

• Assisting with content ideas, captions, and execution

• Coordinating launches, webinars, and campaigns

• Managing
 campaigns and basic automations

• Supporting Go High Level CRM tasks including pipelines, contacts, and workflows

• Communicating with clients when needed

• Helping keep projects moving and holding people accountable



---



**This Role Is Different**



You will also be expected to:



• Identify problems before they are brought to you

• Solve problems without waiting for direction

• Build and implement SOPs where none currently exist

• Identify inefficiencies and fix them

• Create structure in fast-moving environments

• Use AI tools to automate, accelerate, and improve workflows

• Continuously find ways to do more in less time using technology



This is a builder, problem-solver, and optimizer role.



---



**What I’m Looking For**



You are:



• A forward-thinker who takes initiative without waiting

• A problem-solver who doesn’t just point out issues, but fixes them

• Extremely organized and detail oriented

• Fast. You execute quickly and accurately

• Calm under pressure and able to juggle multiple priorities

• A strong communicator both written and verbal

• Resourceful and tech-savvy

• Comfortable working across multiple industries and brands

• Someone who wants a challenge and thrives in high-performance environments



---



**Required Skills**



• Social media posting and content execution

• Graphic editing experience (Canva or similar)

• Basic video editing is a plus

• Familiarity with Go High Level or similar CRM

• Experience with
 marketing and automations

• Ability to document processes and create SOPs



---



**AI & Technology Requirements**



This is non-negotiable.



You must already be using AI tools in your daily workflow.



Examples include:



• Claude, ChatGPT, or similar LLMs

• AI for content creation, writing, and research

• AI-assisted automation and workflow building

• Understanding of how to use AI to save time and increase output



If you are not actively using AI to make your work faster and better, this role is not for you.



---



**Non-Negotiables**



• You must be responsive and available during working hours

• You must be able to handle pressure and fast-moving environments

• You must take ownership of your work

• You must think proactively, not reactively

• You must leverage AI to increase efficiency



---



**How to Apply**



Send an
 to: 



Subject line must be: **Executive Assistant Application**



Include:



1. A short video (2 to 3 minutes) explaining:

   • Your experience

   • A time you identified a problem and solved it without being asked

   • How you currently use AI tools (like Claude or ChatGPT) in your daily workflow



2. Links to any past work (social media, graphics, campaigns, SOPs, etc.)



3. Your resume



If you do not send a video, your application will not be reviewed.

title: Accounting Assitant 38-40k Based on Experience
description:
About the Company:

Luxo Living is a proudly Australian-owned eCommerce and retail company, specialising in stylish furniture and home appliances. With over a thousand product launches across the country, we’ve become a trusted name for quality and affordability in Australian homes.

As we continue to grow, we’re on the lookout for a dynamic and motivated Accounts Officer to join our finance team. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys variety in their day, and is eager to grow alongside an innovative company.



About the Role:

This is a hands-on and diverse role where you'll play a key part in our finance operations. You’ll also have the opportunity to support our supply chain function as needed. We are particularly keen to hear from applicants with experience in Australian payroll, and a background in customer service would be highly regarded.



Your responsibilities will include:



•Maintaining and managing our billing system

•Recording and reconciling customer payments

•Verifying and processing purchase invoices

•Bank and credit card reconciliations

•Generating and issuing invoices

•Managing accounts receivable records and documentation

•Liaising with resellers and managing reseller accounts

•Investigating and resolving any account discrepancies or enquiries

•Supporting general administrative and accounting duties as required



What We’re Looking For:

•Degree qualified in Accounting or a related discipline

•Prior experience in a similar accounting role is highly desirable

•Experience in Australian payroll is essential

•Previous exposure to customer service will be considered an advantage

•Proficient in Microsoft Office and accounting software

•Meticulous attention to detail and a high level of accuracy

•Strong organisational and time management skills

•Ability to work effectively under pressure and meet deadlines

•Excellent communication skills and a collaborative attitude

•Reliable and fast internet access



Why Join Luxo Living?

•A Career, Not Just a Job

We’re not offering just another offshore contract — we’re offering a long-term career path. Our track record shows we retain offshore talent for many years through genuine growth opportunities and deep team integration. You won’t be treated as a remote contractor, but as a valued and essential part of the business.



•Career Development & Promotion Pathway

We’re growing rapidly and committed to promoting from within. Performing well in this role could open doors to expanded responsibilities, such as leadership roles or contributions across departments like supply chain or finance operations.



•Innovation-Driven Company (AI + Tech)

We’re not a stagnant eCommerce company. We invest heavily in AI and automation—from content optimisation to process efficiency. You’ll be part of a forward-thinking team that embraces experimentation and values smart innovation.



•Stable, Transparent, and Human Leadership

We believe in clarity, fairness, and consistent communication. There’s no red tape or micromanagement—we move fast, support each other, and get things done with purpose and collaboration.



•Remuneration

A competitive monthly remuneration package will be offered, with an industry-leading salary for the right candidate, based on experience and skillset.



If you’re ready to take the next step in your accounting career and contribute to a vibrant and growing company, we would love to hear from you!



???? Apply now by completing our online application form:

title: Social Media Coordinator (Remote – Australian Market)
description:
We are seeking a highly innovative, creative, and results-driven Social Media Coordinator to join our team. 



This is a full-time, work-from-home position. We aren’t just looking for someone to post pictures; we want a "platform native" who is eager to test new ideas, modify strategies based on data, and help us dominate our niche across all digital touchpoints. 



About the Role 



As our Social Media Coordinator, you will own the execution of our digital presence. You will be responsible for: 



1. Platform Management & Innovation 



Full-Stack Execution: Managing daily operations for
, Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest (YouTube is a major plus). 



Creative Testing: Constantly bringing new ideas to the table, willing to test different content formats, and quickly modifying based on what the data shows. 



KPI Focused: Planning and posting with a clear eye on performance metrics (growth, engagement, and conversion). 



2. Content Planning & Partnerships 



Calendar Management: Developing and maintaining a robust content calendar (Stories, Reels, Photos, and Videos). 



Influencer Relations: Collaborating with creators and suppliers on high-impact campaigns and managing partnership opportunities. 



3. Engagement & "Always-On" Presence 



Community Moderation: Responding promptly to customer service chats and enquiries to maintain a premium brand experience. 



Flexible Monitoring: Checking platforms and messages every 2–3 hours (outside of standard business hours and sleep) to ensure responsiveness and occasionally post timely Stories. 



4. Performance Tracking & Admin 



Maintaining accurate records of campaigns and providing detailed performance reports. 



Supporting the broader marketing team with general administrative duties. 



What We’re Looking For 



Proven Experience: Either a background as a Content Creator or previous experience as a Social Media Manager. 



Track Record: Minimum 2 years’ experience managing a 100k+ follower business account. 



Niche Passion: A strong background or genuine interest in furniture, interiors, or fashion. 



Language Skills: Proficiency in Australian English (spelling, tone, and cultural nuances). 



Mindset: Highly innovative, proactive, and KPI-driven. You must be comfortable with constant testing and refining of content. 



Availability: Ability to work flexibly, including checking messages/posting Stories throughout the day/evening. 



Technical: Reliable high-speed internet and proficiency with Microsoft Teams. 



What We Offer 



Competitive Monthly Remuneration. 



The chance to work with a dynamic, high-growth Australian brand. 



An environment that values creativity, initiative, and the "fail fast, learn faster" approach to innovation. 



How to Apply 



If you are a creative powerhouse who lives and breathes social media, please complete our online application form here:

title: Senior AI UGC Video Editor – $1,500-$2,500/Month (Proven Winners Only)
description:
We're scaling multiple health and supplement brands and we're looking for a senior-level AI UGC video editor to join our creative team.



This role is for editors who have actually done this before — you've built AI UGC ads using tools like HeyGen, Higgsfield, and Arcads, you've had ads scale with real spend behind them on Meta, and you understand what makes a health ad convert.



If you can show us winning ads you've created — with performance data to back them up — we want to talk immediately.



What You'll Be Doing:

Creating 3+ native-style AI UGC video ads daily for our health and supplement brands

Building scroll-stopping TikTok/Reels/Shorts ads using HeyGen, Higgsfield, Arcads, and similar AI UGC platforms

Testing multiple hooks, angles, and variations to find winners fast

Working closely with our team on creative strategy, iteration, and scaling what works

Studying top-performing brands like Resilia and Evervision and replicating that level of quality and native feel



What Makes You Perfect for This:

You have proven, winning AI UGC ads — ideally in the health/supplement space — with real ad spend and performance metrics you can share

You're experienced with HeyGen, Higgsfield, and Arcads — not just familiar, you've actually used them to produce ads that ran and performed

You understand native content deeply — your ads look and feel like real TikToks, not polished commercials

You understand direct response and conversion psychology — you know why people stop scrolling and why they click

You're fast, reliable, and consistent — delivering 3+ quality creatives daily is your normal pace

You've worked with health, supplement, or wellness brands before and understand the space



This Is NOT For:

Beginners or novice editors — please do not apply

Editors who have never worked with AI UGC tools

Anyone who cannot show previous winning ads with spend behind them



The Opportunity:

$1,500–$2,500/month based on experience, output, and proven track record

Performance bonuses for winning creatives that scale

Work with growing health and supplement brands with real budgets

Long-term position with room to grow into a lead creative role

Flexible remote work

Direct feedback loop so you're always improving and learning what wins



How to Apply:

: 

Subject Line: "Senior AI UGC Editor – [Your Name]"

Include the following:

Your full name, timezone, and country

Your full portfolio link

3 of your best AI UGC ads — ideally health/supplement — with performance data (spend, ROAS, CPA, or any metrics you have access to). This is the most important part of your application.

Which AI UGC tools you've used (HeyGen, Higgsfield, Arcads, others) and how long you've worked with them

Your editing edge — what can you do that most editors can't? Are you exceptionally fast? Do you have access to winning ad libraries? Can you spot trends early? Sell yourself here.

Brief explanation of why you're confident you can deliver 3+ quality AI UGC creatives daily



We're hiring immediately for the right person. If you have the experience and the results to prove it, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Job Opportunity: Long-Term Employment with Growing Roof Estimating Xactimate Company
description:
Are you looking for a stable, long-term position where attention to detail and expertise are highly valued? We are seeking a dedicated individual with experience in Xactimate and a solid understanding of roofing components.

About Us: We are an insurance supplement company that partners with roofing contractors to assist in supplementing their insurance jobs. Our work involves reviewing photos of roofs, analyzing the original estimates, and creating detailed supplements that include necessary additions for rebuilding, supported by citing code and providing photo justification.



Key Responsibilities:

• Analyze roofing photos and original estimates to identify missing or required line items.

• Create detailed and accurate supplements using Xactimate.

• Communicate primarily via
 with insurance companies, and occasionally speak directly with adjusters to justify the inclusion of certain line items.

• Maintain a high level of detail and accuracy in all communications and reports.



Requirements:

• Proficiency in Xactimate and an understanding of roofing components.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to work night shifts (9 AM - 5 PM ET).

• A keen eye for detail and a commitment to delivering high-quality work.

• Willingness to adapt and grow with a rapidly expanding company.



What We Offer:

• A chance to be part of a small but fast-growing company with significant opportunities for advancement.

• A supportive work environment that values hard work, dedication, and continuous improvement.

• A role that will challenge you, with the potential for professional growth and career development.





We are looking to hire 2-3 estimators. 



If you’re up for the challenge and ready to contribute to our team's success, we encourage you to apply. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone who is looking to grow with us and make a meaningful impact in the insurance supplement industry.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
SEEKING AN EXPERIENCED GRAPHIC DESIGNER

Looking for a talented and motivated graphic designer to join our fast-growing team. The position requires an individual who is self-motivated and capable of managing time, priorities, and workload as well as being capable of seeing projects through to the end without being micromanaged. This is a high-volume work environment that requires focus and self-discipline.



We are looking for a person who is passionate about self-growth and company growth. a self-thinker who can think outside of the box.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Developing new design concepts, graphics, and layouts

• Create, trace, and re-draw logos

• Create product artwork for in-house and overseas printing

• Design and test packaging concepts

• Report to the department manager for project assignment

• Keen eye for typography, color, and layout

• Strong visual design skills, focused on details and quality.

• Mock up products & create prototypes in Photoshop using visual aids, product samples, and images from the web

• Design and work on various projects including product catalogs,
 blasts, and web banners



REQUIREMENTS:

•Proficient in English reading, writing and speaking

Proficiency working in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, InDesign, Photoshop, Acrobat) software applications

• Keen attention to detail, troubleshooting, and excellent organization skills

• Positive team-building attitude

• Able to keep cool under pressure due to time-sensitive projects

• Energized by a fast-paced and developing environment



RECOMMENDED:

• Proven professional graphic designing experience

• Packaging and digital design experience is a plus.





We offer:

• Get out early on Fridays (2:30pm)

• Multi-cultural, fun team environment

• Job growth potential during our post-pandemic revitalization

• Part-Time options available

title: UGC & Ambassador Operations Coordinator (E-Commerce | Full-Time | Remote)
description:
We’re Live Bearded - a fast-growing men’s grooming brand built on brotherhood, community, and high standards.



We’re looking for someone to own the systems and execution behind our ambassador and UGC program.



Our Social Media Manager focuses on finding and warming up creators.

Your role is to make sure everything actually happens—consistently, efficiently, and at scale.



WHAT YOU'LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:



You will turn creator relationships into a reliable, high-output UGC engine.

- Manage onboarding of new ambassadors/creators

- Coordinate product seeding and delivery

- Track all creator activity (who posts, when, and what)

- Build and manage systems (Google Sheets, trackers, SOPs, workflows)

- Ensure consistent weekly UGC output (no gaps, no missed follow-ups)

- Handle ongoing communication and follow-ups with creators

- Identify drop-offs and re-engage or replace creators

- Report weekly on:

     - Active ambassadors

     - Content produced

     - Gaps and opportunities



You will work closely with our Social Media Manager—but your role is to drive execution, organization, and consistency.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (FIRST 90 DAYS) 



- Every ambassador is tracked, organized, and accounted for

- Consistent weekly UGC output (no more inconsistency)

- Clear systems in place (no guesswork, no chaos)

- Follow-ups happen automatically—nothing falls through the cracks

- We always know:

     - Who is active

     - Who is posting

     - Who needs follow-up



WHO THIS IS FOR



- You’ve supported or managed UGC, influencer, or ambassador programs

- You are highly organized and process-driven

- You naturally build systems when things are messy

- You follow up relentlessly and don’t let things slip

- You take ownership of outcomes—not just tasks

- You’re comfortable working behind the scenes to make others successful



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



- You only want creative or strategy work

- You don’t enjoy tracking, systems, or organization

- You wait for direction instead of taking initiative

- You don’t follow up consistently

- You lose track of details or deadlines



TOOLS WE USE 



- Shopify

- Asana

- ManyChat

- Google Sheets

- Slack



(We’re open to better systems if you can improve what we have.)



DETAILS: 



- Full-time (must have overlap with Arizona time)

- Daily communication + weekly reporting

- Long-term opportunity with room to grow into a larger operations role



HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT) 



Submit:

- Your resume

- A short Loom/video (3–5 minutes max) answering:

     - Tell us about a time you organized or improved a messy system

     - What was broken and how did you fix it?

     - How do you make sure nothing falls through the cracks?

     - If you joined us, how would you track and manage 20+ ambassadors?



Applications without a Loom/video will not be considered.

title: Google Business Profile (GBP) Reinstatement Expert
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing US-based agency specializing in Business Continuity. We help contractors recover suspended Google Business Profiles.



We’re looking for a Reinstatement Ninja who understands Google’s “black box” and can build strong cases to get listings back online.



Key Responsibilities:

• Analyze GBP suspensions (soft & hard) and identify root causes

• Build professional appeal dossiers (licenses, bills, tax docs)

• Write and submit high-quality reinstatement appeals

•Follow up with Google Support until resolution

• Assist with video verification prep (team/client coordination)

•Fix compliance issues to keep profiles live



Requirements (Must-Have)

• Proven experience reinstating Google Business Profiles

• Strong understanding of Google violations (e.g. deceptive content, quality issues)

• High attention to detail (data consistency, addresses, etc.)

• Persistent and solution-oriented mindset

• Excellent written English (professional communication)

• Comfortable with Google Drive, Loom, and basic EXIF/photo data



Why Join Us?

• Base salary + $50–$100 bonus per successful reinstatement

• Flexible schedule

• Growth opportunity ? potential to lead operations



How to Apply

Start your application with “REINSTATED” and include:

• The most difficult GBP suspension you’ve fixed

• Your success rate with hard suspensions

• A portfolio link or proof of a recent “Live” reinstatement

title: Sales / Customer Service / Social Media Assistant – Rotating Shifts
description:
We are a growing flower business in the United States looking for reliable, organized, and proactive tea
mbers to help with customer service, sales, order management, and social media support.



This is a rotating shift position. We operate morning and afternoon shifts every day of the week, and schedules change weekly based on business needs. Weekend availability is required.



We receive daily retail and wholesale inquiries through phone calls, messages, Instagram,
, WhatsApp, and Shopify. You must respond quickly, communicate professionally, and help close orders.



Responsibilities:



Answer incoming calls and messages quickly

Respond to Instagram, WhatsApp, SMS, and Shopify inquiries

Help customers place orders (retail and wholesale)

Upsell products to increase order value

Enter and organize orders in our system

Follow up with missed calls and leads

Post basic content on Instagram and

Log orders handled during your shift (product, price, payment method)



During downtime:



Follow up with leads

Send messages to generate sales

Post content and update pages

Keep records clean and organized



Requirements:



Strong English speaking and writing

Sales mindset and customer service skills

Fast response time

Organized and reliable

Comfortable using online systems

Must be available on weekends



Schedule:

Morning shift: 9 AM – 3 PM CST

Afternoon shift: 3 PM – 9 PM / 10 PM CST

4–5 shifts per week (rotating schedule)



Pay:

$4–$6 per hour equivalent

Approximately $450–$650/month base

Plus performance bonuses



Important:

Performance is tracked daily. Higher performers receive more hours and bonuses.



To apply:

Send a voice recording introducing yourself and your experience with sales or customer service.

s through Gorgias and handling tickets from open to close
