title: Bookkeeper (Multi-Entity Medical Practices) — Philippines | Remote | Full-Time
description:
About the Role: We’re hiring a detail-oriented Bookkeeper to support the day-to-day financial operations of multiple medical businesses. This role will manage accounts payable (AP), accounts receivable (AR), and core bookkeeping tasks across several entities, ensuring accurate records, clean reconciliations, and consistent reporting.



The ideal candidate has direct experience supporting medical practices (or closely related healthcare businesses), understands how money flows across insurance payments and patient balances, and can keep multiple sets of books organized with strong internal controls.



Key Responsibilities:



Accounts Payable (AP)

 • Enter bills, code expenses correctly, and ensure proper approvals are documented.

 • Manage vendor records, payment schedules, and recurring expenses.

 • Prepare weekly AP reports (what’s due, when, and why).

 • Support 1099 tracking and vendor documentation (as applicable).



Accounts Receivable (AR)

 • Track and reconcile incoming payments across multiple sources (insurance deposits, patient payments, other income).

 • Monitor outstanding invoices and follow up on balances per process.

 • Coordinate with billing/operations teams to resolve discrepancies and ensure accurate posting.

 • Maintain clean AR aging and report on trends/issues.



Bookkeeping & General Accounting

 • Maintain accurate books across multiple medical entities (class/location/entity tracking as required).

 • Perform bank and credit card reconciliations on a set monthly cadence.

 • Record journal entries as needed (reclasses, accruals, deposits, transfers).

 • Maintain a clean chart of accounts and consistent categorization of transactions.

 • Support month-end close and prepare financial packets for leadership (P&L, balance sheet, cash summary).



Financial Organization & Controls

 • Maintain organized documentation (receipts, invoices, approvals, vendor agreements).

 • Improve workflows to reduce errors and ensure audit-ready records.

 • Create and maintain SOPs/checklists for recurring accounting tasks.



Required Experience & Skills

 • 3+ years bookkeeping/accounting experience, including AP and AR ownership.

 • Experience working with medical practices (preferred: multi-location or multi-entity).

 • Comfortable handling multiple businesses concurrently with clean separation of records.

 • Strong reconciliation skills (bank, credit card, deposits) and attention to detail.

 • Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., Xero or similar) and spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets).

 • Strong written English and professional communication.



Nice to Have

 • Experience supporting healthcare revenue workflows (insurance deposits, EOB/ERA reconciliation support, patient payments).

 • Experience working with a CPA/bookkeeping firm or supporting month-end close across multiple entities.

 • Familiarity with payroll coordination (preparing reports, not necessarily running payroll).

 • Experience with expense management tools (
, Expensify, Ramp, etc.).



What Success Looks Like (First 60–90 Days)

 • Books are current and reconciled on schedule across all entities.

 • AP runs smoothly with clear approvals and no missed payments.

 • AR tracking is reliable, with clear aging and consistent follow-up.

 • Leadership receives simple, accurate monthly reporting and cash visibility.

 • Processes are documented and repeatable as the organization scales.



Work Setup & Compensation

 • Remote (Philippines-based)

 • Full-time with some overlap for collaboration

 • Competitive pay based on experience



How to Apply



Please submit:

 1. Resume/CV

 2. A short cover letter describing your experience with medical practice accounting and managing AP/AR

 3. The accounting software you’ve used (and your proficiency level)

 4. (Optional) A brief example of how you’ve handled bookkeeping for multiple entities/locations

title: Medical Claims Billing Manager (Pediatric Therapy) — Philippines | Remote | Full-Time
description:
About the Role: We’re hiring an experienced Medical Claims Billing Manager to oversee end-to-end billing operations for a pediatric therapy organization serving families with young children. This role is responsible for ensuring clean, timely claims submission and payment posting, maintaining compliance, reducing denials, and improving collections—while building repeatable processes and managing a billing team as we grow.



A strong candidate will bring direct pediatric therapy billing experience (OT/PT/ST and ideally ABA) and be highly comfortable working inside Fusion Web Clinic / Ensora (FusionWebClinic) EMR. You’ll be expected to own outcomes, improve systems, and provide clear reporting to leadership.



Key Responsibilities:



Billing Operations & Team Oversight

 • Lead day-to-day medical billing operations: claim creation, scrubbing, submission, follow-ups, appeals, and resolution.

 • Build and manage workflows, checklists, and quality controls to ensure accuracy and speed.

 • Oversee and coach billing specialists; assign work queues and enforce productivity/quality standards.

 • Coordinate closely with scheduling/intake/authorization teams to prevent upstream billing errors.



Claims Management:

 • Ensure timely submission of claims and rebilling/corrections as needed.

 • Track and work denials to resolution; manage payer correspondence and appeals.

 • Monitor payer rules, filing limits, modifier requirements, and documentation needs relevant to pediatric therapy.

 • Identify root causes of denials and implement corrective actions (training, SOP updates, EMR workflow changes).



Payment Posting, AR & Collections:

 • Oversee ERA/EOB posting, adjustments, and reconciliation.

 • Own accounts receivable follow-up: aging, underpayments, recoupments, and disputed claims.

 • Improve cash flow by optimizing AR cycles and follow-up cadence.

 • Support patient balances where applicable (statements, refunds, payment plans coordination—based on company process).



Authorizations, Eligibility & Compliance Coordination:

 • Ensure claims align with authorizations, correct coding, and payer requirements.

 • Collaborate on eligibility verification processes and benefits accuracy to prevent avoidable denials.

 • Maintain HIPAA compliance and consistent documentation handling.



Reporting & Performance Improvement:

 • Produce weekly/monthly billing dashboards (clean claim rate, denial rate, days in AR, aging, collections, top denial reasons).

 • Set targets, track progress, and present improvements and risks to leadership.

 • Recommend process improvements and system enhancements within Ensora/FusionWebClinic.



Required Experience & Skills:

 • 3+ years of medical billing experience with at least 2+ years specifically in pediatric therapy billing (OT/PT/ST required; ABA a plus).

 • Proven experience managing billing workflows and owning outcomes (AR reduction, denial resolution, improved collections).

 • Strong working knowledge of Fusion Web Clinic / Ensora EMR (highly important).

 • Strong understanding of claim lifecycle, payer processes, EOB/ERA posting, and denial management.

 • Familiarity with pediatric therapy-related coding concepts (e.g., common therapy CPT codes, modifiers, units, place of service)—without needing constant supervision.

 • Excellent attention to detail, organization, and accountability.

 • Strong written English for payer follow-up, appeals, and internal documentation.



Nice to Have:

 • Experience billing across multiple payer types (commercial, Medicaid/Medi-Cal, regional programs, school contracts, etc.).

 • Experience supervising a remote billing team and building SOPs/training materials.

 • Experience improving EMR billing setups (fee schedules, claim rules, templates, charge capture workflows).

 • Basic Excel/Google Sheets proficiency for reporting and reconciliation.



What Success Looks Like (First 60–90 Days):

 • Billing workflow stabilized with clear daily/weekly cadence and accountability.

 • Improved clean-claim rate and faster denial resolution.

 • AR visibility: accurate reporting by aging, payer, and denial reason.

 • FusionWebClinic/Ensora workflows optimized to reduce errors and rework.

 • A scalable plan for hiring/training additional billing support as volume grows.



Work Setup & Compensation:

 • Remote (Philippines-based)

 • Full-time with overlap hours for collaboration (CST or PST time zone)

 • Competitive pay based on experience



How to Apply:



Please submit:

 1. Resume/CV

 2. A short cover letter describing your pediatric therapy billing experience (OT/PT/ST required)

 3. Confirm your level of experience with Fusion Web Clinic / Ensora (years used, what you handled inside the system)

 4. Optional but helpful: sample metrics you’ve improved (denial rate, AR days, collections), and how



?



If you want, I can also create a billing manager scorecard and a skills check tailored to pediatric therapy + Ensora/FusionWebClinic (including a denial-work scenario, aging analysis, and SOP-building exercise).

title: Marketing Strategist / Marketing Manager (Philippines | Remote | Full-Time)
description:
About the Role: We’re hiring an experienced Marketing Strategist/Manager to drive growth, strengthen branding, and build a high-performing marketing function for a family-focused business serving parents with young children. Our offerings include kids’ services, classes, programs, events, and family experiences—and we want our marketing to reflect trust, warmth, and real results.



This role starts as a hands-on leadership position and will evolve into managing a broader marketing department. You’ll help hire, train, and manage tea
mbers as we grow.



Audience & Offerings: Our customers are parents and caregivers of young children looking for quality, reliable, fun, and developmentally supportive options for their kids—such as enrichment programs, classes, camps, special events, and related services.



Key Responsibilities:



Marketing Strategy & Execution

 • Build and own the overall marketing strategy tied to clear targets (leads, bookings, enrollments, retention).

 • Translate strategy into quarterly/monthly plans and weekly execution sprints.

 • Develop messaging and positioning that resonates with parents and builds trust.



Paid Media & Growth Campaigns

 • Plan, launch, and optimize campaigns on Meta 
/Instagram) and Google (Search/Display as needed).

 • Manage budgets, audience targeting, creative direction, and performance improvements.

 • Implement conversion rate optimization ideas across the funnel.



Content, Social & Brand Presence

 • Create (or direct creation of) content calendars across social,
, and web content.

 • Ensure consistent brand voice, visuals, and calls-to-action across platforms.

 • Coordinate production of ad creatives, landing page assets, and promotional content.



Website, Landing Pages & Funnels

 • Improve landing pages for conversion (copy, layout, offers, trust elements, CTAs).

 • Build/refine funnels: lead capture ? nurture ? booking/enrollment.

 • Support basic SEO/local visibility efforts and promotions for programs/events.



 & CRM Marketing

 • Create
 campaigns and automated sequences (welcome, nurture, reactivation, promos).

 • Segment audiences to improve conversion and retention (new leads, active families, past families).



Partnerships & Community Growth

 • Develop partnership campaigns (schools, pediatric providers, parent communities, local orgs).

 • Strengthen reputation marketing (reviews, testimonials, referral initiatives).



Analytics & Reporting

 • Set up weekly/monthly reporting and dashboards.

 • Use performance insights to prioritize next actions and improve ROI.



Team Leadership & Hiring:



As the marketing function grows, you will:

 • Help define roles, scorecards, and hiring criteria for new marketing tea
mbers (e.g., social media specialist, designer, video editor, ads specialist, copywriter).

 • Assist with recruiting, screening, interviews, and selection, including skills tests and portfolio review.

 • Onboard, train, and manage the marketing team, ensuring clear KPIs, deadlines, and quality standards.

 • Build repeatable processes (campaign briefs, content workflows, approvals, reporting cadence).

 • Act as the key owner for marketing performance and team accountability.



Required Experience & Skills:

 • 3+ years in marketing strategy/management with proven results (growth + execution).

 • Experience marketing to parents/families (kids programs, childcare, education, pediatric services, family activities, enrichment, etc.).

 • Strong knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and working familiarity with Google Ads.

 • Strong copywriting and messaging instincts (trust-building, parent-focused, conversion-oriented).

 • Comfortable leading projects, managing priorities, and maintaining high follow-through.

 • Experience managing contractors or tea
mbers (or clear readiness to step into leadership).



Nice to Have:

 • Local-service marketing experience (especially multi-location).

 • Familiarity with CRM/email tools (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, GoHighLevel, etc.).

 • Ability to review creative (ads, graphics, short-form video) and provide strong direction.

 • Basic SEO and website optimization experience.



What Success Looks Like (First 60–90 Days):

 • Clear marketing plan + reporting cadence implemented.

 • Stronger consistency across social/email/paid campaigns.

 • Improved lead flow and/or bookings/enrollments with measurable performance gains.

 • A hiring roadmap for the next roles and a simple operating system for managing a marketing team.



Work Setup & Compensation

 • Remote (Philippines-based)

 • Full-time with CST schedule

 • Competitive pay based on experience



How to Apply:



Please submit:

 1. Resume/CV

 2. Short cover letter describing your experience marketing to parents/families

 3. Portfolio/case studies (ads, landing pages, social,
 flows, results screenshots—anything you can share)

 4. A brief note: If you were starting from scratch, what would your first 3 marketing priorities be for a kids/family-focused business, and why?

title: Data Entry Specialist
description:
We're seeking a highly accurate and fast-paced Data Verification Specialist for a full-time remote role. This position involves reviewing AI-generated transcriptions of historical handwritten documents and correcting errors. The workflow requires maintaining a target output of verifying 800 names per hour using a streamlined, keyboard-driven interface. 



Compensation:

$700 USD (30 Day Contract - includes $200 performance bonus)



About Us:

We are a remote-first technology startup building the largest verified digital archive of Mediterranean genealogical records. By combining proprietary Artificial Intelligence with human verification, we solve the transcription errors that currently plague legacy family history platforms. Our database maps millions of historical births, marriages, and household census records from the 1500s to the 1900s, providing a definitive, 100% accurate index for a global diaspora.



Culture:

As a start-up, there's always lots to learn. It's not a top-down culture, we reward performance and focus on what's been achieved, not what's been missed.



The Role:

As a Data Verification Specialist, you provide the final quality control check before records are published to a live database.

1. Core Task: Visually cross-reference scanned images of 18th and 19th-century handwritten documents against text generated by our AI.

2. Correction: Quickly approve accurate matches and manually correct the 5% to 10% of names where the AI hallucinates or misinterprets the handwriting.

3. Speed & Efficiency: Maintain a baseline verification speed of 800 names per hour utilizing custom keyboard shortcuts to eliminate mouse dependency.

4. Linguistic Context: The records feature Mediterranean naming conventions (closely resembling Spanish, Italian, and Latin roots). You must adapt quickly to specific character combinations and cursive handwriting styles.



Requirements

- Demonstrated experience in high-volume data entry, transcription, or quality assurance.

- Exceptional visual attention to detail and the ability to sustain focus over long processing sessions.

- High proficiency in reading cursive handwriting and identifying phonetic spelling patterns.

- Reliable high-speed internet and a workstation optimized for fast, repetitive keyboard input.



Who this role is good for:

- You thrive in "flow state" environments and prefer highly repetitive, singular workflows over constantly shifting daily responsibilities.

- You have a proven background in medical transcription, legal data entry, or similar roles that demand sustained focus and accuracy over a full shift.

- You instinctively use keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys. You view using a computer mouse as a bottleneck to your processing speed.

- You don't get stuck on puzzles. If an 18th-century word is completely illegible, you are comfortable flagging it within 5 seconds and immediately moving to the next record.



BONUS: You have a natural knack for deciphering "doctor's handwriting" or historical cursive, allowing you to instantly recognize visual patterns in messy scripts rather than trying to read them letter-by-letter.



**********

To Apply:



Please spend 5 minutes filling out this form: 



NOTE: This is currently a 1 month contract, depending on performance, this will lead to a part-time role, and later a full-time, permanent contract when we officially launch.

title: Growth Marketing (Digital/Paid Media) Specialist
description:
Company Service/Type: Taxi Services

Location: NY (Remote)

Position Type: Part-Time (20 Hours/Week)

Business Operating Timezone (EST)

Reports to: Operations Manager / Founder



About the firm:

Taxi service in Rockland County’s premier taxi service, dedicated to providing reliable, safe, and efficient transportation for our community. As we scale our fleet and expand our reach, we are looking for a data-driven Growth Marketing Specialist to join our team. We aren't just looking for someone to post on social media; we need a performance-minded strategist who can move the needle on driver recruitment and rider growth.



The Role

This is a high-impact, part-time role designed for a digital marketer who lives and breathes ROI. Your mission is twofold:

* Supply: Build a steady pipeline of qualified drivers to join our fleet.

* Demand: Acquire new passengers and ensure our existing customers keep coming back.



Key Responsibilities

1. Performance Marketing & Acquisition

Driver Recruitment: Design and execute performance marketing campaigns (Meta Ads, Google Search, etc.) specifically targeted at attracting professional drivers in the Rockland County area.

Customer Acquisition: Launch digital campaigns to increase booking volume via search, social, and display channels.

Budget Management: Optimize ad spend to maintain a low Cost Per Acquisition (CPA) while maximizing lead quality.

2. Social Media Management

* Create & Oversee the company’s presence across
, Instagram, and LinkedIn (and/or other relevant channels)

* Create engaging local content that builds community trust and positions the company as the top choice for transportation in the county.

3. Retention & Lifecycle Marketing

CLV Optimization: Develop strategies to increase Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) through targeted promotions and loyalty initiatives.

Retention: Implement
/SMS/Push notification (or/and relevant platforms) workflows to re-engage dormant riders and reduce churn.

4. Tracking & Analytics

* Monitor and report on key performance indicators (KPIs) including conversion rates, driver lead quality, and retention cohorts.



Who we’re looking for:

* Experience: 2+ years in digital marketing with a proven track record in Performance Marketing (paid social and search).

* Market & Geo Experience: Familiarity with/ or worked with US firms.

* Full-Funnel Thinking: Expertise in both top-of-funnel acquisition and bottom-of-funnel retention/loyalty.

What We’re Looking For:

title: Sales Navigator expert with experience only
description:
I have a paid LinkedIn Sales Navigator account, and I’m looking for someone who knows how to fully leverage it, not just use it, but turn it into real connections and qualified leads.



This is not a basic VA role. I’m looking for someone with hands-on experience who understands how to operate LinkedIn as a lead generation and conversation platform. You will be working in a B2B environment.



What I expect you to know and do:

- Apply ICP targeting to identify the right prospects (not just job titles)

- Use advanced Sales Navigator filters and build structured lead pipelines

- Understand how to distinguish decision-makers, influencers, and blockers

- Execute non-salesy outreach that starts real conversations

- Manage multi-step follow-up sequences (not one-off messages)

- Track activity and results consistently

- Review and improve performance weekly (acceptance rate, replies, conversations)

- Work within or alongside CRM systems (experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) is a strong advantage)



Do not apply if:

- You only build lead lists and don’t handle outreach

- You rely on copy-paste templates or mass messaging

- You don’t track performance or improve based on results

- You don’t understand B2B relationship-based selling

- You have limited or basic experience with Sales Navigator



What you will be responsible for:

- Building targeted lead lists aligned with our ICP

- Sending connection requests and managing follow-ups

- Starting and maintaining conversations with qualified prospects

- Keeping a clean and organized pipeline

- Turning activity into real opportunities (not just contacts)



To apply:



Send a short message (no AI generated) explaining:

- How you use Sales Navigator beyond building lists

- How you approach outreach and follow-ups

- What kind of results you’ve achieved



This is a part-time role (up to 4 hours/day) with the intention of working together long-term. The goal is to build a consistent system that generates real conversations and opportunities over time.

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
THIS ROLE REQUIRES PRIOR EXPERIENCE IN RETENTION-FOCUSED POSITIONS, SUCH AS:



• CUSTOMER SUCCESS REPRESENTATIVE

• RETENTION SPECIALIST

• ACCOUNT MANAGER

• OR SIMILAR ROLES WITH A STRONG FOCUS ON CUSTOMER RETENTION OR CLIENT RELATIONSHIP MANAGEMENT



IMPORTANT: APPLICANTS WITH ONLY GENERAL CUSTOMER SERVICE EXPERIENCE (E.G., HANDLING INQUIRIES, BASIC SUPPORT, OR NON-RETENTION ROLES) WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:

If you would like to be considered for this role, please complete the following steps:

   2. Include a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience.

   3. Provide a link to your CV/Resume.



Please note: Applications submitted without a CV/Resume will not be reviewed.





About the Position:

We are looking for a Customer Success Specialist whose primary responsibility is to build strong customer relationships and drive long-term retention. In this role, you will work closely with customers to understand their needs, address concerns, and proactively identify opportunities to enhance their overall experience with our services.



The ideal candidate is highly communicative, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering exceptional customer satisfaction and fostering long-term customer loyalty.

• Support the onboarding of new customers to ensure a smooth transition into active service

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of customer interactions in CRM systems

• Assist with renewal processes and strengthen long-term customer partnerships



Requirements:

• Excellent English communication skills (verbal and written) (MUST)

• Proven experience in Customer Success, Retention, Account Management, Customer Support, or a similar retention-focused role (MUST)

• Proficiency in CRM systems and customer support tools (MUST)

• Strong interpersonal and relationship-building skills

• Ability to manage multiple customer relationships simultaneously

• Strong problem-solving skills with keen attention to detail

• Ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams

• Ability to remain calm, professional, and solution-oriented in challenging situations

• Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret customer feedback and data



Work Arrangement:

• Full-time position in a work-from-home setup

• 8 hours per shift, 5 days a week

title: Calling All MASTER VIDEO EDITORS for Meta Ads & VSL'S
description:
We’re looking for an Ad Creative & VSL Editor to produce high-converting video ads, sales videos, and creative assets for a fast-growing digital marketing agency.

OPT Digital is a local SEO and digital marketing agency that helps tradespeople and home service businesses across the US, Australia, and New Zealand grow through search, ads, and content. We work with roofers, electricians, plumbers, landscapers, and other service businesses to generate consistent inbound leads and build their brands online.

You’ll be working across two streams: producing ad creatives and VSLs for our clients’ campaigns, and building OPT Digital’s own brand content. This role starts project-based and transitions to full-time for the right person.

What the Role Entails

Editing short-form
 and Meta ad creatives from raw footage — talking heads, client testimonials, B-roll, and screen recordings

Producing video sales letters (VSLs) from scripted talking head footage with professional pacing, overlays, and motion graphics

Creating 3D graphic animations, text overlays, kinetic typography, and visual effects to elevate ad quality beyond standard cuts

Working with raw footage of testimonials, client case studies, and founder-to-camera content, turning unpolished clips into scroll-stopping ads

Producing multiple ad variations and formats (Stories, Reels, Feed) from the same source footage for split testing

Delivering 10–30 static or motion-based ad creatives and 10–40 video ad edits per month, plus 1 VSL per month

Taking creative direction from the team while also bringing your own ideas for hooks, pacing, and visual storytelling

Maintaining organised project files, naming conventions, and a shared asset library so the team can move fast

Occasionally supporting the long-form YouTube editing pipeline — cutting highlight clips, repurposing long-form content into short-form social assets, or assisting with motion graphics and overlays for YouTube videos when needed

Skills We’re Looking For

This role is equal parts motion designer, ad editor, and visual storyteller. You need to understand what makes people stop scrolling and keep watching.

2+ years of experience editing short-form video ads, paid social creatives, or VSLs

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects — these are non-negotiable

Able to create 3D animations, motion graphics, text overlays, transitions, and visual effects that enhance (not distract from) the message

Strong understanding of direct-response ad formats — you know what a hook is, you understand pacing for Meta ads, and you’ve worked with UGC or talking head content before

Experience producing content for
/Instagram ad campaigns (feed, stories, reels formats)

Comfortable working from raw, unpolished footage and making it look professional

Reliable internet connection and ability to handle large video files and render times

Strong attention to detail — audio levels, colour grading, text alignment, export settings

What We Offer

$1,000–$1,300 USD/month depending on experience and output quality

Starts project-based with a clear path to full-time for the right person

Fully remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

A fast-growing agency with a high volume of creative work and real variety — you won’t be editing the same ad over and over

Direct access to the founder and creative team — no layers of bureaucracy

The opportunity to build a portfolio of high-performing paid ads across dozens of industries

Paid test task for shortlisted candidates before any commitment

How to Apply

A portfolio is required. Please include links to ad creatives, VSLs, or motion graphics work you’ve produced. We want to see short-form paid social content specifically — not just long-form YouTube edits or wedding videos.

Shortlisted applicants will receive a paid test task before we proceed.

We’re reviewing applicants now and will be in touch quickly with those who are the right match.

Thanks for your time,

The OPT Digital Team

title: Calling All MASTER Youtube VIDEO EDITORS! WE WANT YOU
description:
We’re looking for a Long-Form YouTube Video Editor to produce engaging, retention-focused videos for a growing digital marketing agency’s YouTube channel.

OPT Digital is a local SEO and digital marketing agency that helps tradespeople and home service businesses across the US, Australia, and New Zealand grow through search, ads, and content. We work with roofers, electricians, plumbers, landscapers, and other service businesses to generate consistent inbound leads and build their brands online.

We’re building out OPT Digital’s YouTube presence — content that covers local SEO strategy, client acquisition, agency operations, and how we help service businesses grow. Think Iman Gadzhi meets Alex Hormozi: talking head content with cinematic B-roll, dynamic pacing, and documentary-style storytelling segments that keep viewers watching.

This role starts project-based (2–5 videos per month) and transitions to full-time for the right person.

What the Role Entails

Editing long-form YouTube videos (10–30+ minutes) from raw talking head footage, B-roll, screen recordings, and supplementary assets

Building engaging, retention-optimised edits — strong hooks in the first 5 seconds, pattern interrupts throughout, and pacing that keeps viewers watching to the end

Creating documentary and storytelling-style sequences within videos — not just jump cuts on a talking head, but visually compelling narratives with layered audio, B-roll, text, and motion graphics

Designing and animating custom thumbnails, lower thirds, chapter cards, end screens, and recurring visual motifs that build brand consistency across the channel

Colour grading and audio mixing to a professional standard — clean vocals, balanced music, and a polished visual tone

Working with the founder (on camera) and creative team to develop the visual identity of the channel over time

Delivering 2–5 fully edited long-form videos per month to start, with potential to increase as the channel grows

Proactively suggesting creative ideas — better ways to open a video, visual metaphors for concepts, pacing improvements — not just executing what you’re told

Occasionally supporting the ad creative pipeline — cutting down long-form content into short-form ad creatives, producing video testimonial edits, or creating motion graphics assets for Meta ad campaigns when needed

Skills We’re Looking For

This role is equal parts filmmaker, editor, and YouTube strategist. You need to understand retention, pacing, and visual storytelling — not just how to cut clips together.

2+ years of experience editing long-form YouTube content (business, education, or entrepreneurship niches preferred)

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects

Strong understanding of YouTube retention mechanics — hooks, pattern interrupts, visual pacing, chapter structuring, and end screen strategy

Ability to edit in both talking-head-with-B-roll style (Iman Gadzhi, Alex Hormozi) and documentary/storytelling style with layered narratives

Experience with motion graphics, kinetic typography, animated overlays, and custom transitions

Good eye for colour grading and audio post-production (noise reduction, EQ, music mixing)

Comfortable working from rough, unscripted footage and structuring it into a compelling narrative

Reliable internet connection and ability to handle large project files and long render times

What We Offer

$1,000–$1,300 USD/month depending on experience and output quality

Starts project-based (2–5 videos/month) with a clear path to full-time as the channel scales

Fully remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

Creative ownership — you’re not a button-pusher, you’re helping build a channel from the ground up

Direct access to the founder and creative direction — no layers of bureaucracy

The opportunity to build a public portfolio as the channel grows — your work will be seen

Paid test task for shortlisted candidates before any commitment

How to Apply

A portfolio is required. Please include links to long-form YouTube videos you’ve edited — ideally in the business, education, or entrepreneurship space. We want to see talking head edits, B-roll integration, motion graphics work, and evidence of retention-focused editing.

Bonus: If you’ve edited content in the style of Iman Gadzhi, Alex Hormozi, Ali Abdaal, or similar creators, call that out specifically in your application.

Shortlisted applicants will receive a paid test task before we proceed.

We’re reviewing applicants now and will be in touch quickly with those who are the right match.

Thanks for your time,

The OPT Digital Team

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
Short-Form Video Editor (Instagram Reels / TikTok) – Elite Level



Miami The Jeweler is looking for an elite-level Short-Form Video Editor who can create high-performing Instagram Reels and TikToks that drive views, engagement, and sales.



This is not a basic editing role. We need someone who understands viral content, retention, pacing, and visual storytelling — and knows how to turn raw footage into content that stops the scroll and converts.



About Us



Miami The Jeweler is a fast-growing jewelry brand specializing in moissanite and diamond jewelry. We’re building one of the biggest names in the industry and are focused on dominating through content and branding.



Check out our Instagram 
 — that’s the baseline. Your job is to beat our current content.



Requirements

Expert in short-form content (Reels/TikTok): Proven ability to create videos that get high views, strong retention, and engagement.

Advanced editing skills (REQUIRED): Must be highly proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro AND CapCut — both are required.

iPhone 12 or newer (REQUIRED): Must have for reviewing content, testing formats, and staying aligned with mobile-first editing.

Understands retention: Strong knowledge of hooks, pacing, pattern interrupts, and keeping viewers engaged.

Strong storytelling ability: Can turn raw clips into compelling, high-converting content.

Trend awareness: Actively follows trends and knows how to adapt them to our brand.

Fast turnaround: Able to deliver quickly without sacrificing quality.

Hardworking & highly available: Must be responsive and ready to edit when needed — speed is critical.

Detail-oriented: Clean cuts, precise timing, polished output.

Fluent in English: Clear communication is essential.

Always improving: Studies viral content and constantly pushes to improve performance.

Tools & Tech

Adobe Premiere Pro (required)

CapCut (required)

iPhone 12 or newer

Fast WiFi for handling large files

Responsibilities

Edit high-performing Instagram Reels and TikToks from raw footage.

Create strong hooks within the first 1–3 seconds to capture attention.

title: Music Video Editor Cinematic. Surreal. Rhythm-obsessed.
description:
Music Video Editor

Cinematic. Surreal. Rhythm-obsessed.



We’re looking for a music video editor with a strong visual point of view, real musical instinct, and a taste for the unexpected. Someone who can cut with rhythm, emotion, tension, and atmosphere. Someone who understands how to make a video feel immersive, transportive, and a little unreal.



This role is for an editor who lives somewhere between cinema, art, music, fashion, and digital dream logic. You should know how to build visual worlds that feel elevated, strange, beautiful, and emotionally sharp. You understand pacing beyond the beat. You know when to glitch, when to breathe, when to hold tension, and when to hit with force.



We want someone who can bring a cool, contemporary, slightly surreal visual language to music-driven storytelling. Bonus if your instincts lean toward the atmospheric, the textural, the otherworldly, or the subtly game-like, where motion, energy, and image progression feel immersive and designed, not just edited.



What you’ll do



Edit music videos, visualizers, performance films, and short-form content with a strong artistic point of view

Build edits that feel rhythmic, cinematic, emotionally charged, and visually unforgettable

Shape narrative through pacing, juxtaposition, tone, and image selection

Cut to music with sensitivity to mood, drops, negative space, lyrical subtext, and emotional arc

Create work that feels stylish, immersive, and culturally current

Collaborate with artists, directors, and creative leads to push each piece beyond standard coverage-cutting

Bring texture, tension, atmosphere, and world-building into the edit

Organize footage, manage timelines cleanly, and deliver polished finals across formats



What we’re looking for



A strong portfolio of music videos, experimental edits, fashion films, trailers, or visually authored short-form work

Excellent instinct for rhythm, musicality, 
ntum, and emotional pacing

Strong storytelling ability, even in abstract or non-linear formats

A refined eye for imagery, visual composition, tone, and cultural aesthetics

Comfort working in a visual space that can be dark, dreamlike, surreal, kinetic, or hyper-stylized

Someone who understands that the cut is not just assembly, it is world creation

Collaborative, fast, detail-oriented, and creatively ambitious



Tools



Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro

Experience with After Effects

Familiarity with DaVinci Resolve, Photoshop, and other post-production / design tools is a plus

Comfortable mixing formats, frame rates, textures, archival footage, performance footage, and layered visual treatments



Bonus points



Taste for surreal image systems, digital textures, lo-fi distortion, hyperreal polish, or cinematic game-adjacent visual language

Experience with motion design, light VFX, compositing, or AI-assisted visual workflows

Strong references in music, underground culture, art direction, fashion, experimental film, or immersive media



The right person

You have taste, restraint, and edge. You understand music emotionally, not just mathematically. You know how to make an edit feel like a hallucination with structure, a dream with propulsion, a story with pulse. You can make things feel cool without trying too hard, and strange in the right way.



Here’s an even punchier version for a post:



Seeking a music video editor with surreal taste, gamer-adjacent visual instincts, and real feel for rhythm, story, and emotional pacing. Must be strong in Premiere, comfortable in After Effects and other post tools, and able to craft cinematic, artful edits that feel immersive, stylish, and musically alive. Looking for someone who can bring atmosphere, tension, texture, and world-building to the cut, not just assemble footage.

title: Video Editor (Meta Ads, Health & Wellness Niche)
description:
We are looking for a highly specialized and creative Meta Ads Video Editor to join our team. This isn’t a generalist role; we need an expert who understands the unique mechanics of advertising in the health and wellness space. You will be responsible for editing high-converting, engaging video ads for our supplement and health product lines.



If you know how to stop the scroll, craft a compelling visual narrative, and leverage the latest AI tools to speed up your workflow, we want to hear from you.

Key Responsibilities



    Hook Creation: Design scroll-stopping first 3 seconds tailored to a health-conscious audience.



    Strategic Clip Selection: Sift through raw footage or stock content to find the most impactful, high-retention clips.



    Visual Storytelling: Weave together visuals, pacing, text overlays, and audio to build trust and drive conversions for health products.



    Trend Integration: Stay ruthlessly up-to-date with current Meta Ad trends, TikTok styles, and direct-response marketing tactics, applying them to the health niche.



    AI Implementation: Utilize cutting-edge AI video and audio tools (such as HeyGen, Veo 3, etc.) to enhance production value, localize content, or iterate variations quickly.



What We’re Looking For



    Proven Niche Experience: A strong portfolio showcasing Meta Ads specifically created for supplement brands, wellness products, or health-related direct-to-consumer (DTC) companies.



    Direct-Response Mindset: A clear understanding of what makes a viewer click and buy (pacing, CTA placement, overcoming objections visually).



    Technical & AI Proficiency: Advanced skills in standard editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro) alongside a strong command of modern AI generation tools like HeyGen and Veo 3.



    Self-Starter Mentality: You will have complete flexibility to set your own hours. We don’t micromanage schedules; we care about the quality of the work and hitting deadlines.



What We Offer



    100% Flexible Hours: Work when you are most productive. As long as the work gets done and deadlines are met, your schedule is your own.



    Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.



    Consistent Work: A steady stream of projects for the right candidate.



How to Apply

 to

 1.  A brief introduction about your experience with health/supplement brands.

title: VA Issue Coordinator (Property Maintenance & Operations)
description:
We are looking to hire a VA for the role below.  The role would be expected to be a full-time role, with a budget of $4/hour. 



Also, ideally the role is spread over an entire week, with reduced workloads in weekends - only to handle some emergencies or follow ups. The timezone would follow the Malta timezone. For example:





    Mon-Fri: 10am - 6pm (with 1 hour break daily) - 35 hours

    Sat: 4 hours: 10am - 2pm

    Sun: 2 hours 





Role Description



The Issue Coordinator is a specialized role focused on streamlining property maintenance, emergency response, and issue resolution. The primary objective is to resolve property-related issues efficiently while maintaining a comprehensive knowledge base for the entire team on the properties, and efficient communication with the property owner.

Primary Responsibilities:



    Issue Coordination: Manage the full lifecycle of property issues, including damage claims and owner status updates.



    System Management: Monitor and close tasks/tickets in Breezeway and Zoho Desk. Ensure all updates are logged in our Internal Portal and Beds24.



    Knowledge Management: For every closed ticket, update Property Asset Sheets, Inventory Lists, and Property Info Documents to prevent future escalations.



    Cleaning Coordination: Act as the primary owner for specific cleaning company WhatsApp groups; convert reported issues into formal tickets via the official Escalation Form, or using Breezeway



    Communication with Clients & Property Owners: This is done both via text/email, and calls.  Owners must be kept up-to-date all along the way on what is happening with issues



The primary responsibilities can change from time to time, based on the requirements of the business.  



The On-Call System (24/7 Coverage): 

This role operates on a Primary/Secondary Roster to ensure round-the-clock emergency support.



    Primary: Must be fully available for emergencies during assigned shifts.



    Secondary: Acts strictly as an emergency backup.



    Accountability: Reliability is critical. Failure to fulfill Primary duties is a severe breach of role.



    Duty Swaps: Coordination of shift switches is the responsibility of the staff members.



Candidate Requirements:



    Proficiency in Breezeway, Zoho Desk, Clickup, and Beds24 (or similar PMS) is a big plus.



    Familiarity with OTAs like Airbnb, 
 and Expedia



    Prior experience in property management or similar roles is a plus as well



    Exceptional communication and "ownership" mindset. 



    Good fluency of English, written and spoken - with a neutral, easy-to-understand accent.





To apply, please submit a vocaroo voice recording detailing your experience so that I can listen to how you sound like, and send your cv/resume as well. If I like what I hear, then we can setup an interview.

title: AI Static Ad Designer & Strategist (Direct Response / Health Niche)
description:
Job Title: AI Static Ad Designer & Strategist (Direct Response / Health Niche)



Location: Remote

Job Type: Freelance / Contract

About the Role



We are not looking for a traditional graphic designer to build ads from scratch. We are looking for an AI Ad Operator and Strategist who understands direct response marketing and knows how to use modern AI tools to produce high-converting static ads at scale.



In this role, you will analyze what is currently winning in the market, adapt those concepts, and leverage AI to produce static variations in mass. If you are obsessed with CTRs, closing feedback loops, and figuring out why an ad works, this is for you.



We offer a highly lucrative bonus structure: if you find and create a winning ad, you get paid for it. The better your ads perform, the more you earn.

Key Responsibilities



    High-Volume AI Production: Leverage the latest AI tools to generate, adapt, and iterate static ads at scale. You will be expected to produce roughly 50 ad variations per product (averaging 150 ads daily) through smart AI generation and templating.



    Trend & Competitor Analysis: Daily deep-dives into Atria,
 Ad Library,
, and competitor funnels to spot emerging trends, visual hooks, and winning angles in the direct-to-consumer (DTC) health space.



    Rapid Iteration & Feedback Loops: Analyze daily account performance to understand what is working and what isn’t. Use that data to iterate on creatives day-by-day, killing losers and scaling winners.



    Concept Adaptation: Take proven, winning ad frameworks and creatively adapt them using AI, bringing fresh but data-backed ideas to the table.



What We’re Looking For



    Direct Response DNA: You understand the psychology of selling. You know how to make an ad stand out in a crowded feed, write/design strong hooks, and drive the user to click.



    AI Tool Mastery: Exceptional command of AI image generation and design tools (e.g., Midjourney, DALL-E, Photoshop Generative Fill, Canva AI) to expedite massive workflows.



    Design Background: While you won't be starting from scratch, you need an undeniable eye for layout, typography, visual hierarchy, and color theory.



    Niche Experience: Previous experience designing static ads for health, wellness, or supplement brands is highly preferred.



    Analytical Mindset: You don't just design; you look at the metrics. You are eager to close the feedback loop between design and media buying.



Compensation & Benefits



    Lucrative Bonus Structure: Earn significant bonuses for every winning ad you produce. Your earning potential is directly tied to the success of your creatives.



    Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere.

ing

title: FULL-TIME REMOTEFULL-TIME REMOTE BOOKKEEPER (QUICKBOOKS ONLINE) BOOKKEEPER (QUICKBOOKS ONLINE)
description:
Schedule: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (U.S.), Monday–Friday

Position Type: Full-Time (Exclusive – no other clients or employers)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Compensation: $700 – $1,000/month (based on experience)



**FULL-TIME REMOTE BOOKKEEPER (QUICKBOOKS ONLINE) – PHILIPPINES**



**Schedule:** 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (U.S.), Monday–Friday

**Position Type:** Full-Time (Exclusive – no other clients or employers)

**Location:** Remote (Philippines)

**Compensation:** $700 – $1,000/month (based on experience)



---



## WHO WE ARE



We are a U.S.-based bookkeeping firm that works with small business owners who need clear, accurate, no-nonsense financials. We move fast, we expect accuracy, and we work as a team.



We already have an administrative support team in the Philippines. This role is NOT meant to do everything — it is meant to focus on **skilled bookkeeping work** while leveraging support staff efficiently.



---



## IMPORTANT: EXCLUSIVE EMPLOYMENT & AVAILABILITY (READ CAREFULLY)



This is a **strict full-time, exclusive position**.



* You are expected to work **only for our company during 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (Monday–Friday)**

* You **cannot work for other clients or employers during these hours**

* You must be **fully available and responsive throughout the workday**



### Communication Requirement:



* You must be active on Slack during working hours

* You are expected to **respond to management messages within 10 minutes**



### Enforcement:



* If it becomes clear that you are working multiple jobs and cannot respond in a timely manner, or are not fully dedicated during working hours:



  * **You will be terminated immediately**



We are direct about this because reliability and responsiveness are critical to our operation.



---



## WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We are hiring a **full-time bookkeeper with at least 3 years of QuickBooks Online experience** who:



* Understands real bookkeeping (not just data entry)

* Is detail-oriented and efficient

* Communicates clearly and professionally

* Works well within a team structure

* Is comfortable delegating lower-level tasks to support staff

* Is also willing to step in and handle those tasks when needed

* Can stay focused on high-value work instead of getting stuck



---



## CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



### Monthly Bookkeeping Tasks



* Maintain and manage QuickBooks Online files

* Review and clear bank feed transactions

* Accurately categorize income and expenses

* Reconcile bank accounts

* Reconcile credit card accounts

* Identify and record bank fees

* Prepare and post journal entries (including payroll entries)

* Split loan payments between principal and interest

* Maintain clean and accurate general ledgers

* Ensure books are fully reconciled and ready for reporting



---



### Client Onboarding / Cleanup Work (Catch-Up & Clean-Up)



* Bring books up to date for clients who are behind

* Review prior transactions for accuracy and proper categorization

* Reconstruct financial records where needed

* Clean up uncategorized or miscategorized transactions

* Identify inconsistencies or missing data

* Work through historical reconciliations



---



## IMPORTANT: HOW WE WORK (TEAM STRUCTURE)



This role is NOT expected to waste time on low-level investigative work when support is available.



If an account does NOT reconcile to zero:



* You should **delegate the investigative work to our administrative assistant**

* The admin team will identify missing or incorrect transactions

* The file is returned to you for final adjustments and reconciliation



???? Your job is to focus on **bookkeeping judgment and execution**, not transaction-level detective work.



**However**, if the administrative team is backed up:



* You are expected to step in and handle those investigative tasks yourself

* We operate as a team — no bottlenecks, no waiting around



We expect you to:



* Use the team efficiently

* Stay productive at all times

* Move quickly across multiple client accounts



---



## REQUIREMENTS



* Minimum **3 years experience with QuickBooks Online**

* Strong understanding of:



  * Bank and credit card reconciliations

  * Journal entries

  * Loan accounting (principal vs interest)

  * Payroll entries

* Experience working with U.S.-based clients preferred

* Excellent attention to detail

* Strong written and verbal English

* Reliable internet and ability to work full U.S. hours (**9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time**)

* Must be available **exclusively for this position (no side clients during working hours)**



---



## WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



* Accounts reconcile cleanly and consistently

* Work is completed accurately with minimal corrections

* You move efficiently across multiple clients

* You communicate clearly with the team

* You delegate appropriately but also step in when needed

* You are responsive, reliable, and fully engaged during working hours



---



## COMPENSATION



* **$700 – $1,000/month**

* Based on experience, skill level, and ability to work independently



---



## HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, you must submit ALL of the following:



1. **Your full resume**

2. A short **introduction video (2–5 minutes)** covering:



   * Your experience with QuickBooks Online

   * The types of bookkeeping work you have handled

   * Your experience with reconciliations, journal entries, and clean-up work

   * Your experience working with U.S. clients (if applicable)



???? This video is required so we can:



* Better understand your real experience level

* Evaluate your communication skills and English proficiency



3. Confirmation that you can work:



   * **Exclusively 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time**

   * Meet the **10-minute Slack response requirement**



---



We are looking for someone long-term who wants stability, clear expectations, and a team that actually works together.



If that’s you — apply.

title: Private Label product researcher
description:
We are a growing Amazon private label business seeking a highly analytical and experienced Product Researcher to identify and validate profitable product opportunities. This role is critical to our expansion strategy and requires someone who can consistently source high-potential products, evaluate risk, and support data-driven decision making.



Responsibilities

 • Identify new product opportunities with strong demand, low to moderate competition, and healthy profit margins

 • Conduct in-depth market analysis using tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, and Amazon Seller Central data

 • Evaluate product viability based on pricing, fees, landed costs, and estimated net margins

 • Analyze keyword data, search volume, and trends to assess demand and ranking potential

 • Review competitor listings, including pricing strategies, reviews, and differentiation opportunities

 • Source and compare suppliers (primarily via Alibaba or similar platforms), including preliminary cost negotiations

 • Estimate total landed cost, including manufacturing, shipping, duties, and Amazon fees

 • Identify opportunities for product improvement, bundling, or positioning to increase competitiveness

 • Present clear product research reports with actionable recommendations

 • Work closely with management and operations to transition validated products into launch phase



Requirements

 • Proven experience researching and identifying profitable products for Amazon private label businesses

 • Strong understanding of Amazon FBA economics, including fees, margins, and logistics

 • Proficiency with product research tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or equivalent

 • Ability to analyze large datasets and extract meaningful insights

 • Strong understanding of keyword research and demand validation

 • Experience sourcing from overseas suppliers and understanding of basic supply chain considerations

 • Detail-oriented with strong organizational and documentation skills

 • Ability to work independently and meet consistent research output targets



Preferred Qualifications

 • Experience working with multi-variation listings or scaling existing product lines

 • Familiarity with launching products and understanding of ranking strategies

 • Experience working with small to mid-sized Amazon sellers in a growth phase

 • Basic understanding of branding, positioning, and conversion optimization



Performance Expectations

 • Consistently identify viable product opportunities that meet defined margin and demand criteria

 • Maintain a steady pipeline of researched products ready for review

 • Demonstrate sound judgment in filtering out high-risk or low-potential ideas

 • Contribute directly to the company’s SKU expansion and revenue growth



This is a results-driven role suited for someone who understands that product selection is the foundation of a successful Amazon business and can deliver high-quality opportunities consistently.

title: Remote Legal Specialist
description:
?? Read Before Applying



This is a high-responsibility role supporting active U.S. construction projects. We are looking for someone who can think critically, move fast, and take ownership of legal processes, not just review documents.



If you are not comfortable working with contracts, liens, disputes, and real-world legal risk, this role is not for you.



Also, this role provides legal support and documentation assistance only and does not constitute U.S. legal representation.





Role Overview



You will serve as our primary legal support for contract review, lien-related documentation, dispute preparation, and risk management. Your work will directly impact project timelines, cash flow, and legal positioning.



Key Responsibilities



* Draft, review, and revise:

* Client contracts

* Subcontractor agreements

* Change orders and addendum

* Prepare and review:

* Lien documents & sworn statements

* Notices, demand letters, and formal communications

* Advise on:

  * Contract risks and legal exposure

  * Payment disputes and enforcement strategies

* Support legal positioning for potential disputes or litigation

* Ensure documentation is accurate, consistent, and defensible



Must-Have Qualifications



* Licensed Lawyer (Philippines required; U.S. exposure is a strong advantage)

* Strong experience in:

  * Contract drafting and review

  * Legal documentation and formal correspondence

* Excellent written English (this is critical)

* Ability to analyze details and spot inconsistencies quickly

* Comfortable working in a fast-paced, execution-driven environment



Highly Preferred



* Experience with construction law, liens, or real estate

* Familiarity with U.S. contracts and legal processes

* Experience supporting disputes or claims preparation



???? Application Instructions (Required)



To be considered, include ALL of the following:



1. Brief introduction (max 5 sentences)

2. Describe your experience with contracts and legal documents

3. Answer this scenario:



> A contractor wants to claim the full contract amount, but only 70% of the work is completed. What should be reflected in a sworn statement and why?



4. Attach 1–2 sample documents (contracts, notices, or similar work)



Subject Line: Corporate Lawyer – [Your Name]



What We’re Looking For



* Someone who thinks, not just follows

* Detail-oriented and accountable

* Able to move quickly without sacrificing accuracy

* Communicates clearly and professionally



We value people who take ownership and contribute beyond basic tasks.

title: Social Media Strategist
description:
We are hiring a new Social Media Strategist for our Agency and you will help us to create viral Reels and manage the accounts of our clients to grow them to higher numbers and scale our agency. We 4x our revenue last month and with this foundation we want to scale even higher now, so we need an experienced Social Media Marketing Strategist to maintain the quality for our clients. If you already have experience with Social Media (Short Form Content on Instagram Reels), you are creative, know how to create video concepts that go viral and how to analyse viral videos, this job is perfect for you.



Why you should work with us:



- You start with established personal brands - The client(s) you will work with, have proven concepts, so you can build on a solid foundation and use the style of their existing videos to develop even better concepts.

- AI Implementation - AI is becoming more and more relevant and we are already using AI for many different areas, especially for content (picture/video) creation, so you are up to date with AI for social media while other companies don’t use AI at all. So you are 3 steps ahead.

- Different projects - Step by step you will work with different accounts / clients so you can be creative in different areas.

- Long Term partnership - We are only looking for long term employees, so you will work with us for a long time and have a stable income with a growing agency.

- Established Agency - Our agency is active since 2022, so we gained a lot of experience in all fields of social media, so you will learn from our experience which will help you to improve your social media skills.

- Clear guides and onboarding - You will clear instructions on how to do you work in a detailed onboarding and training. Combined with your own knowledge we will make sure to have the best results.



Your specific task:



You have 3 daily main tasks to focus on, besides that you will get more different tasks over the time when we see that you’re doing a great job:



1. Market Research - You go through the market and find viral Reels / Trends from other creators that have potential to go viral for our clients

2. Concept Creation - Based on your research you create the specific video concepts that our content team / clients should create.

3. Analyse our videos - Not only looking for new concepts is important but also analysing our own accounts and videos, finding winning patterns and implementing these information in the concept creation.



Other potential tasks in the future that give you more responsibility:



- Team Management - We have a big team for reposting content, where we need support with employee onboarding, technical setups and video creation

- More clients - Depending on your workload you will work with more of our clients and help with more different concepts

- Implementing complete new ideas - Your main task is to improve our current system but we always have new ideas, new concepts and new strategies that we need to implement and test with our existing systems.



What we expect and need from you:



- Experience with Social Media / Short Form video creation. Not only uploading simple posts for companies but actual experience and skills in video conception for content that goes viral and analysing viral videos.

- Experience in the Online Marketing Space. This is not a beginner job and you should know how social media is used in the business world.

- 7 Days / week. This is a well paid job, so we are looking for a high performing employee.

- Fluent English (speaking & writing) since our clients are mainly from USA.



Salary and Perspective:



Since we are looking for the best employee for this job, we start with a salary of $800 per month. In the future there is a chance for more if you do a good job and you help us to reach our company goals. Depending on your skills and results you can get more responsibility and more projects.



If you’re looking for a long term job, then message me here with the code word “smms” in your application :)

title: URGENT TODAY: YouTube Video Editor — 12 Min Talking Head Video — Rush Pay
description:
What I need

I have a finished 12-minute talking head video that I need edited and delivered TODAY. I am paying a premium for speed. If the work is good and you hit the deadline, I have 4 more videos ready to go and plan to publish weekly. This one video is a paid tryout for ongoing work.



What I will send you (within 1 hour of hiring)



Raw talking head footage (1080p, one camera angle)

A full script with notes in [brackets] marking exactly where to put every B-roll clip, on-screen graphic, music change, and screen recording

Screen recordings of financial dashboards to insert at marked points

Login to my Storyblocks account (stock footage — I give you the search terms)

Login to my Epidemic Sound account (background music — I tell you the mood)

Thumbnail direction (layout and text)



What you will deliver



Rough cut sent to me for review (within 8 hours of receiving footage)

Final video after one round of my notes (same day)

One thumbnail based on my direction

YouTube-optimized export (1080p, high bitrate) uploaded to my Google Drive



What the edit includes



Remove bad takes, pauses, and filler words

Audio cleanup (background noise removal, consistent voice level)

Light color correction (clean and natural)

One background music track with volume shifts at points I mark in the script. Music very low, about 10-15% of voice volume. No lyrics. Documentary feel.

Stock B-roll inserted at points I mark. Clips are 2-4 seconds each, never longer. I give you the search terms.

On-screen text and graphics at points I mark. These are simple:



Text that appears one line at a time

Side-by-side number comparisons (like "$6 product" vs "$18 shipping")

Clean white text on a dark bar or semi-transparent background

No fancy motion graphics or animations





My screen recordings dropped in at marked points

Clean captions/subtitles on the full video (white text, dark outline, no bouncing)



Style rules



No flashy transitions. Simple cuts only.

No zoom effects or sound effects.

If I am talking on camera for more than 30 seconds, insert a visual break.

The feel is: clean, calm, professional. Not hype. Not guru. Not corporate. Like a smart person explaining something important at a whiteboard.



Software you need



DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut Pro

Canva or Photoshop (for the thumbnail)

Stable internet to download and upload large video files quickly



To apply — I am hiring within 1-3 hours



Send me a link to ONE long-form YouTube video you edited (10+ minutes, talking head with B-roll)

Confirm you can start within the next 3 hours and deliver a first cut within 8 hours

Tell me which editing software you use

Tell me your rate for this single rush video



I will pick someone fast. If you can do the work and you are available right now, apply immediately.

If this goes well, we will agree on a regular monthly rate for ongoing weekly videos. I am looking for one editor to grow with this channel long term.

title: Outbound Call Person - Prepare Clients
description:
We are a luxury fine art portrait photography studio in the United 

States (Michael Anthony Studios) looking for a warm, professional 

remote Client Concierge to join our team.



This is an ongoing part-time role with consistent hours. You will 

be the voice of the studio between the time a client books their 

portrait session and the day they arrive. Your job is to make sure 

every client feels prepared, excited, and confident walking through 

our doors.



This is not a sales role. It is a client experience role. You will 

be calling confirmed appointment clients to walk them through what 

to expect, answer any questions they have, and ensure they are 

fully prepared for their session day.



Responsibilities include:



- Making outbound calls to clients who have already booked their 

  portrait session

- Walking clients through what to expect on their session day — 

  wardrobe, timing, what to bring, and how the experience works

- Answering questions about the studio, the session, and the 

  same-day ordering appointment

- Confirming appointment details and reducing no-shows

- Sending follow-up SMS or
 reminders as needed

- Logging call notes and updating client records in our CRM

- Flagging any special requests or concerns to the studio team



Requirements:



- Excellent spoken English — clear, warm, and professional 

  (this is required and non-negotiable for this role)

- A naturally friendly and reassuring phone presence

- Comfortable making outbound calls and holding a genuine 

  conversation

- Organized and detail-oriented — you will be managing multiple 

  clients and appointments at once

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet call environment

- Familiarity with CRM tools or willingness to learn

- Consistent availability during assigned shift hours

title: Shopify Product lister
description:
We are looking for a dedicated and detail-oriented Shopify Product Lister to join our growing e-commerce team. Your main responsibility will be to upload, manage, and optimize product listings to ensure our store looks clean, professional, and high-converting at all times.



You will be responsible for importing products into Shopify (manually or using tools like Poky), writing and editing product titles, descriptions, and ensuring all information is clear, accurate, and appealing to customers. You will also set up product variants (sizes, colors), pricing, and make sure everything is structured correctly within the store.



A big part of this role is maintaining quality and consistency. This means removing any supplier names, other store references, or unnecessary information from product descriptions. Every product page should match our brand style and feel like a premium boutique.



We expect you to work efficiently and consistently. The target is to list at least 3 (going to 5) high-quality products per day. Accuracy is more important than speed, but you should be able to maintain a steady workflow.



Requirements:



Experience with Shopify (required)

Experience with product importing tools like Poky (required)

Strong attention to detail

Good English writing skills

Ability to follow instructions and maintain consistency

Reliable and able to work independently



This is a long-term opportunity with flexible working hours. If you perform well, there is potential to grow within the business.



If you read it all carefully, begin the chat with "MANGO"

title: UGC Video Editor
description:
Join Our Team as a Short-Form Content Editor (UGC Ad Specialist)

We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for A-players who know how to source content and turn it into high-performing Meta ads at lightning speed.



We are a rapidly scaling brand that thrives on powerful creative. Your job is simple: find the content, cut the videos, and get them ready to launch. No hook writing, no brainstorming—just speed and execution.



What You’ll Do:

Source Content: Gather raw UGC and creator videos across TikTok, Instagram, and other platforms.



Fast-Paced Editing: Cut and assemble that footage into ready-to-launch ads for Meta.



Volume Output: Deliver high-quality edits quickly and efficiently.



Platform Optimization: Add captions and ensure the pacing is perfect for social media.



What We’re Looking For:

Speed: You are fast in your editing software and even faster at finding content.



Efficiency: You can handle a high volume of footage without slowing down.



The "Social" Eye: You know exactly what kind of creator content looks like a winning ad.



Reliability: You hit deadlines and deliver clean, final files every time.



Why Work With Us:

Pure Execution: Focus 100% on the output—no copywriting or creative strategy required.



High-Growth Environment: Be part of a team where your speed directly impacts our scaling.



100% Remote: Work from anywhere.



If you’re a fast editor who knows how to hunt for content and turn it into clean, winning ads, we want you on our team!

title: Graphic Designer for High-Converting Ads (Dropshipping - E-commerce)
description:
We are a performance-driven European e-commerce company running ads across EU markets (Sweden, Norway, Germany, etc.). 



We focus on direct response ads (not branding).



We are looking for a graphic designer who understands ONE thing:

- ads must SELL, not look pretty



YOUR JOB:



• Recreate winning ad creatives (based on references)

• Create simple, high-converting static ads

• Follow clear creative direction (angles, hooks)

• Work fast and deliver consistently



THIS IS NOT A ROLE FOR:



• Branding designers

• Social media content creators

• Designers who want full creative freedom



WHAT WE EXPECT:



• You can closely replicate ad styles (based on references)

• You focus on clarity and readability (not complex design)

• You follow instructions precisely

• You can deliver fast



IMPORTANT:



We care about performance, not beauty.



Simple ads that convert > beautiful ads that don’t.



HIRING PROCESS:



Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a test task before hiring.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



HOW TO APPLY:

Send:

• 3–5 ad creatives you created

• Short intro



AND answer this:



“Which ad style converts better – simple or complex? And why?”



Subject:

“Ad Designer – [Your Name]”



We are building a high-performance team.



If you want to work on ads that actually generate revenue, apply.

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist + Media Buyer (Dropshipping E-commerce)
description:
We are a performance-driven European e-commerce company operating across multiple EU markets (Germany, Norway, Sweden, and others) using other ecommerce model at EU.



Our focus is health & beauty products in direct response funnels.



We are NOT a branding company (later will be moving to that part).

We test aggressively, scale fast, and  focus only on results.



WHAT YOU WILL ACTUALLY DO:



• Analyze winning ad creatives and identify WHY they work

• Create clear, actionable creative briefs (angles, hooks, structure)

• Work directly with graphic designers (you must guide them precisely)

• Work directly with funnel builders (you must guide them precisely)

• Launch and manage Meta campaigns (testing ? scaling ? killing)

• Optimize based on CTR, CPC, CPA (not opinions)

• Take a product from testing phase to scaling phase

• Daily testing products at different markets - and preparing them from the scratch



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:



• You can take a product from 0 ? €150k+/month

• You consistently find and scale winning creatives
