title: Authorizations Coordinator (Pediatric Therapy) — Philippines | Remote | Full-Time
description:
About the Role: We’re hiring an experienced Authorizations Coordinator to manage all new and ongoing authorizations for a pediatric therapy medical practice serving families with young children. This role is critical to keeping therapy services uninterrupted by ensuring authorizations are obtained correctly, tracked accurately, renewed on time, and communicated clearly across scheduling, intake, clinicians, and billing.



The ideal candidate has direct experience with therapy authorizations (OT/PT/ST; ABA is a plus), understands payer requirements and common pitfalls, and is highly organized with strong follow-through. You’ll own the authorization workflow end-to-end and help build a scalable system as volume grows.



Key Responsibilities



Authorization Management (Primary Focus)

 • Obtain and manage authorizations for new therapy evaluations and ongoing therapy visits (OT/PT/ST; ABA a plus).

 • Verify authorization requirements by payer and plan; submit complete authorization requests with required documentation.

 • Track authorizations by patient, discipline, CPT codes, visit limits/units, date ranges, and frequency.

 • Monitor utilization and proactively request extensions/renewals before visits run out.

 • Prevent service interruptions by coordinating authorization status with scheduling and clinical teams.



Documentation & Submission

 • Request and compile required documentation (prescriptions/referrals, eval reports, plan of care, progress notes, standardized testing results, etc.).

 • Submit authorizations via payer portals, phone, fax, or other payer-required methods; maintain organized confirmation records.

 • Ensure requests are accurate (provider info, NPI, diagnosis codes, CPT codes, modifiers, frequency/duration, start dates).



Follow-Up & Resolution

 • Follow up on pending requests; escalate as needed to avoid delays.

 • Resolve issues such as missing documentation, incorrect member info, authorization denials, partial approvals, and mismatched CPT codes.

 • Document payer communications thoroughly and maintain a clear audit trail.



Cross-Team Coordination

 • Communicate authorization approvals/updates to scheduling and billing promptly.

 • Partner with intake to ensure benefits/eligibility details align with authorization requirements.

 • Support clinicians by guiding what documentation is needed to support medical necessity for renewals.



Reporting & Process Improvement

 • Maintain weekly authorization dashboards: pending, approved, expiring soon, denials, turnaround times.

 • Identify payer-specific trends and bottlenecks; recommend improvements to workflows and templates.

 • Build and maintain SOPs/checklists to ensure consistent, scalable execution.



Required Experience & Skills

 • 2+ years experience managing therapy authorizations in a pediatric therapy setting (OT/PT/ST required; ABA a plus).

 • Strong understanding of authorization concepts: visit limits/units, date ranges, medical necessity, renewals, and payer workflows.

 • Experience using payer portals and managing documentation requirements.

 • Highly organized with excellent tracking skills (spreadsheets/work queues) and strong attention to detail.

 • Strong written and verbal English for payer communications and internal updates.

 • Comfortable working independently and managing high volume with deadlines.



Nice to Have

 • Experience with EMR systems commonly used in therapy practices (experience with Ensora / Fusion Web Clinic is a plus).

 • Familiarity with typical therapy CPT codes and how they relate to authorizations (without needing constant supervision).

 • Experience coordinating referrals/prescriptions and handling school/regional programs (if applicable).

 • Experience building SOPs and training others.



What Success Looks Like (First 60–90 Days)

 • Clean, reliable authorization tracking system in place with clear status visibility.

 • Fewer canceled visits due to missing/expired authorizations.

 • Renewals submitted early and consistently, with strong documentation support.

 • Clear communication rhythm with scheduling/clinical/billing teams.

 • Payer turnaround times improve through consistent follow-up and escalation.



Work Setup & Compensation

 • Remote (Philippines-based)

 • Full-time with overlapping hours for collaboration

 • Competitive pay based on experience



How to Apply



Please submit:

 1. Resume/CV

 2. A short cover letter describing your experience with pediatric therapy authorizations (OT/PT/ST)

 3. A brief list of payer portals/workflows you’ve used (generic is fine)

 4. (Optional) A sample of how you track authorizations (template screenshot with private info removed)

s within 4 hours, 7 days a week

 address in your application. This is how we will contact you if you are selected — applications without contact details will not be followed up on.

title: U.S. Real Estate Title & Escrow Coordinator (Experienced Only)
description:
Description:



We are a U.S.-based land investment company looking for a highly experienced Title & Escrow Coordinator to manage transactions from contract to closing.



This is not an entry-level VA role. You must already understand U.S. real estate title, escrow, and closing processes.



Responsibilities:



Draft and review real estate documents (deeds, corrective deeds, affidavits, etc.) from templates

Review title commitments and identify issues (liens, easements, exceptions)

Open and manage escrows with title companies and attorneys

Coordinate with buyers, sellers, and third parties to ensure smooth closings

Proactively follow up and keep transactions moving to close on time

Assist in resolving title issues or sourcing the right professionals when needed

Maintain accurate tracking of all deals and timelines



Requirements (do not apply unless you meet these):



Direct experience with U.S. title, escrow, or real estate closings

Ability to read and understand title commitments without training

Experience working with title companies, attorneys, or mortgage/closing teams

Strong organizational and follow-up skills (you don’t let things fall through the cracks)

Excellent written and spoken English

Detail-oriented and highly reliable



Preferred:



Experience with land transactions or investor-driven deals

Background in title company, escrow, or mortgage processing



Compensation:

We pay above market for the right person. This is a long-term role with growth potential.



To Apply (required):

Answer the following clearly and concisely:



1) Describe your direct experience with U.S. title and escrow work

2) Walk through how you review a title commitment and what you look for

3) Give an example of a title issue you encountered and how it was resolved

4) What is the difference between a warranty deed and a quitclaim deed?



Applications that do not answer these questions will not be considered.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller (Manual Dialing - High Performance Role)
description:
We’re a U.S. based real estate investment company looking for a high-performing cold caller to join our team.

Compensation:

[X] Unlimited PTO and promotion opportunities

Top performers make significantly more through bonuses.



TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):

[X] Start your application with the word: BlueSky

[X] Record a 1–2 minute Loom video reading the first 3 lines of this script and briefly explain how you would handle a seller who says “just send me an offer.

[X] Include a screenshot of your internet speed test: https://speedtest.net



THE SCRIPT:

Hi Johnny! (Said as if you’re great friends. Pause.) It’s [AGENT NAME]. Probably caught you at a bad time?



I don’t know if you can help me, we’ve been trying to reach the owner of a property over on {address}. (Don’t mention the street number and use a lost puppy inflection).



I’m calling you because we’re looking to buy a property in that area. You probably wouldn’t consider an offer on that one, right?

title: Performance Marketing Manager
description:
PropZap — We’re Building a Dream Team to Shape the Future of Real Estate in North America.



We are not building just another brokerage.



We are building a scalable real estate platform designed to modernize how homes are bought and sold — through systems, technology, disciplined execution, and long-term vision.



Our ambition is not incremental growth.

It is structured, North American scale.



And we are intentionally building a high-caliber team aligned with that mission.



If you are driven by measurable impact.

If you believe performance marketing should compound over time.

If you want to build infrastructure, not just campaigns.



We want you to take the helm of our growth engine.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Performance Marketing Manager

Location: Remote

Shift: Aligned with Canada MST

Role Type: Any

Compensation: TBD

Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



This is a revenue-accountable growth leadership role.



You are directly responsible for building and scaling the paid acquisition engine that fuels expansion.



You will not simply execute instructions.



You will lead marketing performance strategy.



Your performance will be measured by qualified lead volume, conversion efficiency, disciplined optimization, and the strength of the systems you build.



You are expected to be the internal expert for marketing matters — the person leadership turns to for strategic insight, innovative ideas, and informed recommendations.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities:



Meta Ads Leadership (Most Critical)

• Manage and scale large-budget Meta Ads campaigns

• Architect structured campaign systems designed for scale

• Plan ad angles, hooks, positioning, and creative strategy

• Write high-converting direct-response copy

• Produce graphic and video ad creatives (for ads)

• Execute disciplined A/B testing frameworks

• Optimize based on cost per qualified lead and full-funnel data



You must have proven, hands-on experience managing significant ad budgets.



Landing Page Optimization (Squarespace)

• Optimize and improve our existing landing page (
)

• Increase conversion rates through structured experimentation

• Refine messaging clarity and CTA effectiveness

• Improve user journey and reduce friction

• Ensure advanced tracking accuracy



Future scope may include additional landing pages and funnel expansion as we scale.



 Marketing & Lead Management (HubSpot)

• Build and optimize structured
 nurture systems

• Segment and organize both new and existing leads

• Implement disciplined tagging and CRM organization

• Improve engagement and conversion rates

• Maintain clean, scalable list architecture

• Ensure seamless handoff of qualified leads



Analytics, Tracking & Attribution

• Implement advanced tracking systems (Pixel, CAPI, UTM strategy)

• Maintain CRM attribution clarity from click to handoff

• Analyze full-funnel performance, not surface metrics

• Identify bottlenecks and propose structured improvements

• Document A/B tests and build repeatable optimization frameworks



Marketing Leadership & Innovation

• Proactively propose innovative growth strategies

• Stay current with emerging trends, tools, platforms, and advertising strategies

• Evaluate new opportunities and recommend adoption when appropriate

• Serve as the internal authority on paid growth and performance marketing

• Guide leadership decisions with data and informed insight



You are not just executing campaigns.



You are setting direction.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who You Are:



You are driven by growth, ownership, and long-term impact.

• Proven, hands-on experience managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Deep understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology

• Ability to independently plan creative angles and performance strategy

• Strong copywriting and positioning skills

• Comfortable producing ad creatives when required

• Strong analytical thinking and disciplined testing mindset

• Structured in documentation and optimization

• Accountable for measurable outcomes

• Continuously learning and staying ahead of platform changes and trends



Highly Ideal:

• Real estate marketing experience

• Experience promoting brokerages to attract agents

• Experience generating buyer and seller leads

• Understanding how to position real estate services competitively



Requirements:

• Demonstrated success managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Strong landing page optimization experience

• Advanced analytics and tracking knowledge

• Experience using HubSpot for segmentation and
 marketing

• Experience implementing structured A/B testing systems

• Reliable remote setup



Bonus If You Have:

• SEO experience

• Google Ads experience

• AI tools and automation knowledge

• Zapier or workflow automation experience

• Advanced CRM tagging and list organization skills



--------------------------------------------------------------



What We Offer:

• A long-term opportunity inside a scaling North American proptech platform

• Direct collaboration with founders

• Meaningful ownership of paid acquisition performance

• The opportunity to architect and refine the company’s growth engine

• Clear path toward future Head of Marketing

• Real influence on continental expansion



We are building a team designed to scale.



The platform is expanding.

The systems are strengthening.

The ambition is long-term.



We are looking for someone who sees themselves not just as a marketing manager — but as the growth leader who helps steer the direction of a North American real estate platform.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume (required)

• Portfolio (required)

• Case studies or performance summaries of Meta campaigns (required)

• Summary of budgets managed (required)

• Intro video (preferred)

• Expected monthly compensation (required)

• Any DISC test result (if available)



Subject Line: Performance Marketing Manager – Your Name



NOTE: Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in disqualification. Attention to detail matters, and the application process reflects the level of discipline we value.



If you are ready to take the helm of our growth engine and help build the future of real estate in North America, we want to hear from you.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist
description:
*Senior PPC Manager*



About Us

We are Matt & Markus - Two experienced Online Marketing Experts with a combined 20+ years of PPC experience. We specialize in running high performing Google Ads campaigns. Additionally, we support clients with in depth data analysis and conversion optimization. 



We have been working independently as freelancers for many years and teamed up to build and grow our Google Ads agency in 2025. The agency is growing and with that growth we are building a strong team to be part of the journey.



About the Role

We are a growing performance marketing agency focused on delivering data-driven PPC campaigns for international clients. Our main expertise lies within Google Ads.

We are looking for a Senior PPC Manager with several (4+) years of experience with Google Ads to take ownership of our PPC accounts, drive growth, and operate with a high level of independence.

You will work closely with the founders while also owning execution, strategy, and performance across accounts.



Key Responsibilities

- Account Ownership & Performance

- Manage PPC accounts end-to-end across Google Ads (Search, Performance Max, Display, YouTube)

- Take full ownership of results (scaling volume, improving performance, driving growth)

- Identify and act on opportunities without needing constant direction

- Scaling & Strategy

- Scale campaigns efficiently while maintaining performance targets

- Allocate budgets based on performance trends and growth opportunities

- Build and refine account structures to support long-term scaling

- Data, Tracking & Insights



Work confidently with:

- GA4 (setup, analysis, debugging)

- Google Tag Manager (tracking setup, event tracking)

- Offline Conversion Tracking (OCT)

- Looker Studio dashboards (build and interpret)

- Turn data into clear, actionable insights that drive decisions



Testing & Optimisation

- Run structured testing plans (ads, bidding strategies, landing pages)

- Continuously improve CVR, CTR, and overall account efficiency

- Identify performance issues early and resolve them proactively



Client Communication

- Communicate directly with clients in a clear and confident manner

- Present performance updates and explain strategy in simple terms

- Build trust through ownership and results



Mentorship

- Support and mentor junior tea
mbers when needed

- Share knowledge and best practices to improve team performance



What We’re Looking For



Experience

- 4+ years hands-on PPC experience (primarily Google Ads)

- Agency or client-side experience required

- Proven ability to scale campaigns and drive growth

- Experience managing multiple accounts independently



Technical Skills

- Strong expertise in Google Ads.

- Solid understanding of:

- GA4 + GTM

- Conversion tracking and attribution

- Offline conversions

- Looker Studio



Mindset

- Highly proactive and accountable

- Strong problem solver who figures things out independently

- Commercially aware (focus on business outcomes, not just metrics)

- Comfortable making decisions without constant guidance



Important (Read Carefully)



We value:

- Ownership (and being able to take responsibility for wins and mistakes)

- Critical thinking (and being able to say “I see it different”)

- Clear communication when something is unclear (and being able to say “I don’t know”)

- Someone who enjoys life and is generally positive and can laugh while delivering high quality work



We are not looking for someone who:

- Relies heavily on AI tools without understanding the work

- Says they understand but does not ask questions when unsure





Working Setup

- Remote (Philippines-based)

- Results are more important than a work schedule

- Small, high-performance team

- Focus on results, not micromanagement



Salary

Based on experience



What Success Looks Like

- Accounts are scaling in volume and revenue

- Performance opportunities are identified and acted on proactively

- Minimal hand-holding required



How to Apply



Please include:

- Your CV

- Written Summary of your PPC experience and where you see your personal strength

- Examples of accounts you’ve scaled (include results)

- Tools and platforms you’ve used

- Any other online marketing experience



We are looking forward to receive your application and to get to know you.



Best wishes,

Markus and Matt

title: Reddit Operations Manager
description:
Reddit Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote)



We’re hiring a Reddit Operations Manager to take full ownership of our Reddit growth engine.



This is a leadership role. You will run the operation, manage the team, and be directly responsible for performance. If you’re not comfortable owning results, this role isn’t for you.



What You’ll Do



* Lead and manage a team of Reddit VAs and account farmers

* Oversee daily Reddit operations across multiple accounts

* Ensure accounts are properly built, maintained, and scaled

* Replace banned accounts immediately and maintain continuity

* Create and optimize posting strategies and content plans

* Analyze performance daily and continuously improve results

* Run A/B tests to increase engagement and conversions

* Research new subreddits, trends, and growth opportunities

* Prepare weekly reports and strategic recommendations for the CEO

* Create structured content request plans for weekly approval

* Monitor team productivity using tracking software (Insightful)

* Enforce accountability, efficiency, and output across the team





What We’re Looking For



* Proven, hands-on Reddit experience (non-negotiable)

* Strong understanding of account growth, behavior, and ban avoidance

* Ability to manage people and maintain high standards

* Analytical, data-driven thinker

* Proactive, disciplined, and execution-focused

* Comfortable making decisions and taking ownership





Compensation



* Fixed base (paid biweekly)

* Performance-based bonus (biweekly)

* Your income scales directly with the results you deliver



Important



This role requires daily involvement, attention to detail, and constant optimization. Performance is reviewed weekly.

How to Apply

title: Claude Code and OpenClaw Teacher - Can turn into full time - i have a business businesses i run that always need staff

• Claude Code – advanced agentic workflows, prompt engineering, CI/CD integration, best practices at scale

• OpenClaw – deep configuration, advanced automation, security hardening, real-world deployments

• GitHub – branching strategies, pull requests, Actions, version control best practices

• Automation tools – n8n, Zapier, Make, shell scripting, or similar (the more the better)



What I'm looking for:

• Able to move fast, go deep, and push me beyond the basics

title: Client Specialist Legal Assistant
description:
Client Specialist Legal Assistant

Our law office is looking for a full-time Client Specialist for a busy law practice. The Client Specialist is the first point of contact for our office and  will focus exclusively on landlord-tenant matters. The primary role of this position includes the following:



1. Answering office phones, scheduling client phone calls with attorney and paralegal, and talking with potential clients to qualify them for legal service offerings, and scheduling phone calls with legal staff. Summarize voi
s and routing messages to staff members on the team. 



2. Qualifying potential clients (landlords, property managers, owners of property) for eviction and legal advice over the phone, reviewing online intake submissions and on social media.



3. Presenting and explaining Legal Service Offerings over the phone with potential clients that we can assist.  



4. Following up with Potential clients on online platforms such as TikTok,
 and YouTube 



5. Assist attorney and paralegal by reviewing client intakes for completeness of questions, verifying and clarifying discrepancies in information submitted by clients, and following up with clients for information needed to process client cases.



6. Save and organize client photos, videos, and documents in client case files. 



7. Follow up with our legal partners (process servers, Superior Courts, Sheriff Departments, etc.) for documents and information they need to complete. 





8. Assist attorney and paralegal staff by e-filing court pleadings and documents with Superior Courts that our office practices in. 



9. Send client billings and invoices, and assist attorney and paralegal with collecting client payments, making deposits, and entering deposit transactions into client ledgers or trust accounts.



10. Manage automated client updates and reminders (via Active Campaign). 



Skills and Position Requirements:

• Confidence communicating in  perfect English over the phone and in writing (not negotiable). You will be the first point person of contact on the phone during business hours (Monday through Friday 9:00 a.m.?5:00 p.m. (Pacific Time).  

• Pride in work

• Ability to show up for work on time and ready to work as agreed

• Ability to work as a team in a virtual environment

• Ability to follow directions and attention to detail (a must)

• Ability to maintain attorney-client confidentiality with case matters

• Reliable personal high-speed Internet and your own computer 

• Basic understanding or a willingness to learn within 30 days landlord-tenant terminology such as landlord, tenant, plaintiff, defendant, lease/rental agreement, monthly rent, month-to-month rental agreement, one-year lease, and the basic steps of an eviction 

• Ability to work with formatting of legal documents in Microsoft Word and Adobe Acrobat



Our firm is looking for a person who can be part of our growing legal team to provide the best legal services possible. No legal or law firm experience is necessary.  Major plus if you have experience working in a US Base Landlord-Tenant Law Firm, Have Sales Experience, and/or confidently speak perfect English.  We will train the right person. It is important that you can talk confidently on the phone in perfect English, take pride in your work, and have great attention to detail. 

Instructions on how to apply for this position: 



To be considered for this position, please
  
 and follow these instructions



1. In your
’s subject line, please type in all caps “ACE ATTORNEY SALES.” 



2. MANDATORY TO BE CONSIDERED: To be considered for the position we need you to record a video and answer the following questions down below. In the video, record yourself answering in English the following questions. The purpose of the video is to evaluate your English and presentation skills. Please provide the link to your video in your
 to 
   



3. If you wish to send a resume, please attached it as a PDF to your
 submission 



Questions to answer in your Video submission: 



Question 1. Have you worked for a lawyer, law firm, or legal department, or performed work that requires attention to detail? If yes please explain? 



Question 2: This position is anticipated to be a 40 hour work week position that will require you to have high-speed Internet and a work station with at least two monitors. Working hours will be Monday-Friday from 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. Pacific Time. Would this type of work situation be ideal for you? 



Question 3. Have you worked as a virtual assistant and/or performed work remotely? Do you have experience explaining legal service offerings to potential clients? If so, please describe your experience. 



Question 4. Is there anything else you would like us to know about you?

title: Video Editor (VSL + Short-Form Ads)
description:
Contract | Remote | $30-35 per video | Growth + Bonus Opportunities



We’re looking for a skilled and reliable video editor to join our remote creative team and help us produce high-performing direct-response VSLs that blend storytelling, smart pacing, and scroll-stopping visuals.



These are 1–2-minute videos combining AI voiceovers, real-world footage, and TikTok-style B-roll to deliver emotional, authentic stories that convert.



You’ll be provided with everything you need — script, voiceover, direction, and examples — your job is to bring it to life through pacing, visuals, and clean editing.



???? What You’ll Be Doing



Editing up to 6 VSLs per week (bonus pay available for extra volume)



Using CapCut for editing (or similar tools)



Matching visuals, pacing, and music to scripted AI voiceovers



Pulling B-roll from Canva Pro, stock footage, or TikTok-style clips



Delivering emotional, polished, and conversion-focused edits



???? What We Provide



Fully written scripts + recorded voiceovers



Brand assets and creative direction



Reference videos + editing tutorials



Organized folders for each project



Friendly, responsive feedback — we love editors who want to grow



???? Pay & Bonuses



$30-35 per video, depending on skill and experience



Bonus pay for taking on additional projects (up to 15 total)



Room to grow into long-term creative roles (direction, scripting, ideation, etc.)



???? What We’re Looking For



Strong skills in CapCut, Canva Pro, and TikTok-style editing



Fast turnaround and clean file delivery



Attention to detail — syncing visuals to emotion and script



Marketing instincts — you understand story, pacing, and engagement



Ability to follow brand direction and take feedback well



Bonus: experience editing UGC, eCommerce, or VSLs



???? Why Work With Us



We’re a fast-moving team building digital brands rooted in storytelling, quality, and performance. We value creativity, communication, and consistency — and we reward editors who bring passion and precision to their work.

We believe in fair pay, clear expectations, and long-term growth for people who deliver and want to keep improving.



If you want to join a small but driven team where your creative input truly matters, we’d love to hear from you.



???? To Apply



Please send:



A short intro message



Your portfolio (VSLs, TikTok-style edits, UGC welcome)



Your rate per video



How many videos per week you’re comfortable starting with



Looking forward to working with you.

 You’ll be taking existing content (photos/videos) and turning it into posts and ads using simple systems.

title: v\High-Ticket Appointment Setter (DM + Phone) – Credit & Business Funding. OTE $20k - $27k annually
description:
High-Ticket Appointment Setter (DM + Phone) – Credit & Business Funding



We are a fast-growing funding company helping professionals secure $50K–$250K+ in business funding.



We are looking for a serious appointment setter who can handle both:



• Instagram / DM conversations

• SMS follow-ups

• Outbound & inbound phone calls



This is not a beginner role.

You must have experience setting for high-ticket offers ($3K–$10K+).



?

Pay structure





• $1,500 program

• $7/hr base (40 hrs)

• $20 per showed qualified set

• $30 per closed set

• Revenue bonus

• Show rate bonus

?



Mission For Infinite Funding Enrollment Specialist



Option #1 - $1,500



To drive $270,000+ in new business revenue annually by generating conversations with NEW potential clients (lead generation) and recouping and re-setting leads who didn’t initially close (follow-up).



?



Outcomes / KPIs



22,500 in NEW business revenue monthly (minimum).

15 closed sets of our Funding 
 price point.

Generate 60–80 calls per month (approx 3–5 per day) through DM inbound & outbound calls, Skool group marketing methods.

25% minimum “live call” closing ratio.

70% minimum show rate (80% target).

Daily execution of team & administrative tasks.

Morning Huddles via Zoom, 9am Monday – Friday.

End of Day report.

Update projections, tracking sheets, and CRM daily.



?



Compensation



Base



$7 per hour × 40 hours per week = $1,120 per month



?



Commission



$20 per showed qualified set

$30 per closed set



?



Revenue Bonus



$500 bonus at $20,000 cash collected

$1,000 bonus at $30,000 cash collected



?



Show Rate Bonus



$500 monthly bonus if show rate reaches 80%+



Conditions:

Minimum 60 booked calls in the month

Must meet qualification scorecard standards



?



Expected Earnings (Baseline – 25% Close Rate)



60 booked calls

70% show rate = 42 showed calls

25% close rate = 11 closed sets



Revenue Generated:

11 × $1,500 = $16,500



Monthly Earnings:



Base = $1,120

42 shows × $20 = $840

11 closes × $30 = $330



Total = $2,290 per month

Annual = $27,480



(No bonus triggered at this level)



?



Strong Performance (30% Close Rate)



60 booked

42 shows

13 closes



Revenue = $19,500



Monthly Earnings:



Base = $1,120

Show = $840

Close = $390



Total = $2,350 per month



?



High Performance (45% Close Rate + 80% Show Rate)



80 booked

80% show rate = 64 shows

45% close rate = 29 closes



Revenue Generated:

29 × $1,500 = $43,500



Monthly Earnings:



Base = $1,120

64 shows × $20 = $1,280

29 closes × $30 = $870

Revenue bonus (30k+) = $1,000

Show rate bonus (80%+) = $500



Total = $4,770 per month

Annual = $57,240



?



Time



This is a full-time, 40 hours per week position.

Flexible schedule, provided you generate 60–80 set calls monthly.

Must be available on Slack 8am–6pm MST daily.

Remote position.





Your Responsibilities



• 100+ outbound touches per day (DM + SMS + Call)

• Qualify leads properly before booking

• Maintain 70%+ show rate

• Log all activity inside GHL (GoHighLevel)

• Follow up relentlessly



You are not just booking calls.

You are protecting our closers’ time by booking qualified prospects only.



?



Minimum Requirements



• 2+ years high-ticket setting experience

• Proven track record of revenue generated

• Experience with financial, credit, or business opportunity offers preferred

• Comfortable discussing income, credit score, and investment capacity

• Fluent English (spoken + written)

• CRM experience (GHL preferred)



?



KPIs



• 3–5 qualified booked calls per day

• 70–80% show rate

• Clean notes and proper pre-frame before closer call



Low-quality bookings will not be tolerated.



?



Compensation



Base hourly + performance bonus:



• Per show bonus

• Per closed deal bonus

• Long-term growth for top performers



Comp will scale with performance.



?



To Apply



Reply with:

1. The highest monthly revenue your sets helped generate

2. Average daily outbound volume

3. Average show rate

4. A short Loom explaining your qualification process

5. Your availability (timezone + hours)



Applications without numbers will not be considered.



?



If you are competitive, disciplined, and serious about performance — apply.



We move fast.

mber

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
We are seeking a skilled Video Editor specializing in short-form content creation and social media retention. Your primary role will be to create engaging and compelling videos for professional speakers that captivate audiences across various web and social media platforms. You should have a solid understanding of graphic animation and rotoscoping techniques.

At SpeakerVideos, simply adding subtitles is not enough, we are looking for editors who go beyond by creatively using graphic animation, B-roll, and rotoscoping to enhance storytelling.



Please share your three best edited videos when applying. Attention to detail and a proactive mindset in approaching both creative challenges and routine tasks are essential.



Key Responsibilities:

? Editing and Assembling Footage: Cut, splice, and edit raw footage into cohesive and engaging short-form videos that align with the project's vision and goals.

? Music Selection and Sound Design: Select appropriate soundtracks and sound effects, and perform audio mixing to enhance the viewer experience. A strong understanding of music is essential.

? Color Grading and Correction: Adjust and enhance color settings to ensure visual consistency and appeal.

? Graphics and Special Effects: Incorporate motion graphics and special effects to enhance storytelling.

? Collaboration: Work closely with directors, producers, and creative teams to ensure a unified vision.

? Timely Delivery: Manage multiple projects, ensuring deadlines are consistently met without compromising quality.

? Quality Control: Review edits thoroughly, incorporate feedback, and make necessary revisions to achieve the desired outcome.

? Industry Awareness: Stay updated on video editing trends, techniques, and software.



Experience Required

? Proven experience as a Video Editor with a strong portfolio showcasing short-form video work.

? Expertise in video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut Pro (PC), Adobe After Effects, or similar tools.

? Strong creative flair with an excellent eye for detail and storytelling.

? Effective teamwork and communication skills, with experience working collaboratively in remote teams.

? Strong time management skills and the ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.

? Adaptability to client feedback and changing project requirements.



How We Will Help You Succeed

? Supportive Environment: A collaborative culture that provides constructive feedback to help you grow and excel.

? Professional Development: Opportunities for training and upskilling in the latest video editing techniques and tools.

? Cutting-Edge Tools: Access to premium editing resources such as Submagic, Envato Elements, and other industry-standard software.

? Regular Feedback: Constructive performance evaluations to support your professional growth.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
ROSE INJECTABLES — Virtual Assistant (Video Editing + Operations)

Part-Time | Remote | Long-Term | Start Immediately



WHO WE ARE

Rose Injectables is a physician-led women’s health and aesthetic boutique in Colorado Springs and Cañon City, CO. 



Founded by Dr. Liz Rose Knies, M.D. — board-certified physician and aesthetics specialist — we are more than a medspa. 



We serve women from 16+ states, hold a 5.0 Google rating with 425+ reviews, and have trained 5,000+ providers nationwide. We are growing fast and need a sharp, reliable VA to grow with us.



OUR 2026 STANDARD: CONSISTENCY. 



We need someone who executes the same high standard perfectly, every time.



THE ROLE — HOW IT GROWS

This is a long-term position that starts with one responsibility and expands as you prove your skills.



PHASE 1 (Start): Video Content Editing

• Edit short-form Instagram Reels from raw 4K iPhone footage per our Brand Playbook

• Use Meta Reels Editor (preferred) or CapCut Pro

• Apply our 5-Part Video Structure with on-screen hook word overlays

• Generate, proofread, and burn in closed captions — brand fonts and colors only

• Write Instagram captions in brand voice with correct hashtags and landing page links

• Submit via Slack and Dropbox — detailed playbook provided

• KPI: 0–1 revisions per video. Bonus affected by 2+ revisions.



PHASE 2 (Added after Phase 1 mastered):
 Management

• Manage Dr. Liz’s
 using our GPS category system (!1Liz ? 8Delete)

• Draft professional responses on behalf of Dr. Liz — correct English required

• Flag critical
s immediately; manage travel and event calendar updates across Zenoti, Cozi, and gmail calendars

• Notify tea
mbers of schedule changes



PHASE 3 (Added after Phase 2 mastered): Outreach & Lead Support

• Follow up with new patient leads via
 and Jotform — warm, professional English

• Support appointment booking via Zenoti

• Assist with 2x/month newsletter production and content calendar maintenance

• Report weekly on leads, consultations, and conversions



REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE

-Excellent written and spoken English — you will write for our brand and communicate with real patients

-Reliable high-speed internet on home computer-not cell phone (include a Speedtest screenshot with your application)

- Full dedication during your Rose Injectables hours — no other clients simultaneously

-Willingness to follow a detailed playbook exactly

- Honest communication — ask before you guess



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Portfolio of short-form video edits (Reels, TikTok, or similar)

• Experience managing an executive’s
 inbox

• Health, wellness, beauty, or medical aesthetic experience a plus

• Familiarity with Meta Business Suite / Instagram best practices



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

Meta Reels Editor, CapCut Pro, Canva, Slack,, Dropbox, Zenoti, Jotform, HeyOrca, Gmail, SCALE CRM 



HOURS & PAY

• Start: 10–15 hours per week, growing to 20+ as phases expand

• Base rate + bonus/commission tied to KPIs

• Rate increases with each phase progression. Pay is bi-monthly. 

• Long-term position — we invest in people who invest in us



HOW TO APPLY



Respond here

Subject: VA Application — [Your Name] — Video Editing

Include:

 1. Resume or work history summary

 2. 2–3 short-form video editing samples (Reels or TikTok)

 3. English writing sample: In 2–3 paragraphs, describe a content or social media project you worked on — the goal, what you did, and the result

 4. Brief video introduction (max 2 minutes): Who you are, why you want to work with a women’s health brand, and what you know about Rose Injectables

 5. Speedtest.net screenshot

 6. Hours available per week and your time zone



Applications without a video sample and writing sample will not be reviewed. 



Shortlisted applicants will receive a paid skills test — a real edit using our brand playbook.

title: Experienced Virtual Assistant with LinkedIn & Social Media Marketing Expertise
description:
Position: Executive Virtual Assistant (Full-Time)



We are seeking an exceptional Virtual Assistant who can be a true partner in managing and growing our business. This is not just another VA position – we need someone sharp, proactive, and capable of handling diverse responsibilities with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

LinkedIn Management & Outreach

Optimize and manage LinkedIn profiles

Create and execute LinkedIn content strategies

Conduct targeted outreach and connection campaigns

Engage with network connections and build professional relationships

Track and analyze LinkedIn metrics and engagement



Social Media Marketing

Develop and implement social media strategies across multiple platforms

Create engaging content calendars and posts

Monitor social media trends and competitor activities

Manage community engagement and responses

Analyze performance metrics and adjust strategies accordingly



Business Management Support

Manage daily schedules and calendar coordination

Handle
 management and correspondence

Coordinate projects and track deadlines

Prepare reports and presentations

Assist with strategic planning and implementation



Educational Content & Training

Develop training materials and resources

Create educational content for internal and external use

Assist with course development or curriculum planning

Research educational trends and best practices

Support learning management systems if needed



Required Qualifications:

Proven LinkedIn expertise with demonstrable results in profile optimization and outreach

3+ years of social media marketing experience with portfolio of successful campaigns

Background in education (teaching, training, curriculum development, or educational administration)

Business management experience with understanding of operations and strategy

Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

Strong organizational skills with ability to juggle multiple priorities



Tech-savvy with proficiency in:

LinkedIn Sales Navigator (preferred)

Social media management tools (Hootsuite, Buffer, etc.)

Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

Project management tools (Asana, Trello, etc.)

Basic graphic design tools (Canva, etc.)



What Makes You Perfect for This Role:

You're a self-starter who anticipates needs before being asked

You have exceptional attention to detail and follow-through

You can work independently while knowing when to ask questions

You're comfortable with ambiguity and can problem-solve creatively

You genuinely enjoy helping others succeed and stay organized

You're looking for a long-term position where you can grow



Working Conditions:

Schedule: Full-time (40 hours/week) with flexible hours

Timezone: Eastern Standard Time

Duration: Long-term position with growth opportunities

Work Setup: Must have reliable internet connection and quiet workspace



Compensation:

Salary: $320-$640 USD per month (based on experience) Paid biweekly

Performance Bonuses: Available after 3 months

Paid Time Off: After 6 months

Professional Development: Support for relevant courses and certifications



How to Apply:

Please submit your application with:

Subject Line: "Sharp VA Ready to Help You Keep It Together - [Your Name]"

Cover Letter addressing:

Your specific experience with LinkedIn outreach and results achieved

Examples of successful social media campaigns you've managed

Your background in education and how it applies to this role

A brief example of how you've helped a previous employer "keep it together"

Resume/CV highlighting relevant experience



Portfolio including:

LinkedIn profile examples or case studies

Social media content samples

Any relevant business or educational materials you've created

2-minute Video Introduction (upload to Google Drive or YouTube as unlisted)

Important Notes:



Generic applications will not be considered

Only applicants who follow all instructions will be interviewed

We're looking for someone who can start within 2 weeks

This is a direct-hire position (no agencies please)

We're excited to find someone who can truly partner with us in growing our business. If you're sharp, organized, and ready to make a real impact, we want to hear from you!



Please note: We value quality over quantity. Take time to craft a thoughtful application that shows us why you're the perfect fit for this role.

Video editing (short-form + occasional long-form)

Content ideation (hooks, angles, trends)

Posting & distribution across platforms

Comment engagement

Repurposing content across Instagram, YouTube Shorts, etc.

Instagram (Reels + posts)

mbers

You content engine

title: Video Editor (Face Blur & Cropping for Content)
description:
We are looking for a reliable video editor to help process a high volume of short videos.



The core task is simple but requires attention to detail:

 • Blur or crop faces so the person is completely unidentifiable

 • Ensure clean, professional output with no loss of quality



This is an ongoing role with consistent work. If you perform well, there will be opportunities to take on more advanced editing and content tasks over time.



Responsibilities

 • Blur or crop faces in videos so identity is fully hidden at all times

 • Track face movement when required (not just static blur)

 • Maintain original video quality (no compression or distortion)

 • Export videos in the correct format and resolution

 • Organize and upload completed files to shared folders



Requirements

 • Experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro, CapCut or similar)

 • Ability to accurately track moving subjects in video

 • Strong attention to detail (no missed frames or visibility errors)

 • Fast turnaround and good communication

 • Reliable internet connection



Important

This role requires precision. If the face is visible at any point, the edit is not acceptable.



Test Task (Required to Apply)

To be considered, you must complete a short paid test:

 • You will be given 1 sample video

 • You must blur or crop the face correctly

 • Submit the final exported file



Compensation

 • Paid per video (rate discussed after test task)

 • Ongoing work available for the right candidate

 • Opportunity to increase earnings by taking on more responsibilities over time



How to Apply

 1. Briefly describe your experience with video editing

 2. List the software you use

 3. Confirm you are comfortable with face tracking and blurring

 4. Include the word editor-ready in your application (to confirm you read this)

title: Collections Manager
description:
WFH

Graveyard Shift

1 year contract



Position Overview



Job Description

The Collections Manager is responsible for overseeing the accounts receivable collections process to ensure timely payment of invoices and maintain healthy cash flow. This role manages the collections team, monitors aging reports, resolves payment issues with clients, and works closely with accounting, billing, and operations teams to reduce outstanding receivables.



The Collections Manager will implement structured follow-up procedures, monitor collection performance metrics, and ensure accurate documentation of all collection activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Accounts Receivable & Collections Management

- Manage the full accounts receivable collections process for all client accounts.

-Monitor AR aging reports and identify overdue balances.

- Ensure consistent follow-up on past due invoices through
, phone calls, and formal notices.

- Prioritize high-value and high-risk accounts to reduce outstanding balances.

-  Work with clients to resolve billing disputes and payment issues.

- Negotiate payment plans when necessary.



Team Leadership

- Manage and supervise the collections team.

- Assign accounts and collection priorities.

- Train tea
mbers on collection procedures and systems.

- Monitor team performance and ensure collection targets are met.



Reporting & Analysis

- Produce weekly and monthly collections reports.

- Track KPIs such as:

          Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

          Collection rate

          Aging trends

         Top delinquent accounts

- Present reports and updates to senior management.



Cross-Department Coordination

- Work closely with:

       Finance & Accounting

      Billing

      Sales

     Operations



- Ensure invoices are accurate and disputes are resolved quickly.

- Coordinate with accounting to apply payments correctly in QuickBooks.



Process Improvement

- Develop and implement improved collections procedures.

- Identify inefficiencies in billing or invoicing processes that delay payments.

- Implement automation and reporting tools where appropriate.



Compliance & Documentation

- Ensure all collection activity is properly documented.

- Maintain accurate client communication records.

- Ensure collection practices comply with company policies and applicable laws.



Qualifications

Experience

- 5+ years of experience in accounts receivable or collections.

- 2+ years managing a collections team preferred.

- Experience with large commercial accounts and high invoice volumes.



Technical Skills

- Experience with QuickBooks or similar accounting software.

- Strong knowledge of AR aging and collections strategies.

- Proficiency with Excel and financial reporting tools.



Soft Skills

- Strong negotiation and communication skills.

- High attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple priorities.

- Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- The Collections Manager will be evaluated based on:

- Reduction in Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)

- Monthly collections percentage

- Reduction of 90+ day receivables

- Resolution time for billing disputes

- Accuracy of AR reporting

- Team productivity and performance



Send your resume to

title: Grant & Proposal Junior Assistant
description:
Grant & Proposal Junior Assistant (Part-Time, Long-Term)

Overview

I am the Principal of a small but growing consulting firm in the U.S. that helps innovative small businesses secure funding and contracts from government and commercial organizations. I am looking for a detail oriented Grant & Proposal Junior Assistant to support preparation, organization, and coordination for grant and proposal submissions (both government and commercial).

Type of Work

• Part-time

• 4–10 hours per week depending on business tempo (this will vary week to week)

• Long-term role with potential to grow in hours and responsibilities over time

Compensation

• Starting rate: 3.75 USD per hour

• First raise opportunity at 60 days based on performance

• Expect pay growth over time with excellent performance and increased responsibility

Key Responsibilities

• Read and interpret opportunity instructions, guidelines, and FAQs, ensuring all key requirements are captured accurately.

• Download and organize all documents (RFPs, templates, forms, rubrics, etc.) into clearly labeled folders and subfolders in shared online storage.

• Summarize requirements, eligibility, evaluation criteria, and submission steps into simple checklists or briefs for my review.

• Prepare draft outlines for proposals and applications using templates when available, aligned to instructions.

• Maintain a basic tracker for opportunities, tasks, and deadlines so we stay ahead of due dates.

• Support submission coordination when needed (e.g., confirming portal requirements, formats, registrations), while I remain responsible for final submission.

What This Role Is NOT

• You are not the lead or final grant or proposal writer.

• You are not responsible for final content decisions or final submissions.

What I Will Do as Principal

• Select opportunities and define overall proposal strategy.

• Provide templates, prior examples, and direction for each opportunity when available.

• Write and edit the final proposal or grant application.

• Coordinate with clients and manage final submission.

• Provide regular feedback and guidance so you can learn our processes and expectations over time.

Schedule & Communication

• No fixed daily schedule or time zone overlap required, but you must attend 1–2 short meetings per week (scheduled in advance) via Google Meet.

• Outside of meetings, you can work flexible hours as long as tasks are completed on time and deadlines are met.

• Use clear written communication, keep trackers updated, and provide status updates.

Minimum Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in any field (required).

• Excellent written English and strong reading comprehension.

• High attention to detail and a methodical approach to following instructions.

• Comfortable reading long and sometimes technical instructions without missing important details.

• Experience with online file storage and collaboration tools (e.g., Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive) and office tools (Docs, Sheets, Word, Excel).

• Ability to create and maintain simple spreadsheets, checklists, and calendars to track tasks and deadlines.

• Reliable internet connection and ability to manage, organize, and back up documents.

Ideal Candidate

• You are organized, reliable, and careful with details.

• You like turning complex instructions into clear steps and checklists.

• You are comfortable working independently, asking questions when something is unclear, and following simple SOPs or templates.

• You are looking for a stable, long term client relationship with room to grow your skills, responsibilities, and pay over time.

How to Apply

Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include the following:

1. Explain why this role fits your skills (max 275 words). The last sentence in your cover letter should be “Yes, I follow detailed instructions well.”

2. Your updated resume/CV, including your degree.

3. Explain how this 4-10 hours per week fits into your current schedule.

4. Can you briefly describe your workspace setup? For example, do you have a dedicated, quiet space and a stable internet connection?

5. Confirm starting hourly rate.

title: Livestream Operations Manager (onsite at Parañaque)

Dear Applicants,



## Livestream Operations Manager – We're Hiring! ##



**Please note that this is an onsite job at Parañaque**



We run live commerce operations across multiple countries and platforms, and we need an experienced Livestream Operations Manager to keep everything running smoothly. You'll manage session flow, lead and support the hosting team, onboard new livestreamers, and step on camera yourself when needed.



IMPORTANT: This role requires prior experience in both livestreaming and operations management. You must be confident on camera and equally confident running the show behind it.



Job Scope:

- Coordinate and manage livestream schedules across platforms and markets

- Ensure smooth execution of sessions — briefing hosts, monitoring quality, and troubleshooting in real time

- Sub in as a livestream host when needed

- Onboard and guide new livestreamers on workflows, platform tools, brand standards, and live selling techniques

- Monitor concurrent live streams and provide real-time support to hosts

- Track performance metrics and compile regular reports with insights

- Maintain and improve SOPs for all livestream operations

- Coordinate with marketing, content, and supply chain teams to align promotions and logistics



Requirements:

- Prior experience as a livestream host or live commerce presenter — confident and comfortable on camera

- Prior experience in livestream operations or e-commerce operations management

- Able to onboard and coach new livestreamers effectively

- Familiar with TikTok Shop, Shopee Live, or similar live selling platforms

- Strong organisational and multi-tasking skills

- Good written and spoken English

- Proactive and solutions-focused with a high sense of ownership



Note:

- Full-time basis – 6 hrs/day (with 1 hr break), 6 working days within a Monday–Sunday window

- Shifts are between 8am and 10pm (Philippine Standard Time) — specific schedule to be discussed

- 14 days of Paid Annual Leave and Paid Public Holidays (all major holidays in the Philippines) included



IMPORTANT: When applying, please provide:

- Your CV/Resume

- A short video introduction of yourself and why you think you're a good fit

- Why you are leaving your last job or what you were doing just before this application

- A portfolio or examples of previous livestream hosting and/or operations management work — this can include links to live sessions, screenshots of dashboards, SOPs, or team coordination work you've handled. Applications without demonstrated livestream experience will not be considered.



Applications without the above points will be less considered.

• Here are examples of my work...



The more information you provide in your initial application, the better.



Best regards,

Loo Yi

title: Video Editor / Creative Strategist (Performance-Based Pay + Free Courses Included)
description:
The Role

You'll start by editing short-form video ads (UGC-style, direct response) using scripts, AI tools, and briefs we provide. Over time, you'll develop into a full Creative Strategist — learning how to research markets, develop angles, and build ad concepts from scratch.

Schedule & Time Zone

We don't care when you work — as long as your daily output is delivered and you make the Saturday strategy call. You manage your own hours.

Daily output: 1 ad concept with 3 video variations.

You'll use AI and structured prompts for scripting and iteration, upload deliverables to Google Drive, log everything in our tracking sheet, and join weekly strategy calls. This is a system — you follow the process, use the frameworks, hit your output, and you earn.

How You Get Paid

You earn 2.5% of the first $10,000 in spend generated by each ad concept you create.

That's up to $250 per winning concept.

At 5+ concepts per week, you're getting 20+ shots on goal every month. You don't need every concept to win. You need a few. And as your skill improves, your hit rate goes up — and so does your income.

There is no monthly cap. The more winners you produce, the more you make.

Revenue is tracked transparently in a shared sheet and payments are made bi-weekly.

And we offer $
fixed salary on top for anybody delivering promising work reliably.

What You Get Beyond Pay

Access to premium direct-response and copywriting courses (valued at thousands of dollars) — included free as part of the role

Hands-on training in performance creative strategy — the same skillset US agencies charge $5K–$15K/month for

AI-powered workflow — you'll work with cutting-edge AI tools for scripting, ideation, and review

A real path to growth — you're not stuck editing clips forever. You're building a skillset that compounds

Most editing roles pay you to stay in the same place. This one pays you to get better. You'll understand how ads are built, why they work, and how to create them from scratch. That knowledge compounds whether you stay with us long-term or go on to build something of your own.

This Role Is For You If…

You can edit video cleanly and quickly (Premiere, DaVinci, CapCut — whatever you're fast in)

You want to learn direct-response marketing, not just push pixels

You're reliable, consistent, and can hit a daily output target

You're excited by the idea of getting paid based on results, not hours

You want a long-term role where your earning potential grows as you grow

This Role Is NOT For You If…

You want a fixed salary with no performance component

You're not comfortable with a learning curve

You can't commit to consistent daily output

Final Notes

This is a performance culture.

You get rewarded for speed, output, and results.

If you want to make more, produce more, test more, win more.

The system is here to make sure your pay scales with your impact.

To Apply

Fill out this short form below and link any past work (ads, reels, edits — anything that shows you can cut video).

title: SYSTEMS and AUTOMATION SPECIALIST Needed
description:
SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION SPECIALIST — Digital Coaching Business (Hair Industry)



This is NOT a VA role. Do not apply if you mainly manage inboxes and calendars.



I run a fast-growing digital education and coaching business in the hair industry. I have an active Skool community, digital products on Shopify, live masterclasses,
 funnels, and a custom AI platform. Things move fast here. I need someone who can keep up and build systems that run without me.



You will own the backend. That means:



• Building and managing automation workflows (ConvertKit, Zapier, ManyChat)

• Setting up and maintaining funnel flows — upsells, tripwires, post-purchase sequences

• Managing product setup on Whop and Shopify (links, checkout, confirmations)

• Preparing and testing all backend systems before launches so nothing breaks

• Supporting live masterclasses and ensuring tech runs smooth on the day

• Setting up SMS reminders and automations once systems are live

• Keeping operations organised, documented, and running without me chasing



Tools we use: ConvertKit, Zapier, ManyChat, Skool, GHL, Whop, Shopify, Lovable, Stripe



You are the right person if:

• You have hands-on experience with automation tools — not just surface level

• You've worked inside a digital coaching or course-based business before

• You think ahead and flag issues before they become problems

• You are reliable under pressure — launches are not the time to go quiet

• You can work independently and don't need to be micromanaged



This is not for you if:

• You've only done general admin or social media scheduling

• You need constant direction to get tasks done

• You've never built a funnel or set up an automation from scratch



Role structure:

• Part-time — 25 hours per week

Trial starts at $600/month. After 60 days, pay increases based on your performance and results. This role grows with the business, meaning so does your income.



To apply you must send:

1. Examples of automation workflows or funnels you have personally built (screenshots or Loom walkthroughs preferred)

2. Proof of experience working inside a digital business — coaching, courses, memberships.... etc

3. A portfolio with your work, client results, feedback, or testimonials



Applications without ALL of the above will not be considered .

title: YouTube Scriptwriter for Stock Trading & Investing Channel (Educational Content)
description:
We are looking for a skilled YouTube scriptwriter to help create high-quality educational content focused on stock trading, investing, and trading tools.

You will be writing scripts for videos such as:

How to use trading platforms

Best tools for day trading

Beginner guides to trading and investing

Step by step tutorials

Tool comparisons and reviews



What You’ll Be Doing:

Write clear, engaging YouTube scripts based on provided topics

Research trading tools and platforms to ensure accuracy ( we can help with this also )

Structure scripts for strong viewer retention and watch time

Write in a way that is simple and easy to understand, even for beginners



What We’re Looking For:

Strong English writing skills

Ability to explain complex topics in a simple way

Experience writing YouTube scripts OR educational content

Basic understanding of stock trading, investing, or willingness to learn quickly

Ability to follow structure and improve based on feedback

Reliable communication and consistency



Bonus (Not Required but Valuable)

Experience with trading platforms

Understanding of YouTube retention strategies and hooks

SEO knowledge for YouTube search-based content



Pay Structure:

Why This Role Matters

Our content directly impacts real users making financial decisions. We are not looking for filler content. We are looking for writers who can create clear, trustworthy, and effective educational scripts that people actually benefit from.

title: Repricing Operations Assistant
description:
About Autopilot

Autopilot (
) helps travelers get the best price on their flights after they’ve already booked a reservation—using a mix of software, operational excellence, airline expertise, and smart systems. We’re aviation-obsessed, detail-oriented, and fast-moving. As we scale, we’re expanding our Repricing Operations team to ensure customers consistently receive the best possible fares when price drops occur.

Role Overview

As a Repricing Operations Assistant, you’ll support daily repricing execution by working a ticket queue, communicating directly with airlines (primarily via chat, and sometimes by phone), and ensuring repricing requests are handled accurately and efficiently. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in structured, ticket-based workflows and can maintain precision under pressure.

You’ll receive full training on our systems and internal playbooks. The work is operational, repeatable, and detail-heavy—success comes from speed and accuracy.

Work Schedule (U.S. Hours)

This role is designed to cover our second operational window.

Primary coverage: approximately 9:00/10:00 AM – 5:00/6:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time





This typically falls overnight in the Philippines (exact local hours vary slightly with U.S. daylight saving time)





What You’ll Do

Ticket Queue Ownership (Notion-based workflow)

Monitor and work assigned repricing tickets based on internal prioritization guidelines





Keep tickets moving: progress updates, next steps, and outcomes documented clearly and consistently





Escalate edge cases and discrepancies to the Repricing Operations Manager quickly





Airline Communication & Repricing Execution

Contact airlines through their support channels (online chat and, when needed, phone) on the customer’s behalf





Request and confirm repricing outcomes without changing the itinerary (and preserving seats where applicable/possible)





Maintain professional, concise communication while ensuring all required details are captured correctly





Accuracy, Documentation & Quality Control

Verify all repricing details (fare, ticket status, booking/ticket references, and required confirmation elements)





Record results in our tools (Notion + internal portal + Google Sheets as needed)





Ensure work aligns with company policy and airline constraints; flag anything that looks off





Collaboration

Coordinate with Repricing Ops and Customer Support to ensure customers receive accurate outcomes





Participate in ongoing training and process improvement as our systems evolve





Must-Have Qualifications

Philippines-based and able to work reliably during U.S. Eastern Time business hours (overnight PH time)





For operational continuity, applicants based in Visayas or Mindanao are especially encouraged to apply





Extraordinary attention to detail (you naturally double-check references, names, numbers, and fare outcomes)





Comfort working in a ticket-driven environment with clear process adherence and frequent updates





Strong written English and the ability to communicate clearly and professionally with airline representatives





Comfortable with voice communication when required (clear spoken English, strong listening skills, a professional phone presence, and a quiet workspace to take calls from)





Able to handle multiple tickets at once, stay organized, and work quickly without sacrificing accuracy





Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace suitable for occasional calls





Tools You’ll Use

Slack (team communication)





Notion (ticket queue + internal documentation)





Google Sheets (tracking and operational workflows)





Company intranet and internal tooling (training provided)





Strong Pluses (Not Required)

Prior experience in airline ticketing, airline customer support, or fare-related operations





Experience supporting or working with U.S.-based airlines





Familiarity with GDS systems such as Sabre and/or Amadeus





Experience in a high-volume operations environment with SLAs, queues, and strict documentation standards





Training

We provide comprehensive onboarding, including systems training, airline communication guidelines, documentation standards, and quality checks.

What We Offer

A fast-growing, travel-focused team with clear ownership and growth opportunities





Structured training and defined processes





Competitive compensation





Fully remote collaboration with a supportive operations culture



PLEASE READ:



IN ORDER TO COMPLETE THIS APPLICATION PLEASE RESPOND TO THE FOLLOWING PROMPTS (APPLICATIONS WITHOUT THIS WILL BE REMOVED):



-Do you have any experience working with any Airline, if so what airline, and what did you do?



-Do you have any experience working with any GDS system, if so, where



-Where in the Philippines do you work from?



-Do you feel comfortable with phone support?

title: Go High Level CRM & Automation Specialist
description:
I am a very small business owner and I'm looking for an advanced Go High Level expert to support our CRM as needed/on-demand. Basically, I'm busy with doctor stuff and I don't want to take time away from all the other things to work in Go HIgh Level.



THIS IS NOT A TRADITIONAL VA POSITION. Some weeks there may be no work at all. Other weeks there may be a few focused tasks. This role is ideal for someone who already supports multiple clients and wants flexible, project-based work.



How the role works



You will typically receive a video about an issue inside Go High Level. Your job is to independently diagnose the problem, fix it inside the system, and send a short video back explaining what was done.



There are no meetings, no daily check-ins, and no hand-holding.



Primary responsibilities

- Investigate and resolve confusing or excessive notifications

- Clean up broken or overlapping automations and workflows

- Organize and fix messy pipelines and opportunities

- Troubleshoot and reconnect forms, landing pages, and automations

- Build automations, flows, and landing pages in our brand when requested 

- Communicate clearly what was fixed and why



Requirements

- Advanced experience with Go High Level

- Strong understanding of triggers, workflows, pipelines, forms, and funnels

- Ability to work independently without step-by-step instructions

- Comfortable receiving tasks via video and responding the same way

- Reliable, organized, and systems-minded

- Willing to work on an ad hoc basis with variable workload

- Comfortable with access inside Go High Level



Turnaround expectations

- Most tasks will have a 3 to 5 day turnaround depending on complexity.



Pay structure

- We are open to hourly or per-task pricing and will determine the best fit based on experience and efficiency.



Important note

- If you need detailed SOPs, frequent clarification, or ongoing supervision, this role will not be a good fit. We are specifically looking for someone who can watch a video, think critically, and fix the issue.



To apply, please
 me and include:

- A brief summary of your Go High Level experience

- Examples of automations, workflows, or CRM cleanups you have handled

- Whether you prefer hourly or per-task work, why and your preferred fees.

title: Marketing Coordinator
description:
Marketing Coordinator

Advance Chiropractic & Performance – Little Rock, AR (Remote)

Position Overview



Advance Chiropractic & Performance is seeking a highly organized and dependable Marketing Coordinator to manage and execute all daily, weekly, and monthly marketing operations. This role combines strategic coordination with implementation, ensuring consistency across social media,
 marketing, advertising, CRM systems, and community engagement.

The Marketing Coordinator will work directly with Dr. Derek to turn ideas into systems and action, translating creative concepts into structured campaigns that grow brand awareness, drive new patient leads, and protect the consistency of ACP’s messaging and systems.



Right now, this is a part-time position (20–25 hours per week). We will start simple. As you learn the company and accept more responsibility, there is potential to expand into a full-time role very quickly.



Core Responsibilities



Marketing Systems and Content Execution



Complete all tasks within the established Digital Marketing Checklist accurately and on schedule.

Use ACP specific AI to create content then edit, and schedule across social platforms including Instagram,

Use ACP’s guidelines to write engaging captions, headlines, and copy aligned with our tone and goals.

Post daily Instagram and
 stories to maintain consistent visibility.

Monitor social media trends and identify opportunities to increase reach and engagement.

Create, monitor, and optimize Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Ads campaigns to support brand visibility and lead generation goals.



Design and produce marketing materials such as flyers, handouts, presentations, promotional graphics, and workshop materials for both digital and print use.



Use ACP specific AI to create and schedule weekly and monthly
 campaigns, including educational content, promotional offers, and monthly wrap-up newsletters.



Maintain brand consistency across all written, visual, and digital materials.



Track, analyze, and report on social and ad performance data within content and paid advertisements.

Engage followers through weekly polls, story sweeps, and direct messages to increase visibility and relationship depth.



CRM, Automation, and Lead Management (Go High Level)



Create, manage and maintain all leads within Go High Level, ensuring contacts are categorized correctly and moving through the pipeline.



Create, optimize, and troubleshoot automations for
 campaigns, follow-ups, and reminders.

Provide performance updates during weekly marketing meetings on weekly
s and promotions

Periodically review established automations to find inefficiencies or ugly
 templates.

Promotions, Workshops, and Community Engagement



Plan and execute promotional campaigns, including seasonal offers, service highlights, and local partnerships.

Coordinate and support workshops with preparation of all marketing materials.



Establish and nourish relationships with local businesses and partners from ACP’s Dream 50 list. (This can be explained)

Conduct “Sell by Chat”/SBC conversations with potential leads to qualify and book Discovery Calls. (This is outside the scope of a Marketing Coordinator, but is an EXTREMELY important part of my practice and is expected once trained.)



Learning, Strategy, and Development



Dedicate one hour per week to learning marketing strategies, brand communication, or automation systems by attending a weekly Marketing call. 

Stay informed on social media trends, marketing best practices, and emerging digital tools.

Participate in weekly meetings, share campaign data, and contribute ideas for improved performance.

Create templates for re-use on social and marketing content when at all possible 



Boundaries and Expectations



Work within established marketing systems and checklists.

Communicate clearly if a project exceeds available hours or capacity.

Report automation issues or unclear directives promptly.

Maintain professionalism and brand integrity in all interactions.

Speak with collaborative tone. 

Complete all tasks with accuracy, timeliness, and initiative.



Qualifications



High school diploma or equivalent required

A degree in marketing, communications, or public relations required.

2–5 years of experience in marketing, digital media, or related fields.

Proficiency in Canva and CRM systems (Go High Level).

Basic understanding of Meta 
/Instagram) Ads, Google Ads, and YouTube Ads.

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills.

Strong organizational and time management abilities.

Ability to work independently while maintaining consistent communication with leadership.

A self-starter who thrives in a collaborative, growth-focused environment.



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate for this position is steady, organized, and dependable with a collaborative and solutions-focused personality that likes to “fail forward”. They thrive on bringing structure to creative ideas and enjoy turning concepts into clear, repeatable systems. They communicate with clarity, listen first, and ask thoughtful questions to understand direction rather than challenge it. 



This person is detail-oriented, follows through on commitments, and values consistency and collaboration. They balance creativity with discipline, adapt quickly and ask clarifying questions, if necessary, to maintain composure in fast-moving situations.

title: DM Outreach Specialist (DM Dad System)
description:
DM Outreach Specialist (DM Dad System)

Overview



We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive DM Outreach Specialist to manage social media profiles and generate leads using our proprietary system, DM Dad.



In this role, you will be responsible for engaging potential customers through direct messages, following proven scripts, and guiding conversations toward clear buying decisions.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation & Messaging



Send daily DM quotas across assigned social media profiles

Use DM Dad to automate initial outreach messages

Send and manage follow-up messages daily

Respond to all incoming messages in a timely manner

Guide conversations toward a clear outcome (“Yes” or “No”)



Conversation Management



Follow scripts closely to maintain consistency and performance

Prioritize active conversations and respond quickly

Introduce prospects to the client’s product/service

Convert conversations into qualified leads and potential buyers



CRM & Lead Tracking
