“Won” (converted leads)

“Not Interested”

Ensure leads are only tagged after a clear decision is made



Account & System Management



Report non-functioning or underperforming accounts

Monitor automation to ensure messages are accurate and logical

Report bugs, glitches, or inefficiencies in DM Dad

Record issues with clear details (screenshots or OBS recordings)



Daily Operations



Run follow-ups once per day

Warm up accounts daily:

15 minutes of activity per profile

Leave at least one relevant comment per account

Stay active for 15 minutes after sending follow-ups to respond to replies

Confirm completion of tasks via



Working Hours


:
 AM – 6:00 PM EST

Monday through Saturday

Communication

Primary communication via

Provide daily updates including:

Confirmation of DMs sent

Replies completed

Follow-ups sent

Tools & Requirements

AdsPower (login provided)


OBS (for recording issues when needed)

Way to take screenshots. 



Performance Expectations

Consistently meet daily DM quotas

Respond to messages at least twice per day per profile

Maintain high responsiveness, especially for active conversations

Focus on driving conversations to a decision point

Compensation

$465/month base salary

+$1 per qualified lead marked “Won” (must be confirmed signup within chat)

How to Apply



If you’ve read this job description, include “dm dad” in your application message.

title: Reddit Posting Virtual Assistant (Simple Task, Daily Work)
description:
Description:

I’m looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to help post content on Reddit daily.



This is a very simple and repetitive task, but it requires attention to detail and following instructions carefully.



Your daily tasks:



Log in to a remote computer (VPS) using Remote Desktop (RDP)

Open Firefox (already set up with everything you need)

Use 3 tabs:

Content website (where posts are prepared)

Subreddit list (where to post)

Reddit

Post content to:

6 subreddits in the morning

The same 6 subreddits again ~5 hours later (different post)



That’s it. No writing required — everything is already prepared.



Requirements:



Must know how to use Reddit (posting, basic rules)

Must follow instructions EXACTLY (very important)

Must be consistent and on time daily

Must have stable internet

Experience with VPN/RDP is a plus



Important:

Reddit has strict rules. You must:



Not spam

Follow subreddit guidelines

Space out posts properly



(You will be trained)



Working hours:



2 sessions per day (morning + ~5 hours later)

Each session takes ~15–30 minutes



Payment:



Fixed daily or weekly pay (to be discussed)

Long-term work available if performance is good



To apply:

Answer these questions:



Have you used Reddit before? What did you do on it?

Have you worked as a VA or done similar tasks?

Can you follow strict instructions daily without missing days?

What is your timezone?



(Optional but preferred)

5. Do you understand what causes Reddit accounts to get banned?



Bonus (will prioritize):



Experience posting on Reddit

Understanding of subreddit rules and behavior



Looking for someone reliable long-term. If you do well, this can be ongoing work.

build high-converting Google Ads campaigns

create or optimize landing pages that actually convert

connect forms, automations, and webhooks properly

help us improve lead quality, conversion rates, and overall ad performance

If you know how to take a home service business and turn Google into a consistent lead source, keep reading.

About Us

We’re a fast-growing exterior cleaning company offering services like:

Window Cleaning

Gutter Cleaning

Roof Cleaning / Soft Washing

House Washing

Solar Panel Cleaning

Permanent Outdoor LED Lighting

We care a lot about:

lead quality

speed to lead

conversion rate

clean systems

good communication

actually making ads profitable

We’re looking for someone who can help us build and optimize a real lead generation system, not just “launch some campaigns and hope.”

What You’ll Be Responsible For

Google Ads Management

You should be able to confidently build, manage, and optimize campaigns for local service businesses.

This includes:

Search campaigns

Call campaigns

Branded + non-branded campaigns

Service-specific campaigns

Location-based targeting

Negative keyword strategy

Match type control

Conversion tracking setup

Budget allocation

Bid strategy optimization

Ad copy testing

Search term review

Lead quality improvement

Ongoing campaign optimization and scaling

You should understand how to optimize for:

qualified leads

booked jobs

high-intent search traffic

not just cheap clicks

Landing Page / Funnel Work

We do not want to send traffic to weak or generic pages.

You should be able to either:

build, improve, or advise on high-converting landing pages

understand what makes a page convert in home services

improve page structure, messaging, offer presentation, CTA flow, mobile responsiveness, trust signals, etc.

Bonus if you’re proficient in Lovable and can help us build or improve landing pages there.

You should understand:

conversion-focused layout

local service offers

trust-building elements

call-first vs form-first flow

mobile conversion optimization

thank you page flow

booking flow optimization

Tracking / Automation / Integrations

We need someone who can help make sure our lead flow is clean and trackable.

You should be comfortable with:

Google Ads conversion tracking

Google Tag Manager (preferred)

UTM setup

thank you page conversion tracking

webhook setup

connecting forms into CRM systems

troubleshooting broken lead flow

making sure attribution is actually usable

You do not need to be a full-on automation engineer, but you do need to understand how all of this works together.

GoHighLevel / CRM Support (Basic to Moderate)

form connections

workflow triggers

lead routing

basic automations

contact tagging

simple follow-up flow understanding

webhook-related setup or troubleshooting

This is not a full-time GHL admin role, but if you know your way around GHL, that’s a big plus.

What We’re Looking For

You’re a fit if you:

have real Google Ads experience for lead generation

understand local service businesses / home services

know how to improve lead quality, not just traffic

can think beyond just “campaign setup”

understand the full funnel from click ? lead ? booked job

can communicate clearly and actually explain what’s working / what’s not

are proactive, not someone we have to babysit

can spot problems fast and solve them

Big Bonus If You Have Experience With:

Lovable

GoHighLevel

webhooks / Zapier / integrations

Google Tag Manager

local service businesses

exterior cleaning

roofing / windows / pressure washing / home services

call tracking

landing page CRO

Meta Ads (not required, but a plus)

description:
We are building a fast-growing international women’s high fashion brand operating between Europe, the US and Asia.



We are looking for a high-level operator with experience in fashion who can take full control of the business operations and work directly with the founder.



This is NOT a simple assistant role.

You will organize, control and improve everything behind the scenes.



?



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You will manage the full operational flow of the company:

 • Coordinate production and collections (Asia-based suppliers)

 • Follow up technical development, fittings, samples and timelines

 • Track deliveries (EU / US) and solve issues fast

 • Monitor cash flow and supplier payments

 • Track margins per collection and client

 • Coordinate team execution (design, sales, admin)

 • Ensure launches and deliveries happen on time

 • Build simple systems and weekly reports



?



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (IMPORTANT)

 • Experience in women’s fashion / high fashion / premium fashion

 • Understanding of collections, production timelines and fittings

 • Experience working with suppliers or factories

 • Strong sense of quality and product detail



???? Applications without fashion experience will NOT be considered.



?



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 • MBA or strong business background

 • Very structured and detail-oriented

 • Strong analytical thinking

 • Fast, solution-driven, independent

 • Able to manage multiple topics at the same time

 • Fluent in English



You must be someone who brings structure, control and clarity.



?



IMPORTANT



This is a high-responsibility role.



You will act as the right hand of the founder and manage core operations of the business.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a talented and creative Graphic Designer to join our team on a full-time basis. You will be responsible for creating visually compelling designs that communicate our brand message and engage our target audience across digital and print platforms.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Design marketing materials including social media graphics, banners, flyers,
 templates, and presentations

- Create and maintain consistent brand identity across all visual assets

- Collaborate with the marketing and content team to produce high-quality visuals

- Develop original design concepts based on briefs and creative direction

- Edit and retouch images and photos as needed

- Manage multiple design projects simultaneously and meet deadlines

- Stay up-to-date with design trends, tools, and best practices



REQUIREMENTS:

- At least 2 years of professional graphic design experience

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and/or Canva Pro

- Strong portfolio showcasing a variety of design work (please include a link to your portfolio in your application)

- Excellent understanding of typography, color theory, and layout

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow brand guidelines

- Good communication skills in English

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively

- Experience with social media design is a big plus



IMPORTANT: Please include a link to your online portfolio or samples of your work when applying. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



This is a remote, full-time position. We offer a supportive team environment, opportunities for growth, and competitive compensation.

title: DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist
description:
DEDICATED Full-Time premier pro Video Editor & Marketing Specialist



(High Salary Growth · with Huge Performance Bonuses · Long-Term Role)



No Beginners — Only Serious, Skilled Editors Apply



We are hiring a full-time, highly skilled premier pro video editor & marketing-focused creative who understands viral video creation at a deep level and can produce multiple high-quality, high-retention videos every single day.



This role is for someone who wants to grow with a team, build a long-term career, and be rewarded heavily for performance. The better your videos perform, the more you earn.



This is a highly rewarded role with massive long-term income potential for the right individual. Including huge extra benefits for top loyal perfomers





What We’re Looking For



We want a serious, dedicated editor who:

• Understands how viral videos work — especially on TikTok, Reels, and modern short-form platforms



• Can produce multiple 4-8 high-quality videos daily using Adobe Premiere Pro



• Has strong marketing instincts and understands how to create “watchable,” high-retention content



• Is motivated to grow their career, earn more, and become a key part of our long-term team

• Is committed, reliable, and consistent with daily output



• Wants a full-time role with massive salary growth opportunities



This position is for professionals only — no beginners, no part-timers, no hobby editors.







Salary & Growth



Starting Range: $400–$500 - can lead up to $1,500/month

(Depending on skills, experience, creativity, and daily output)



• Salary increases are based on your permanent

• Bonuses rewarded for high-performing viral videos

• The more the content grows, the more your salary grows

• Long-term potential for very high monthly pay for top performers

• Travel opportunities and niche-specific projects available as you grow within the company



- To be part of a multinational team that cares about you, and be part of a team not just staff



We only hire people who want a full-time, long-term home — not freelancers jumping from project to project.







Your Responsibilities:



4-8 videos Daily Video Editing & Production (duration anwher from 10secs to 2 mins+ )



• Produce multiple short-form videos per day for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts



• Edit in Adobe Premiere Pro (non-negotiable)



• Add creative transitions, pacing, captions, sound design, and storytelling



• Create viral-style videos without relying on generic templates



• Improve based on performance data & feedback



Marketing & Creative Strategy

• Work with the team to develop ideas, concepts, and hooks



• Help craft videos that sell, entertain, educate, or retain attention



• Understand how to market a physical product through content



• Be resourceful and solution-oriented with limited footage



• Create scenes using alternative footage, B-roll, and creative storytelling if clips are missing



Collaboration

• Work daily with our team (creators, assistants, strategists)

• Help turn raw ideas into powerful, viral-ready videos

• Bring your own suggestions, creativity, and marketing mind to every project







 What Makes This Role Unique:

• You will help grow a fast-scaling brand with huge global potential

• Long-term, stable, career-building opportunity

• You will have the freedom to grow, lead, and experiment creatively

• Exposure to different niches, products, and video styles

• Uploads of product footage will be provided, but creativity is required — when footage is missing, we adapt and find solutions

• Massive future salary growth for the right editor

• Opportunities to travel with the team as operations expand in couple of months from now



This is a job for someone who wants to build a real career, not just “edit videos.”







Ideal Candidate Profile

• Strong Adobe Premiere Pro skills

• Deep understanding of TikTok/Reels/Shorts virality

• Fast, efficient, and consistent daily editor

• Creative thinker with marketing instincts

• Problem solver who can work with limited footage

• Team player with great communication

• Long-term mindset with the ambition to grow inside the company

• Able to take feedback and improve quickly

• Full-time availability (no other jobs on the side)



 To Apply



Please send:

1. Your best short-form video examples (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

2. A short message explaining your experience with viral content

3. Your expected salary range

4. Confirmation you can work full-time, long-term

5. Your availability and commitment level



?

 Final Note



This is an exciting, high-growth opportunity for a dedicated editor who wants to rise, earn more, and build a powerful career inside a fast-growing company.

If you’re ready to work full-time, produce high-performing videos daily, and grow with a long-term team — we want to hear from you.



Only committed, professional video editors should apply.

title: Project Manager
description:
We're a growing e-commerce brand selling premium headwear. We serve both direct-to-consumer customers and corporate/wholesale clients, and we're scaling fast.

We're looking for a Project Manager to keep our team organized and our projects on track. You'll be the person who makes sure initiatives don't stall, deadlines get hit, and nothing falls through the cracks.

This isn't a passive tracking role. You'll actively drive projects forward, chase people down for updates (including the founders), and organize how we plan and work. You should be comfortable using AI tools to work faster and smarter.

This role starts part-time (20 hrs/week) with the opportunity to move to full-time based on performance.

What You'll Do:



Track project progress and chase updates from tea
mbers

Organize and run tea
etings (scheduling, agendas, follow ups)

Build planning docs, roadmaps, and templates

Coordinate new product launches

Handle ad hoc tasks to keep projects moving



Requirements:



3+ years e-commerce experience (real product brands, not dropshipping or service companies)

Extremely organized with strong attention to detail (this is critical)

Proficient with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) and uses them to work faster

Experience with project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Notion, Monday, etc.)

Strong written English

Proactive communicator who chases updates without being asked

Problem solver who figures things out independently

Self starter who doesn't need to be micromanaged

Experience with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides)



Nice to Have:



Shopify experience

Experience working with US based companies

Familiar with Slack

Background in apparel, fashion, or physical products



Tools You'll Use:



Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides)

ClickUp

Slack

Shopify

AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude)

title: Virtual Assistant for Folly
description:
WHO WE ARE



We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS



- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Free & Full Healthcare coverage (HMO & Health Insurance)

- Free Mental Health coverage

- HAVE FUN at our team-building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila teams. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, Korean BBQ, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



- Customer Support: Help musicians, athletes, celebrities, and top executives on chat,
, and phones with easy, low stress questions like booking rooms or general info about their stay.

- Sales & Follow-Up (Warm Leads): No cold calling! We only reach out to guests who’ve shown interest—like those who canceled a booking—to find out what happened. We also check in with past guests to share new locations and help plan their next stay.

- Back Office: We handle scheduling, calendar management, organizing files, invoicing, and other admin tasks to keep things running smoothly.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.



To apply: 



See the vibe:

title: CX Specialist
description:
WHO WE ARE



We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Free & Full Healthcare coverage (HMO & Health Insurance)

- Free Mental Health coverage

- HAVE FUN at our team-building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila teams. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, Korean BBQ, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



- Follow-Up with Warm Leads: Talk to guests who already showed interest—like people who canceled a booking or stayed with us before. You’ll reach out by phone or
 to see how we can help, share new spots they might like, and help them plan their next stay. No cold calling, ever!

- AI Assistance: We use AI to identify users who either abandoned their cart during checkout or are no longer actively staying with us. The AI calls these users to see if they need help completing their booking. If they do, we connect them with you to finalize their reservation.

- Subscription: We offer a subscription plan that gives guests access to all of our locations. When someone calls to cancel, your job is to explain the benefits and value of staying subscribed, and help them make the most of their membership.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.



Apply here: 





See the vibe:

title: Senior Marketing Specialist
description:
Senior Marketing Specialist/ Marketing Manager – Membership Growth & Content



Details: $10 – $11/hr | Full-Time | Remote



Looking for a Senior Marketing Specialist / Marketing Manager who can handle everything from SEO to content to graphic design. You should be able to work independently and get things done without much hand-holding.



What you'll do:

-Manage and grow our membership content and marketing campaigns

-Handle SEO, content strategy, and graphic design end-to-end

-Track performance and report results



What I need from you:

-You've done this before and can prove it — portfolio required

-Can work with minimal supervision



Nice to have:

Experience with membership-based businesses or communities

Familiar with tools like Canva, WordPress, Google Analytics, or similar



To apply, send:

-Resume

-Portfolio

-Video Introduction of yourself and walking through past work

title: Bookkeeper / Admin / Revenue Control (QuickBooks + Excel)
description:
We are a growing flower business looking for a highly organized and trustworthy Bookkeeper / Admin Assistant to manage financial tracking, reporting, and business organization.



This role is responsible for tracking all daily sales, maintaining accurate records, and ensuring all numbers match correctly.



Responsibilities:



Track all daily sales (Shopify, cash, Zelle, etc.)

Maintain Excel reports (sales, inventory, cash)

Use QuickBooks for bookkeeping

Reconcile team sales logs with actual payments

Track inventory (incoming vs sold vs remaining)

Identify discrepancies or missing items

Prepare daily and weekly reports

Assist with customer messages when needed



Requirements:



Strong Excel skills

QuickBooks experience

Very detail-oriented

Honest and trustworthy

Good English communication



Schedule:

Flexible schedule but must complete daily reports

Weekend availability preferred



Hours:

30–40 hours per week



Pay:

$700–$1,000 per month

Plus performance bonuses



Important:

Accuracy is critical. All numbers are reviewed daily.



To apply:

Send a voice recording and an example of Excel or bookkeeping work.

title: Virtua Assistant and Social Media Marketer
description:
You must provide a portfolio to be considered for this role. 



About the Role



We are looking for a thoughtful, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can support both marketing and day-to-day operations while helping us build genuine connections with women in our community.



This role goes beyond administrative support. You will be trained in lead generation, DM marketing, and content support, gaining hands-on experience in how to grow and scale a purpose-driven brand.



If you are someone who wants to learn, grow, and be part of building something meaningful, this is a strong opportunity.



Who This Is For



This role is for someone who:



Communicates with warmth, clarity, and emotional intelligence

Is eager to learn marketing, lead generation, and business systems

Can balance creativity with organization

Takes initiative and follows through consistently

Is interested in personal development, wellness, or faith-based content

Wants to grow with a small business long-term



 Core Responsibilities



1. Instagram DM Outreach & Lead Generation (Primary Focus)

Send 20–30 intentional messages per day to aligned prospects

Personalize outreach based on each person’s content and profile

Start and manage conversations that lead to event registrations

Ask engaging, low-resistance questions to build connection

Invite qualified leads to our free live workshops



2. Conversation Management & Follow-Up

Respond to messages in a timely and thoughtful manner

Follow up consistently (every 2–3 days when needed)

Engage with prospects’ content to build familiarity and trust

Track and move leads through each stage of the conversation process



 3. Calendar & Administrative Support

Manage scheduling and calendar organization

Assist with booking calls and tracking event registrations

Ensure smooth coordination for live workshops and meetings



4. Content Creation & Video Editing

Assist with editing short-form content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Support posting content across platforms

Help repurpose content for consistency and reach

Maintain alignment with brand tone and messaging



 5. Tracking & Performance Reporting

Track outreach, responses, and conversions daily

Maintain simple systems to monitor performance

Provide weekly updates on lead generation and event sign-ups



 Training & Growth

You will receive training in:

DM marketing strategies

Lead generation systems

Conversation-based sales

Content marketing fundamentals



This role is designed to give you real experience in building and scaling a brand through intentional marketing.



 What We’re Looking For

Required:

Strong written communication skills

Basic familiarity with Instagram and social media platforms

Organized and detail-oriented

Reliable and consistent

Basic video editing skills (CapCut, Canva, etc.)



Preferred (but not required):

Experience with DM marketing or social media management

Familiarity with Google Sheets or tracking systems



Brand Voice Expectations

Warm, grounded, and clear

Encouraging and thoughtful

Never pushy or transactional

Focused on connection, clarity, and value



Compensation & Growth Opportunities

$3.00 Base pay (hourly)

Commission for each client who attends the live workshop

Performance-based bonuses as the business grows

Opportunity to grow into a larger role as the brand expands

title: Real Estate Acquisitions
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

title: YouTube & Podcast Growth Architect (Media Operations)
description:
The Mission



We are a high-growth Health Freedom brand (A Step4Health) led by a Registered Nurse and Corporate VP. We are looking for a Media Operations specialist to transform our long-form podcast recordings into a 24/7 authority-building engine. Your goal is to own the YouTube platform and use it to drive high-intent traffic to our courses and clinical protocols.



The Sprint (First 6 Days)



The Audit: Full SEO optimization of the YouTube channel (Banner, About, Links).



Visual Podcast: Edit and post 2 full "Visual Podcast" episodes from existing Nomono recordings.



The Content Surge: Extract and schedule 10 high-conversion Shorts/Reels using Munch and Submagic.



Integration: Ensure every video description has a tracked link to our CC360 and Gumroad products.



Ongoing Responsibilities



High-Retention Editing: Use Descript to find viral hooks and Submagic for clinical-grade captions.



SEO Strategy: Research and implement keywords to rank for GLP-1, Peptides, and Medical Tourism.



Channel Management: Maintain a 100% consistent posting schedule in 
.



Authority Building: Create a "Sizzle Reel" to pitch the Founder for guest spots on major health podcasts.



Required Skills & Tools

Expert: Descript, Munch, Submagic, YouTube Studio.



Proficient: Canva (for thumbnails), 
, Course Creator 360 (GHL).



Mindset: You prioritize "Sales through Authority" over "Views for the sake of views."



This will be a base payment plus bonus payment for meeting the required metrics

title: Video Editor - Full Time Job ($$$)
description:

title: Outbound Sales / Appointment Setter (A-Players Only)
description:
Your Role

- You will be the first point of contact for men actively looking for help. Your job is to engage leads through calls, chat, and follow-ups, qualify them properly, and book high-quality appointments for our Sales Team.

- This is high-volume outbound work, not passive inbound setting.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 1.5–2+ years experience in outbound sales or appointment setting

- Comfortable making 200+ calls per day

- Strong spoken and written English

- Calm, emotionally stable, and confident under pressure

- Able to handle conversations about porn, addiction, and sexual behavior

- Coachable and precise with scripts and frameworks

- Self-motivated and accountable

- Reliable internet and power with backup

- Experience in health, wellness, fitness, or coaching sales is a plus.



What You’ll Do Daily

- Make high-volume outbound calls to warm and cold leads

- Hold real conversations and book qualified appointments

- Follow call and chat frameworks

- Maintain clean CRM notes and activity tracking

- Hit KPIs consistently without reminders



Who You’ll Be Speaking With

- High-functioning and ambitious men

- Private, guarded, and serious once engaged

- Looking for real help, not motivation



What We Offer

- Fully remote role

- Clear scripts, KPIs, and expectations

- Training and ongoing coaching

- Consistent lead flow

- Long-term growth for top performers



About Us

- Elevated Recovery® helps high-functioning men overcome porn addiction and rebuild discipline, relationships, and sexual health. We have helped 15,000+ men over the last 14 years.



Do NOT Apply If



- You avoid volume or pressure

- You need constant motivation

- You dislike structure or accountability



How to Apply

- Send your resume and a short note explaining why this role fits you. 



Secret Code: 21



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Rockstar Customer Service
description:
???? Rockstar Customer Service & Dispatch Coordinator Needed, High Growth Role



We are not looking for a typical VA.



We are building a fast-growing service company in Florida, and we need someone who can operate at a high level, think fast, and handle real responsibility.



If you are organized, detail-oriented, and great with customers, this could turn into a long-term opportunity.





About Us:



We are Palmway Pools, a premium pool service company that services residential homes and Airbnb properties.



Our customers rely on us to keep their pools in perfect condition, especially when guests are staying at their homes.



That means communication, speed, and attention to detail matter at a very high level.







What You’ll Be Doing:



You will be the bridge between customers and our field technicians.



This is not just customer support, this is operations.



* Answer inbound calls and messages from customers

* Coordinate and dispatch technicians efficiently

* Handle scheduling, rescheduling, and urgent issues

* Communicate clearly with both customers and the field team

* Track jobs and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

* Follow up with customers to ensure satisfaction

* Keep everything organized and documented





 Tools You’ll Be Using:



* WhatsApp

* Slack

* Go High Level (GHL)



What We’re Looking For:



We are looking for someone sharp.



* Excellent English, both written and spoken

* Experience in a service-based business (home services is a big plus)

* Strong attention to detail, you catch things others miss

* Fast thinker, able to handle pressure and make decisions

* Highly organized and proactive

* Great with customers, calm, professional, and confident

* Reliable and responsive, we move fast







This Role Is NOT For You If:



* You need constant supervision

* You miss details or forget tasks

* You are slow to respond

* You struggle with handling multiple things at once





## This Role IS For You If:



* You take ownership and solve problems

* You like being busy and moving fast

* You want to grow with a company long term

* You care about doing things right the first time





 Growth Opportunity:



This is a performance-based role.



If you perform at a high level, there will be opportunities for increased pay and more responsibility over time.



We reward reliability, speed, and attention to detail.





How to Apply:



To apply, send a message with:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with customer service and dispatching

3. A voice recording (30 to 60 seconds) explaining why you would be a good fit

4. The word *Palmway* at the top of your application so we know you read everything





If you are sharp, organized, and ready to grow, we want to hear from you.

title: LinkedIn Outreach VA for Florida Pool Service Company
description:
LinkedIn Outreach VA for Florida Pool Service Company (Long-Term Role)



Company:

Palmway Pools — Florida’s trusted pool and spa maintenance company for residential and short-term rental properties.



About Us:

We help property managers and Airbnb operators across Pinellas County, St. Pete, Clearwater, Treasure Island, and Tampa Bay keep their pools and spas guest-ready year-round.

We’re expanding our network of Florida property managers and need a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to handle LinkedIn outreach and lead tracking.



Position Overview:

We’re hiring a LinkedIn Outreach Virtual Assistant to connect with property managers, realtors, and vacation rental operators in Florida.

Your job is to send targeted connection requests, follow-up messages using our templates, and log all results into our tracking sheet. You’ll be the first step in our client acquisition process.



Daily Responsibilities

 Send 80–100 new LinkedIn connection requests per day using our provided filters.

 Send pre-written follow-up messages to new connections.

 Update our Google Sheet tracker with connection, message, and response data.

 Tag and notify us of interested property managers.

 Provide a short daily activity report via chat or
.



Requirements

Excellent written English (friendly and professional tone).

Strong attention to detail — accuracy is key.

Previous experience with LinkedIn outreach or lead generation.

Proficiency in Google Sheets.

Reliable internet and consistent daily availability.

Self-motivated, organized, and dependable — we’re looking for someone long-term.



Preferred (Not Required)

Experience with Expandi, Waalaxy, or GoHighLevel.

Background in real estate, property management, or hospitality.

Familiarity with Florida markets (especially Pinellas County).



Schedule & Pay



Hours: 15–40 hours per week (flexible schedule)



Pay: depending on experience





How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



A short intro paragraph about your LinkedIn or lead generation experience.

A screenshot of your internet speed test.

A short Loom video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and describing your past outreach or admin work.

Use the word “Palmway” in the subject line so we know you read the full post.



Why Join Palmway Pools

Long-term, stable work with a fast-growing Florida brand.

Simple, clear system — all scripts and instructions provided.

Bonuses for performance and reliability.

Supportive U.S.-based team that values communication and growth.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: WordPress Website Manager
description:
We are seeking a skilled and dependable WordPress Website Manager to support the ongoing maintenance, updates, and performance of our website.



This role is essential to ensuring our digital presence reflects the quality, professionalism, and experience our clients expect. The ideal candidate is both technically capable and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage day-to-day website operations efficiently.



Key Responsibilities

1. Maintain and update website content, including trip pages, landing pages, and blog posts

2. Upload and format new content while ensuring consistency in design and layout

3. Manage and update WordPress plugins, ensuring compatibility and performance

4. Monitor website functionality, including links, forms, and booking integrations

5. Troubleshoot and resolve basic website issues in a timely manner

6. Optimize website pages for mobile responsiveness and user experience

7. Perform routine checks to ensure site speed and overall performance are maintained

8. Make minor design and layout updates as needed using page builders (e.g., Elementor or similar)



Qualifications

1. Proven experience managing WordPress websites

2. Familiarity with plugins, themes, and page builders

3. Strong attention to detail and organization

4. Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

5. Basic understanding of website performance, speed, and troubleshooting



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)

To be considered for this position, all applicants must follow the instructions below:



1. Include the word “Let Sparks Fly WP” in the subject line of your application (Applications without this will not be reviewed)

2. Submit 2–3 WordPress websites you have worked on

3. Record a 1–2 minute video explaining: Why you are a strong fit for this role and your experience managing WordPress websites

title: Client Coach (Coaching and Feedback) – $1,100/month
description:
Full-Time | Long-Term Role



Start at $935 per month base.

With bonuses, most earn around $1,100 per month.

Top performers grow to $1,800–$2,500 within 6–12 months.



Paid every two weeks via Wise. Always on time.



This is not a short-term job.

We build long-term careers.



You’ll have clear systems, call scripts, training, and daily team support.

You won’t be guessing what to do.



About Us



Young Publisher - 



We are an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.

We have hired Filipino professionals for over 5 years.

We focus on stability, structure, and growth.



What You’ll Gain



- Full-time stable income

- Flexible hours (one daily meeting required)

- Reliable payments via Wise every two weeks.

- Performance bonuses

What You’ll Do

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 sessions

What We’re Looking For

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet

- Consistent and accountable



Bonus if you have experience with short-form content, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or AI tools like ChatGPT and CapCut.

Include ONLY:

Applications that do not follow this format will not be reviewed.

title: App Tester & Profile Creator — Social Media / Marketing Background
description:
We're building DatsMe — a personal website platform where people create

  a page around their passions and interests. Think of it like your own

  corner of the internet that you share with the people who matter.



  We're looking for 2–3 people to help us test the app by building real

  profiles and going through all the features as a genuine user would.



  What you'll do:

  - Sign up and create a personal profile on our staging site

  - Customize your page — themes, colors, photos, collections

  - Connect with other testers, message each other, try voice calls

  - Chat with the built-in AI assistant

  - Document what worked, what confused you, and what you loved



  This is NOT technical testing. We want real people who naturally

  understand how personal branding and social profiles work.



  You're a great fit if you:

  - Have experience building social media profiles or personal websites

  - Work in marketing, content creation, or social media management

  - Are naturally opinionated about what makes a profile look good

  - Can clearly express what feels right or wrong about an app



  Fixed price: $200 for 20 profile sessions with written feedback for each profile created.  

  Up to 2 rounds of work as the app improves (each round is a new contract).

title: Podcast Production & Promotion Assistant
description:
Job Title: Podcast Production & Promotion Assistant



Job Description:

We are looking for a reliable and creative Podcast Production & Promotion Assistant to support our growing podcast. This role involves both behind-the-scenes production work and helping expand our audience reach.



Responsibilities:



* Assist with editing podcast episodes (audio and video)

* Create engaging short-form content (reels/clips) to promote episodes

* Help manage the guest pipeline (scheduling, tracking, and coordination)

* Support podcast recording sessions

* Communicate with guests before and after recordings

* Develop and suggest strategies to promote episodes and increase views



Requirements:



* Basic experience with audio/video editing tools

* Familiarity with social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.)

* Strong communication and organizational skills

* Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks

* Creative mindset for content promotion



Nice to Have:



* Experience working with podcasts or content creators

* Knowledge of audience growth strategies



Work Setup:

* Remote / Flexible



If you're passionate about podcasts and content creation, we'd love to hear from you!
